title: Utvecklare Digitala Arbetssätt och BIM
description:
OM DIG!
  
  

Vi söker dig som drivs av att växla upp byggbranschen i digitaliseringens anda. I din roll som Utvecklare Digitala Arbetssätt och BIM hos Insikt delar du tiden som konsult i projekt eller driver processutveckling och förändringsledning på företagsnivå. Roller som Modellansvarig/BIM-ansvarig, BIM-samordnare och BIM-strateg i projekt är vanliga uppdrag för oss likväl som metodik- och processutveckling, rådgivning, affärsutveckling och utbildningar på företag. Vi arbetar över flertalet plattformar men söker nu dig med erfarenhet av projektering och metodikutveckling främst för disciplinerna A och IA, men även K.
  
Hos oss blir du en viktig del av ett ungt företag med höga ambitioner. Här har du stor möjlighet att utifrån din kunskap, ambition och erfarenhet forma en roll som både utvecklar dig som individ tillsammans med dina professionella kunskaper.
  
  

Ansvarsområden
  
  

**Vi vill att du:**  

Respekterar att hos oss är alla välkomna. Här har alla samma värde. En människas hudfärg, kön, födelseort, sexuella läggning eller religiösa övertygelse har ingenting med hennes mänskliga kvalitéer att göra.
  
Har ett starkt eget driv, hög ambitionsnivå och en vilja att ta ansvar.
  
Har flerårig erfarenhet och starka projekteringskunskaper inom disciplinerna A och IA, eller K.
  
Har erfarenhet av projektering i olika skeden genom projekteringsprocessen.
  
Har arbetat strukturerat med metodik och utveckling av metodik i projekt.
  
Gillar problemlösning samt har förmågan att se helheten i kombination med teknisk förankring.
  
Är nyfiken och utåtriktad.
  
Behärskar både svenska och engelska väl, i både tal och skrift.
  
Ett plus om du arbetat med metodikutveckling centralt på företag.
  
Ett plus om du arbetat som BIM-samordnare centralt i projekt.
  
Ett plus om du arbetat med BIM i förvaltning.
  
  

Utbildning - Färdigheter - Kunskap - Erfarenhet & Kvalifikationer
  
  

**Vi tror att du:**  

Har arbetet fler än 5 år och är på väg mot eller har redan arbetat som Handläggare i stora som små uppdrag.
  
Har jobbat i projektform och drivit egna projekt, där budget-och tidsramar varit en avgörande faktor.
  
Har arbetat metodik- och processrelaterade frågor för projektering
  
Gillar att arbeta med och komplexa arbetsuppgifter både självständigt och i team.
  
Har bakgrund som Arkitekt eller Byggnadsingenjör (eller likvärdig utbildning) med tidigare erfarenheter som Modellansvarig/BIM-ansvarig hos Arkitekt- eller Konstruktör.
  
Har ett flexibelt och prestigelöst förhållningssätt och ser det som en självklarhet att hjälpa till där det behövs.
  
  

Behärskar några/flera av följande system/program
  
AutoCAD
  
Autodesk Revit
  
Solibri, Navisworks, Revizto
  
Dalux, StreamBIM, BIMcollab
  
Autodesk Construction Cloud, BIMcloud
  
Pythonscript och annan programmeringskunskap
  
Unity, Unreal
  
Dynamo, Grasshopper
  
  

Detta är ett konsultuppdrag till vår kund i Stockholm.
  
  

Hyrpersonal Sverige, grundat år 2004, är en ledande leverantör av kvalificerad arbetskraft i hela Sverige. Företaget specialiserar sig på att erbjuda HR-lösningar för företag i alla storlekar, hantera komplexa lagliga krav, personalfrågor och fackliga förhandlingar. Med erfarna HR-konsulter och en inriktning på att attrahera toppchefer och specialister som landets bästa interimschefer inom högkvalificerade ämnesområden och inom executive rekrytering av chefer så kommer Hyrpersonal Sverige att fortsätta växa och utvecklas, vi firade 20 år av enastående service i december 2024.
  
Hyrpersonal Sverige har mycket goda referenser med att leverera spetskompetens till stora företag och organisationer inom offentlig sektor på kommunal samt statlig nivå.
  
  

**Krav:**  

**Körkort:**  

* B (Personbil)

title: .NET Developer | SEB Life & Pension, Solna
description:
*SEB Life & Pension is one of Sweden’s largest pension and insurance providers, serving both corporate and private customers. Our products and services support important life events and create security in an uncertain world. As a subsidiary within a large financial group, we combine the agility and influence of a smaller organization with the development opportunities and stability of a large international company. Our skilled tech teams play a key role in future-proofing SEB’s digital architecture and customer offerings—work that truly makes a difference for our customers and colleagues.*



Are you an experienced .NET developer who believes that strong teams create the best results? Join SEB Life & Pension on our modernization journey and help shape the future of financial services.


### **About the role**



As a .NET Developer, you will be part of a team responsible for maintaining and supporting business-critical applications that are essential to our daily operations. At the same time, you will contribute to the gradual modernization of our technology stack.



Your primary focus will be backend development in .NET, ensuring stability, performance, and reliability of existing systems. While much of the work involves maintenance and continuous improvement, you will also have opportunities to help build new technical capabilities. Experience with frontend development is considered a plus, as we collaborate closely with teams working on our digital user interfaces.



You will also work in a multicultural and dynamic environment together with our development center in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.



If you enjoy working with business-critical systems and want to help shape the path forward, we would be happy to connect with you.


### **Who We Are Looking For**



This role will suit you if you have a strong drive to maintain and improve business-critical system and enjoy contributing to a long-term modernization journey. You have experience in developing, implementing and maintaining applications, and you take responsibility for ensuring the stability and quality of the team’s solutions.  

  

Colleagues would describe you as someone who builds positive relationships, collaborates well with others, and delivers reliably. You are structured in your way of working and approach problem-solving with an analytical mindset.


**To succeed in this role, we believe you have:**


* A technical education, such as a university degree or equivalent in computer science, software engineering, or a related field
* Several years of professional experience working with:
	+ .NET / .NET Core (multiple versions)
	+ C#
	+ MS SQL and MongoDB
	+ REST APIs / Web Services
	+ Git
* Strong communication skills
* Fluency in both Swedish and English


**Advantages**


* Containerization and microservices (Docker, OpenShift, Kubernetes, Kafka)
* Frontend development
* Blazor
* Azure DevOps
* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

### **What We Offer**



We offer a wide range of benefits and opportunities, but at the core of our offering you will find:


* An international and collaborative working environment
* The opportunity to help transform an entire industry
* Extensive training and continuous learning opportunities
* An inclusive and value-driven culture
* The chance to deliver world-class services to our customers

**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
----------------------------------


It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.

Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than **1****2th of April 2026.** If you have questions about the position, please contact Frida Johansson, Head of IT Fund, by email at frida.a.johansson@seb.se
We will not process applications via email.

Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. We also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.

SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

**Learn more about working at SEB** on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
https://sebgroup.com/career
https://bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: SAP Datasphere Developer / Aspiring Solution Architect
description:
**Job description**
-------------------


*At Billerud, we believe that when we keep tomorrow in mind, we will do our very best today. It is thanks to our employees that we are a world-leading company within the field of renewable paper and packaging materials. We work with sustainability at every stage to create a sustainable future – from product to people. Do you want to realize your true value and work for a sustainable tomorrow? Join us!*

  

**Are you a developer who wants to take the next step toward becoming a Solution Architect? Then this could be your next chapter.**

  



We are in the middle of a major modernization journey and are strengthening our SAP Data & Analytics team. In this role, you will work deeply within our SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) landscape - strengthening our development capabilities, ensuring robust modeling practices, and contributing to our future transition toward SAP Business Data Cloud.

  



We welcome both experienced Solution Architects who enjoy working hands‑on and developers who want to grow into such a role. If you already have architecture experience, you will help lead modeling standards and platform design from day one. If you join from a developer background, you will follow a clear growth path toward becoming a Solution Architect while staying close to technology throughout.

  


**Your main responsibilities**

  

**SAP Datasphere**


* Contribute to the design, development and maintenance of SAP Datasphere solutions for data integration, data modeling and data management.
* Build high‑performance analytical models with strong focus on scalability and efficiency.
* Maximize the use of SAP standard content - both when extracting data from SAP source systems and when designing models and artifacts within SAP Datasphere.
* (When ready) Take on broader architectural responsibilities, including quality assurance, contributing to modeling standards and architectural decisions.

  


**SAP Analytics Cloud**


* Develop SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) content such as dashboards, stories and models.
* Support and implement advanced analytics scenarios, including predictive and planning‑oriented use cases.
* Explore new SAC features and evaluate how they can be used to create business value, driving continuous improvement in our analytics capabilities.
* (When ready) Define SAC design guidelines, ensure best‑practice modeling, and guide how SAC is used across the organization.

  

**About the position**


* You can be based at any of our sites in Sweden: Gävle, Gruvön, Frövi, Skärblacka, Karlsborg, or Stockholm/Solna.
* Travel to our head office in Solna will occur.
* A Swedish work permit is required. Relocation packages are not offered.

  



At Billerud, we put Safety First. Together we take great pride in our responsibility to contribute to a safe work environment. Please read more about our Safety First initiative here.


**Qualifications**
------------------


**To succeed in this role, we believe you have**


* Several years of experience working within SAP environments
* Experience with SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
* A solid understanding of SAP data models and how business processes are implemented
* Knowledge of data warehousing principles and modeling patterns
* roficient in English, both spoken and written

  


**It’s also a merit if you have**


* Background with other SAP Cloud solutions (e.g. HANA Cloud, Data Intelligence, BTP)
* Experience working with CDS views or a strong understanding of the CDS concept
* Basic SQL skills
* Understanding of Data Product concepts in modern analytics landscape


**Personal qualities**
----------------------



To thrive in this role, you are passionate about solving complex technical problems. You communicate technical concepts clearly and enjoy working with internal teams, project groups and external vendors. You are committed to delivering high‑quality solutions and take pride in ensuring customer satisfaction. You contribute positively to team dynamics and enjoy working in a global setting, adjusting to different cultures and work styles with a positive attitude.

  

  

*Our values are very important for us and we believe that you recognize yourself in: We care for each other and We do what we say.*


**Contact**
-----------



Questions about the position: Amy Celesti, Global IT Business Intelligence – amy.celesti@billerud.com

  



Questions about the recruitment process: Julia Åkerlund, Talent Acquisition Partner – julia.akerlund@billerud.com

  



We kindly decline contact from external recruitment providers.


**Application information**
---------------------------



Welcome with your application no later than April 8th.  

  

Billerud is an equal opportunity employer. We embrace diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.  

  

**Why us?**


* A unique opportunity to grow from developer to Solution Architect
* A global company with a strong sustainability and innovation agenda
* Performance-based bonus, pension plan and benefits according to company policy
* A collaborative culture built on care, trust and accountability

  


**Our recruitment process** will include interviews, recruitment test, reference checks, alcohol- & drug test as well as background checks.

title: ServiceNow HR Developer/ Implementation Consultant
description:
We are rapidly expanding our **ServiceNow Business Group in the Nordics** and seeking visionary **ServiceNow HR Developer/ Implementation Consultant** to help our clients transform their businesses, drive innovation, and achieve measurable outcomes.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* **Design and Implement HR Solutions:** Configure and implement ServiceNow HR Service Delivery (HRSD) modules, including Case and Knowledge Management, Employee Center, and Lifecycle Events.
* **Client Engagement:** Collaborate with HR stakeholders to understand business needs and translate them into scalable ServiceNow solutions.
* **Integration:** Connect ServiceNow HR workflows with other enterprise systems (e.g., payroll, identity management).
* **Platform Management:** Ensure stability, performance, and compliance of the ServiceNow HRSD environment.
* **Support and Optimization:** Provide ongoing support, troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve HR processes.
* **Documentation:** Maintain clear and comprehensive documentation for all configurations and customizations.
* **Stay Current:** Keep up to date with ServiceNow HRSD capabilities, certifications, and best practices.
* **Mentorship:** Share knowledge and guide junior team members.

  

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 3+ years of experience with ServiceNow, including HRSD implementation projects.
* Strong understanding of HR workflows, employee lifecycle processes, and ServiceNow HR modules.
* Hands-on experience with Flow Designer, Integration Hub, and scripting.
* Familiarity with Agile, Scrum, or SAFe methodologies.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Relevant ServiceNow certifications (HRSD Implementation Specialist preferred).
* University degree in Computer Science, HR Technology, or equivalent.
* Fluency in Swedish (spoken and written).

**What We Offer**

* Access to **free ServiceNow training** through our exclusive agreement with ServiceNow.
* Opportunities to become a **Certified Technical Architect (CTA)**
* Work on **large-scale, complex HR transformations** for leading Global enterprises.
* Be at the forefront of innovation, leveraging AI and advanced ServiceNow capabilities.
* Join the **largest global network of ServiceNow experts**, offering unparalleled collaboration and career growth.

title: Java Developer with interest or experience in test automation | SEB, Solna
description:
Join us to pioneer test automation and shape our tech landscape, combining your Java expertise with exciting GCP challenges in a brand new setup. This is a unique opportunity to lead the way in building innovative reporting & analytics solutions within a progressive tech environment.

SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.

**About the role:**
As a Solution Developer in Analytics & Reporting, you will be part of an innovative, agile team that embraces experimentation and continuous learning. You will contribute to making SEB a more data-driven bank by working on initiatives such as customer reporting, push notifications, and regulatory reporting.

You’ll be instrumental in establishing our test automation capabilities from the ground up, as there is currently no test automation within the team. This exciting opportunity allows for partial work as a dedicated test automation developer, pioneering robust frameworks and building test automation cases. Simultaneously, you will engage partially as a Java developer, contributing to our core applications. Your expertise will be vital in leveraging GCP to build scalable and efficient solutions. This blend of roles offers a unique chance to shape our future technology landscape.

In this role, you will partly work as a dedicated test automation developer, designing robust frameworks and building automated test cases, while also contributing as a Java developer to our core applications. Your expertise will be vital in leveraging GCP to build scalable and efficient solutions. making this a unique opportunity to influence and shape our future technology landscape.
### **To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**

* Experience with BDD (Behavior-Driven Development) methodology and Test Automation tools
* Experience working with GitHub and GitHub Actions
* A few years of experience in programming; with knowledge in Spring Boot Java, Kubernetes and Splunk
* Knowledge of distributed event streaming systems like Kafka
* Someone who likes to work according to best practices and deliver high quality software craftsmanship
* A positive team player willing to take ownership
* Positive attitude with strong motivation to continuously learn and adapt
* Excellent English skills

### **Merits:**

* Any experience in Public Cloud (GCP preferred)

### **What we offer:**

* Agile and modern ways of working, hybrid
* Work in the forefront of modern techniques
* Supportive skilled colleagues who value openness and teamwork
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* A diverse and distributed team across multiple sites


**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**



It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.



Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 17th of April.



Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.



SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment



Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.



sebgroup.com/career

title: Backend Developer
description:
About Kambi
  
Kambi Group plc is a leading B2B provider of premium sports betting services to licensed gaming operators. Our services provide an end-to-end solution for operators wanting to launch a standalone Sportsbook or bolster their existing offering with an innovative sports betting product. From front-end user interface to customer intelligence, risk management and odds compiling, all built on our in-house developed software, we strive to deliver the ultimate service and solution to our partners.
  
Our vision is to create the world’s leading sports betting experiences, together with our partners.
  
Backend Developer – Shape Games
  
**Contract type:** Full time
  
**Location:** On-site (Copenhagen Office)
  
Shape Games is looking for an experienced Backend Developer to join our team and help build the backbone of our award-winning iGaming platform. You’ll work with technologies like Kotlin, Ktor, AWS, Postgres, Redis, and Cloudfront to craft robust, scalable, and secure systems powering mobile and web apps used worldwide.
  
About the role
  
As a Backend Developer, you’ll be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining the server-side logic of our digital products. Your focus will be on building efficient APIs, ensuring performance, and collaborating closely with frontend teams and product owners to deliver high-quality user experiences.
  
Tech Stack
  
* Languages: Kotlin (or Java)
* Frameworks: Ktor
* Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis
* Infrastructure: AWS (EC2, RDS, Cloudfront, etc.)


Key responsibilities
  
Design, build, and maintain backend services using Kotlin and Ktor
  
Develop and integrate APIs for seamless communication across systems
  
Optimize performance and scalability through effective caching and service architecture
  
Contribute to system design to support modular, microservice-based infrastructure
  
Collaborate with frontend developers and DevOps to ensure end-to-end feature delivery
  
Ensure code quality through best practices, reviews, and test coverage
  
Monitor backend reliability and debug issues in production
  
Stay current with backend development trends and AWS innovations
  
  

What we’re looking for
  
5+ years of experience in backend development
  
Strong proficiency in Kotlin or Java
  
Hands-on experience with AWS infrastructure and cloud-native applications
  
Solid understanding of caching mechanisms and performance optimization (e.g., Redis, CDN)
  
Experience with microservices architecture and scalable system design
  
Familiarity with relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred)
  
Excellent communication skills and team collaboration mindset
  
Clear, structured, and timely communication
  
Adaptability to fast-changing circumstances and requirements
  
Strong collaboration and teamwork mindset
  
  

Location
  
On-site (Copenhagen office).
  
Why join Shape Games?
  
Work with cutting-edge technologies in a high-scale environment
  
Be part of a talented, diverse, and supportive engineering team
  
Flexible remote work culture
  
Competitive salary
  
Relocation package
  
Opportunity to influence the architecture and future of a fast-growing platform
  
  

Ready to shape the future of iGaming?
  
Apply now!
  
Shape Games is an equal opportunity employer and encourages all qualified candidates to apply, regardless of age, gender, religion, ethnicity, disability, or sexual orientation. We are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace in accordance with Danish and EU equality standards.
  
Kambi's ongoing commitment to Diversity and Inclusion in the workplace
  
If you require any reasonable adjustment during the recruitment process, please notify your recruiter, who will assist you however they can. Diversity and inclusion is at the heart of who we are and who we aim to be. While we are proud of the positive and inclusive company culture we have created, we know we can do so much more. Kambi constantly evolves its Diversity and Inclusion strategy to ensure it becomes an even more inclusive and positive place to work, with the core management team reaffirming its commitment to delivering on employee feedback.
  
Creating an inclusive environment
  
We believe Kambi's greatest strength is the collective talent of our employees. Kambi is committed to ensuring we create an inclusive work environment where everyone can feel valued, thrive and achieve their potential, regardless of who they are or what their background is. We know that it is only by having a balance of different voices, values and opinions that Kambi is able to be the market leader it is today.
  
#wearekambi

title: Front-end Developer

title: Experienced Embedded Firmware Developer in Stockholm
description:
**Job Title**
-------------


Experienced Embedded Firmware Developer in Stockholm**Job Description**
-------------------

*At Axis,* *we’ve* *always been about pushing the boundaries in pursuit of* *innovating for* *a smarter, safer world. We do this by developing IP-based products and innovations for security and video surveillance. We are expanding our Stockholm team and looking for an* *Experienced E**mbedded* *C* *Developer to join us!* **The team**  

At Axis, our teams work cross-functionally in projects to develop and deliver world class products! Your team is a new cross-functional team working on a new product. The team brings together firmware engineers with application developers building high-level functionality in collaboration with frontend developers and UX designers. The team consists of both junior and senior engineers working together in an open climate. We believe diverse perspectives are key to innovation. And one thing for sure; teamwork, collaboration and openness to each other’s ideas are essential to everyone at Axis.
Many of our teams have Innovation days and Free Fridays where you can freely experiment your ideas. We trust our teams to decide on the best ways of working, the tools to use, and which ideas to explore – a level of freedom that truly empowers our developers. **The role**
You play an important role in the product development by writing well designed, efficient, scalable, readable and testable code in C. You take an early part in feature investigations and pre-studies, including collaborating on prototype code and evaluating using real world testing. Together with your team, you will be involved in setting the coding standards and ways of working for your team. In our projects we collaborate with different competence areas such as mechanics, electronics, industrial design and production technologies to name a few. **Who are we looking** **for/Who are you****?**
You are curious, love challenges and to solve them in a team focused atmosphere. You get inspired by working in an environment of openness, creativity, trust, commitment, playfulness and encouragement.
We hope you enjoy modern software development, focusing on incremental releases and user needs. You actively contribute with your ideas and thoughts. You like creating your own network of peers to discuss issues and designs. You value open communication and readily connect with colleagues to get the input you need to progress, whether in Stockholm, Lund or any other Axis site. For this position, we are primarily looking for someone with at least 5 years of working experience within product development. **We’d** **love to hear that you have:*** A master’s degree in computer science or equivalent practical experience
* Solid work experience from embedded C/C++ programming in a Linux environment
* Knowledge of other programming languages such as C, C++ or Rust
* Experience working with these technologies is a plus: Wifi, Bluetooth, GPS, battery and power saving algorithms
* Perhaps worked with either of the following tools: Git, Gerrit, Jira, Python, Docker, Docker Compose, Yocto or OpenEmbedded
 **What** **Axis can** **do for you**  

At Axis Stockholm we are a newer R&D site with 45+ engineers so far. You will be part of creating and maintaining the collaborative atmosphere and can influence how we want to work in our part of Axis.
Axis is a world leader in network video, where innovative technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide.
As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.  

Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, parental leave policies, wellness benefits, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:
Life at Axis blog
Engineering at Axis blog
Innovation at Axis  

  

**Ready to Act?**  

Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications (CV and cover letter).
We're looking for the real you, cover letters written in your own words are highly valued!  

We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!  

In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Hanna Al-Maawali at +46 46 272 1800.**Type of Employment**
----------------------


Permanent Employment**Posting End Date**
--------------------


2026-04-22*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* *Notice will be provided before we take any action.***About Axis Communications**
-----------------------------


We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.

title: Embedded/Linux Developer (C/C++)
description:
**Professional Galaxy** är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.


Vi söker nu en **Embedded/Linux Developer (C/C++)** hos vår kund.

**Om uppdraget**  

I rollen kommer du att arbeta med embedded-system med fokus på C/C++ och Linux i userspace. Du blir en del av ett agilt team där samarbete, kunskapsdelning och tekniskt djup värderas högt.


Arbetet är varierat och består av både vidareutveckling av befintlig funktionalitet och nyutveckling, där du aktivt bidrar till roadmap och framtida lösningar.


Du kommer att arbeta med produktnära utveckling i Linux userspace där fokus ligger på att vidareutveckla och underhålla en befintlig kodbas i C och C++. Arbetet innefattar både felsökning och optimering av befintlig funktionalitet samt utveckling av nya features i linje med produktens roadmap. I rollen förväntas du aktivt bidra i ett agilt team, delta i tekniska diskussioner och vara med och driva lösningar framåt. Du kommer även att arbeta med integrationer och kommunikation mellan systemkomponenter, exempelvis via D-Bus, samt hantera buggar och förbättringar med fokus på stabilitet och prestanda.

**Krav**  

* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av embedded-utveckling
* Goda kunskaper i C och C++
* Erfarenhet av Linux och arbete i userspace
* Erfarenhet av D-Bus
* Vana av att arbeta i agila team
* Förmåga att arbeta brett och hantera varierande uppgifter
* Stark problemlösningsförmåga
**Meriterande**

* Erfarenhet av Open Embedded
* Erfarenhet av Jenkins
* Kunskap inom LLDP
* Erfarenhet av power management i embedded/Linux-miljö
* Erfarenhet av Rust
* Kunskap inom cyber security


Detta är ett konsultuppdrag där du blir en viktig del av ett tekniknära team med fokus på högkvalitativa embedded-lösningar.

**Övrig information**

title: LabVIEW Developer
description:
Overview:
**LabVIEW Developer**
Element is looking for a talented LabVIEW Developer to help build the next generation of test, measurement, and calibration solutions. In this role, you’ll develop LabVIEW applications, contribute to the in‑house developed Laboratory Information Management Systems (LIMS) platform, and design software and hardware solutions that support automated testing and data logging.

You’ll work across the full development cycle and collaborate closely with the central system team, production, technical support, and external partners. As part of a small and agile team, you’ll need to be flexible, self‑driven, organized, and a strong communicator. Your personal qualities will be key to your success in this role.  


Responsibilities:
* Develop our LabVIEW‑based calibration platform, including drivers and automated test functions
* Create process documentation, user guides, and training materials
* Support our Local Technical Support (LTS) teams
* Manage system administration, maintenance, and technical documentation
* Coordinate development work with external consultants
* Support rollouts in new labs and countries


Skills / Qualifications:
* Engineering degree or similar technical background
* Proven experience with LabVIEW (LabVIEW Core 3 / Certified LabVIEW developer)
* Several years of software development experience
* Knowledge of test and measurement systems
* Structured, detail‑oriented, and quality‑driven
* Flexible, collaborative, and comfortable working independently  

  

For more information about the role, please contact Patrik Persson Technical Director
  

+46 72 391 62 56


#LI-VS1
Company Overview:

Element is one of the fastest growing testing, inspection and certification businesses in the world. Globally we have more than 9,000 brilliant minds operating from 270 sites across 30 countries. Together we share an ambitious purpose to ‘Make tomorrow safer than today’.  

When failure in use is not an option, we help customers make certain that their products, materials, processes and services are safe, compliant and fit for purpose. From early R&D, through complex regulatory approvals and into production, our global laboratory network of scientists, engineers, and technologists support customers to achieve assurance over product quality, sustainable outcomes, and market access.  

While we are proud of our global reach, working at Element feels like being part of a smaller company. We empower you to take charge of your career, and reward excellence and integrity with growth and development.  

Industries across the world depend on our care, attention to detail and the absolute accuracy of our work. The role we have to play in creating a safer world is much bigger than our organization.
Diversity Statement:

At Element, we always take pride in putting our people first. We are an equal opportunity employer that recognizes diversity and inclusion as fundamental to our Vision of becoming “the world’s most trusted testing partner”.

  

All suitably qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective work related criteria and without regard for the following: age, disability, ethnic origin, gender, marital status, race, religion, responsibility of dependents, sexual orientation, or gender identity or other characteristics in accordance with the applicable governing laws or other characteristics in accordance with the applicable governing laws.

  

The contractor will not discharge or in any other manner discriminate against employees or applicants because they have inquired about, discussed, or disclosed their own pay or the pay of another employee or applicant. However, employees who have access to the compensation information of other employees or applicants as a part of their essential job functions cannot disclose the pay of other employees or applicants to individuals who do not otherwise have access to compensation information, unless the disclosure is (a) in response to a formal complaint or charge, (b) in furtherance of an investigation, proceeding, hearing, or action, including an investigation conducted by the employer, or (c) consistent with the contractor’s legal duty to furnish information. 41 CFR 60-1.35(c)

  

“If you need an accommodation filling out an application, or applying to a job, please email Recruitment@element.com”

title: C++ Developer
description:
Job Description:
**C++ Developer – Lund, Sweden**

 *Do you have experience with Access Control or Video Management systems and a passion for innovation? Join Schneider Electric and help enhance the EcoStruxure Foresight Platform with next-generation security capabilities.*

 **What drives us at Schneider Electric?**


For us, impact isn’t just a term paraded across posters or social media; it’s encoded into our culture. After all, Schneider makes companies, infrastructure, buildings, homes, data centers, and entire industries more efficient and sustainable. With us, you’ll contribute to tackling the climate crisis head-on and accelerating the energy transition the planet urgently needs.


There’s a reason why we’re consistently ranked among the most sustainable companies in the world. Here, you can pursue your dream career while actively making a long-term, positive impact on the planet.


What’s more, we help tens of millions of people in underserved communities gain access to energy and education — so you’re making the world a fairer place, too. You’ll sit among colleagues with vastly different personal and professional backgrounds, all united by a vision of a better world.

 **Welcome to your workplace**


This is a hybrid role with 3 days in office, embedded in a high-performing development team focused on secure, scalable, and high-performance server-side solutions.

 **Your Team**


You will join our global R&D team, developing backend and server-side components for Physical Access Control and Video Management Systems. The role is a core part of a strategic initiative to enhance the EcoStruxure Foresight platform.


(External) English Qualifications: **Essential for the role**

* Minimum 10 years of experience in C++ development.
* Strong understanding of object-oriented design and analysis.
* Experience writing modular, testable, and maintainable code.
* Familiarity with design and architectural patterns.
* Experience with Test Driven Development, CI/CD, and agile practices.
* Skilled in debugging, profiling, and performance optimization.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Solid understanding of algorithms and time complexity.
* Bachelor’s degree or higher in Software Engineering.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

 **Desirable for the role**

* Experience with Linux and operating systems.
* Knowledge of SQL and database systems.
* Familiarity access control hardware or experience with video management systems.
* Experience with WebRTC or RTSP Video streaming.
* Understanding of networking (TCP/IP) and open-source technologies.
* Awareness of cybersecurity principles.
* Experience with container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).

 **Why Schneider Electric?**

* Join one of the **world’s most sustainable companies**.
* Work in a **diverse and inclusive environment** that values innovation.
* Access to **continuous learning and career development**.
* Competitive salary and **benefits tailored to the Nordics**.
* Be part of a team that’s shaping the **future of secure, smart infrastructure**.

 **So, what’s next?**


Are you already imagining yourself joining our team? Good, because we can’t wait to hear from you. Apply through the link on the page.


(External) English Company Boiler Plate: **Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**


When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.


IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.


We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.


Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!


€36 billion global revenue  

+13% organic growth  

150 000+ employees in 100+ countries  

#1 on the Global 100 World’s most sustainable corporations

  

You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled. *Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*  

*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter* *here*  

  

*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Software Developer
description:
Would you like to work with innovative software products in the absolute cutting edge? Do you want an opportunity to change a whole industry with digitalization to ensure safety, effectiveness and sustainability?  

This is your chance to work on exciting projects where your skills and creativity will make a real impact. If you're ready to take on new challenges and grow with us, we'd love to meet you! **Join Us**
The Digital Solutions Division within Epiroc is an innovative, fast-growing product company with customers all around the world. You will be a part of a global team with colleagues in Örebro, Luleå, Chile, Canada and India.

  

In Luleå we are developing modern software products that combine cutting‑edge architectures, real‑time data and advanced analytics. Our platforms connect fleets, optimize operations and bring real-time positioning underground. Solutions that truly transform how mines operate.  

Within the R&D department, we continue to expand to meet the growing demand for our current and coming solutions among an increasing number of customers around the world. **Your Mission**
As a Software Developer, you will be a part of an autonomous team in which you will participate in every stage of software development, from design and brainstorming to feature implementation, testing and delivery. Your main mission is to develop cutting-edge security products for the mining industry worldwide. You will always be looking for a new, smarter way to operate between design, code and tests in a fast and agile environment close to our customers. The development work and testing sometimes take you to exciting places 1000 meters below the Earth's surface!  

We work in agile teams consisting of 3-5 people, and they all have their own responsibilities requiring different tech skills. You will be working in a team focusing on a core set of backend microservices. The team also handles the physical tracking devices, meaning there is a mix of embedded programming, android development as well as backend development involved in the team's work. You will learn from people with unique competence and skills while contributing with yours.**Your Profile**
We're looking for sharp and curious developers who thrive on solving complex problems and bringing fresh perspectives. You have a strong interest in the latest technologies and how they can create customer value, are eager to contribute to our current applications while also building innovative new services.  

What you bring:* A university degree in a relevant field.
* Experience with agile software development methods.
* Skills in software and systems such as:
* Programming languages: Java, Go
* Experience of embedded development in C
* Platforms & tools: Linux, Docker and Azure Cloud Services
* Architecture: Microservice design & cloud-native thinking

  

If you have experience in any of the following areas, it's a plus:* Additional programming languages: C#, Kotlin, Java
* Frontend frameworks: Angular, 3D visualization
* Communication protocols: GRPC and RabbitMQ
* Cloud & DevOps tools: HashiCorp Stack and Azure Cloud Services

 **Location and other**  

This position is in Luleå, Sweden. Occasional travel is required when going to site for testing. **Why Epiroc?**  

By joining our team, you’ll make a big difference in the energy transition. At Epiroc, we take pride in being passionate innovators, driving the change toward a brighter future for both people and the planet. Guided by our values of Collaboration, Commitment, and Innovation, we foster a culture of trust, growth, and lasting impact.  

To support your journey, we offer a competitive Total Rewards Package, including:* Global career opportunities
* Learning & Development programs
* Benefits package, including variable compensation (bonus)
* Flexible work culture promoting balance and well-being
* Global Parental Leave Policy
* Community involvement

 **Application and contact information**  

We encourage you to submit your application through our online career site as soon as possible, but no later than **April 14th, 2026.** Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis, and the position may be filled before last application date.  

We are committed to a thorough recruitment process, including interviews, reference checks and assessments. To ensure a safe working environment, we conduct identity checks and drug and alcohol screening. Our process is designed to be fair and inclusive; you can expect transparent communication and a balanced evaluation of your skills and experience.  

For questions about the position, please contact:  

Hiring Manager, Anders Nordin, anders.nordin@epiroc.com
Recruitment Specialist, Zuzana Kalivodova, zuzana.kalivodova@epiroc.com **It all starts with people.** The world needs metals and minerals for the energy transition and our cities and infrastructure must be developed to serve a growing population. To succeed, we need to speed up the shift towards more sustainable mining and construction industries. We at Epiroc accelerate this transformation, together with customers and business partners in more than 150 countries, by developing and providing innovative and safe equipment, digital solutions, and aftermarket support. All new thinkers are welcome. We are looking for those who want to develop, grow, and dare to think new. In Epiroc we attract, develop, and retain diverse talent valuing authenticity and unique perspectives, driving our spirit of innovation. We foster an inclusive culture where diversity isn't just a goal but a part of our values and way of working. This is how we do business for a sustainable future. Learn more at www.epiroc.com

title: Systemutvecklare nivå 4 - (Designsystem & Web Components)
description:
**Professional Galaxy** är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.


Vi söker nu en **Systemutvecklare nivå 4 - (Designsystem & Web Components)** hos vår kund.  

Vi söker en erfaren Systemutvecklare för ett konsultuppdrag med fokus på vidareutveckling och förvaltning av myndighetens designsystem. Uppdraget är en viktig del i klient:s arbete med att skapa tillgängliga, moderna och hållbara digitala tjänster.

**Om uppdraget**  

Uppdraget innebär att förvalta och vidareutveckla klient designsystem med fokus på tillgänglighet, kvalitet och skalbarhet. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med verksamheten där du bidrar till att etablera effektiva arbetssätt för utveckling och behovsinsamling.

**Du kommer att:**


Utveckla plattformsoberoende komponenter som webcomponents  

Säkerställa att komponenter uppfyller DOS-lagen och WCAG 2.1 AA  

Dokumentera komponentbibliotek i Storybook och distribuera via npm  

Arbeta med moderna frontend-ramverk och CMS-lösningar  

Delta i workshops, kravinsamling och presentationer  

Bidra till kunskapsöverföring vid uppdragets avslut  

  

**SKA-krav**


Systemutvecklare nivå 4 (8–12 års erfarenhet)  

* Konsulten ska ha minst två års dokumenterad erfarenhet av att utveckla och förvalta designsystem med komponentbibliotek av webcomponents på en offentlig myndighet enligt lagen om tillgänglighet till digital offentlig service som uppfyller WCAG 2.1 AA.
* Konsulten ska ha minst fem års erfarenhet som front-endutvecklare med Vue.js, Angular och Typescript samt SCSS, CSS och HTML.
* Konsulten ska ha minst två års erfarenhet som utvecklare i .Net, C#, Javascript, vue.js med Optimizely/EPiServer CMS i projekt med höga krav på digital tillgänglighet enligt WCAG 2.1 AA.
* Konsulten ska ha minst fem års erfarenhet av att ha arbetat med interaktionsnära UX och UI-design av tjänster för webb.
* Konsulten ska ha minst två års dokumenterad erfarenhet av att utveckla webcomponents i Stencil och dokumentera komponenterna i Storybook.
* Konsulten ska ha genomgått utbildning i Scaled Agile Framework (SAFE)
* Konsulten ska ha minst två års dokumenterad erfarenhet av konfigurering och utveckling med mono-repo i Nx.
* Konsulten ska ha erfarenhet av att hålla presentationer, leda workshops och samla in krav.
* Konsulten ska ha minst fem års erfarenhet av CI / CD pipelines i Azure devops.
* Konsulten ska kunna flytande svenska i tal och skrift.
* Konsultens CV ska vara på svenska och inlämnas i Word-format.

Konsulten ska ha egen giltig Visual Studio-licens och kunna tillhandahålla licensnyckel vid behov.

**Övrig information**  

Placeringsort: Borlänge  

Arbetsmodell: Hybrid, distansarbete upp till 40%  

Uppdragsperiod: 2026-06-01 - 2027-05-31, Förlängning 6 + 6 månader till och med 2028-05-31


Resor: Förekommer vid behov  

Uppdragsform: Konsultuppdrag eller hyrköp

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 2026-04-06


Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.


Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande


Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. title: SW Developer / Scrum Master
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Job Description**  

* Investigate problems and trouble reports
* Read project definitions and analyze impact
* Perform hands-on testing in vehicle
* Analyze log files
* Participate in systemizations
* Drive investigations and contribute to technical documentation (e.g. SSER)
* Act as Function Owner with responsibility for follow-up and coordination

**Scrum Master responsibilities (~20%):**

* Lead Scrum ceremonies (Daily steering, Sprint planning, Retrospectives)
* Drive team follow-ups, progress tracking, and structure

  

**Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**  

* 3–5 years of experience in embedded systems development (requirements, testing, or implementation)
* Experience working with C++ and/or Simulink
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering (Electrical, Computer, Mechanical or similar)
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Professional English

 **Meritorious**  

* Experience within automotive
* Scrum Master experience
* C/CE or D/DE driver’s license

  

**Application deadline:** 27-03-2026 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Embedded Systems Developer & Scrum Support
description:
Nu letar vi efter en Developer Embedded Systems & Scrum Support till ESSIQ Stockholm! ESSIQ är arbetsgivaren som anstränger sig lite extra för att du ska må bra. Vad är medarbetarfokus för dig? På ESSIQ handlar det om att sätta medarbetaren i centrum. Genom ett lyhört ledarskap och en öppen företagskultur vill vi ge varje medarbetare möjligheten att forma sin karriär och sin vardag.

  

Till den här rollen söker vi dig som har erfarenhet av relevanta uppgifter och som är redo för nya utmaningar. Ser du fördelarna med att få variation och erfarenhet från olika kunder och branscher men att utvecklas med en och samma arbetsgivare? Som medarbetare på ESSIQ får du det bästa av två världar.

**ROLLBESKRIVNING**
  

Vi söker en engagerad och självgående utvecklare inom embedded systems som även kan ta ansvar för delar av Scrum Master-rollen (ca 20 %). Rollen kombinerar tekniskt arbete med teamstöd, problemlösning och koordinering. Du kommer att arbeta nära produkten, analysera problem och bidra till en djupare systemförståelse.


I rollen ingår att utreda problem och felrapporter samt analysera projektdefinitioner och deras påverkan på systemet. Du utför praktiska tester i fordon, analyserar loggfiler och deltar aktivt i systematisering och dokumentation, exempelvis SSER. Som Function Owner ansvarar du för att följa upp och koordinera teamets arbete, säkerställa struktur och framdrift i projekten.


Vi förväntar oss att du har ett användarcentrerat, lösningsorienterat arbetssätt och att du är öppen, nytänkande och professionell. En anställning hos oss innebär både trygghet och frihet, där vi stöttar dig så mycket som du vill och behöver. För oss är det viktigt att du får vara delaktig i att forma din karriärväg och att du är med och påverkar ESSIQ som företag och arbetsplats.

**KVALIFIKATIONER**
  

Vi letar inte efter anställda, vi letar efter medarbetare – efter ESSIQ:are! Nedanstående är de grundläggande kvalifikationerna för tjänsten, men vi kommer även lägga stor vikt vid din personlighet.

**Grundläggande kvalifikationer**

* Civil- eller högskoleingenjör.
* 3–5 års erfarenhet av embedded systems-utveckling (krav, test eller implementation)
* Erfarenhet av C++ och/eller Simulink.
* Analytisk, problemlösningsorienterad.
* Behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Erfarenhet av fordons- eller automotive embedded systems är en fördel men inget krav.

**Personlighet och engagemang**

* Du är **ansvarstagande** – kommer i mål, i medvind likväl som i motvind.
* Du är **social och kommunikativ** – öppen och tydlig gentemot dina kollegor, och är en produktiv problemlösare. Du är bra på att föra samtal om dig, arbetsteamet och leveransen inför en eller flera åhörare.
* Du är **lyhörd och hjälpsam** – tar in kunskap från omvärld och kollegor, och delar gärna med dig av din egen. Du är generös med tips, hjälp och stöd.

**OM TJÄNSTEN**

* Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning på heltid. 6 månaders provanställning tillämpas.
* Tillträde: Omgående
* Lön och förmåner: Konkurrenskraftig fast eller rörlig lön. Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter och generösa förmåner. Tjänstepension, omfattande försäkringar.
* Placering: ESSIQ Stockholm

**OM ESSIQ**  

ESSIQ är teknikkonsultföretaget där allt börjar med dig. Med fokus på individen, flexibla lösningar och en modern lönepolicy attraherar vi de skarpaste, mest professionella och engagerade personerna i branschen. Med denna vision grundades ESSIQ år 2005, sedan dess har vi utvecklats till ett framgångsrikt företag med kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö. Vi består idag av över 250 medarbetare med olika bakgrund, personlighet och nationalitet, med en god fördelning av kvinnor och män.


Vi har över 80 aktiva kunder i spännande branscher – allt från de stora aktörerna till de små innovationsföretagen. ESSIQ:s medarbetare arbetar med användarcentrerad tjänste- och produktutveckling inom följande tjänsteområden: UX & Service Design, Connected & Embedded Systems, IT & Cloud Services, Green Technology & Electromobility, Test & Quality Engineering, Agile Management, Mechanical Engineering samt Simulation & Visualization. Kompetensen levererar vi på plats hos uppdragsgivaren, inhouse och i satellit. Våra medarbetares intressen och ambitioner leder vägen – vårt mål är att göra den perfekta matchningen av individ och uppdrag.


ESSIQ är ett familjärt och socialt företag med visionen att vara Sveriges bästa arbetsgivare för alla medarbetare, oavsett roll i organisationen. Vi lägger stor vikt vid gemenskap och har ett uppskattat utbud av professionella och sociala aktiviteter. Vår kommunikationsplattform genomsyras av öppenhet, och främjar nätverkande och kompetensutbyte såväl som fritidsaktiviteter och relationsbyggande.

**ANSÖKAN**  

**Urval sker löpande.**

**KONTAKT**  

Frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta: Malin Meyer, malin.meyer@essiq.se
  

Vill du veta mer om ESSIQ?  

Besök http://essiq.se och följ oss på våra sociala medier!

title: LIA Fullstack Developer
description:
Hello! Jag heter Maria och jobbar som utvecklare på Wndy. Nu är det dags för oss att sätta ihop höstens intern team och vi letar efter ett par riktigt nyfikna LIA-studenter som vill vara med och bygga produkt tillsammans med oss.


Vi är ett tight team som delar en och samma drivkraft: hur kan vi göra Wndy bättre. Hur kan vi lyfta användarupplevelsen? Vad ska vi bygga härnäst och varför? Hos oss är utvecklare med i hela processen, från idé och planering till design, implementation och deploy. Som praktikant kliver du rakt in i teamet och jobbar med riktiga tickets som i slutet av dagen ska nå produktion. Du är alltså inte här för att sitta bredvid och titta på, utan för att vara med och bygga.


Vi gillar att testa nya sätt att jobba och just nu utvecklar vi AI-drivet. Vår stack är kort och gott React, TypeScript och Node.js. I vardagen använder vi verktyg som Cursor, Claude, GPT, Lovable och Figma Make osv. Det är viktigt för oss att du är bekant med vår stack och har mött den i dina studier eller egna projekt. Du behöver inte vara expert, men vi söker studenter som är bekväma med både frontend och backend och vill fortsätta utvecklas inom vår stack.


Vi söker LIA-studenter till HT 2026. Start är flexibel.


Vi tror att du:

* studerar en utbildning där React, TypeScript och Node.js ingår i kursplanen – eller att du på annat sätt har jobbat med dessa tekniker på studentnivå
* är bekant med både frontend och backend och vill utvecklas vidare som fullstack-utvecklare
* gillar att jobba AI-drivet med verktyg som Cursor, GPT, Claude eller liknande
* vill vara med och bygga features från idé till produktion


Vi jobbar hybrid men ses minst en gång i veckan på vårt kontor i Gamla stan i Stockholm. Vi ser också gärna att man gör båda sina praktikperioder hos oss, eftersom vi tror att det blir mest givande både för dig och för oss.


Känner du peppen och är taggad på att bli vår nästa intern?


Skicka CV + en länk till ditt senaste projekt (gärna co-written med valfri AI).


Ses snart!!


/Maria

title: Frontendutvecklare
description:
Hos oss får du arbeta i ett tight team där du kombinerar teknik och konsultmässighet. Du är med hela vägen från dialog och behovsanalys till implementation och vidareutveckling och bidrar aktivt i samtal där du rådgör kring lösningar och prioriteringar som skapar verkligt värde för våra kunder.


Rollen innebär att du arbetar både i teamleveranser och i expertuppdrag hos kund, där din förmåga att växla mellan hands-on utveckling och strategisk rådgivning är central.
  

  

**Om rollen**


Vi söker en frontendutvecklare med några års erfarenhet som kombinerar teknisk spets med stark konsultmässighet. Du är trygg i din kompetens och drivs av att skapa användarvärde genom smarta, hållbara och tillgängliga lösningar. I rollen ansvarar du för att utveckla moderna frontendlösningar och bidrar samtidigt aktivt i dialog kring lösningar, prioriteringar och tekniska vägval tillsammans med kund och team.

**Du kommer även att:**

* Utveckla moderna frontendlösningar med fokus på användarupplevelse, prestanda och skalbarhet.
* Ta en ledande roll där du navigerar tekniska utmaningar och skapar förtroende hos kund.
* Samarbeta tätt med designers, UX:are, backendutvecklare och projektledare i teamleveranser.
* Översätta verksamhetsbehov till intuitiva och tillgängliga gränssnitt.
* Säkerställa kvalitet, struktur och långsiktig hållbarhet i leveranser.
* Bidra i tidiga kunddialoger och forma lösningsförslag.
* Mentorstötta kollegor och bidra till kunskapsdelning i teamet.

**Din profil**


Tekniken är ditt verktyg, men din styrka ligger i att se helheten och skapa värde i varje del av leveransen.

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av frontendutveckling i komplexa projekt.
* Erfaren inom moderna ramverk som React, Next.js eller Angular.
* Starka kunskaper i JavaScript och TypeScript samt best practices kring struktur och underhåll.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga tillgängliga lösningar enligt WCAG.
* Van att arbeta agilt och nära både team och kund.
* Trygg i konsultrollen och i dialog med olika typer av intressenter.
* Erfarenhet av Git och ett DevOps-orienterat arbetssätt.

**Meriterande**

* Docker.
* Erfarenhet av Azure eller andra molntjänster.
* CMS- och e-handelsplattformar som Optimizely, Litium, Umbraco eller inRiver PIM.
* Testdriven utveckling (TDD) och verktyg som Jest eller Cypress.
* Byggverktyg som Vite, Webpack eller liknande.

**Varför Knowit Experience?**


Hos oss är medarbetaren i centrum. Du blir en del av en inkluderande och kreativ miljö där din utveckling står i fokus.

**Vad vi erbjuder:**

* Tillgång till ett inspirerande nätverk med närmare 350 kollegor inom Experience.
* En trygg anställning med kollektivavtal, generösa och proaktiva hälso- och friskvårdsupplägg samt pensions- och försäkringsförmåner.
* En miljö som främjar och värdesätter initiativ och kompetensutveckling.
* En arbetsplats som värdesätter balans mellan arbete och fritid samt aktivt arbetar med jämställdhet, miljö och hållbarhet.
* Vi tror på samarbete, öppenhet och ständig förbättring och hos oss har du möjlighet att påverka både din egen och vår gemensamma utveckling.

**Ansökan**


Låter detta som du? Då vill vi gärna höra från dig! Har du frågor om rollen eller om oss på Knowit? Tveka inte att kontakta Sandra Skilberg.


Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!

title: iOS Developer
description:
#### **Why choose Coody**


At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

**Maximized Compensation.** Typically a +40% salary increase.

**Freedom & Flexibility**. No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.

**Employment Security.** High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.

**Shape the Future.** Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.

 *As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*

#### **What you’ll be doing**


As a **Senior iOS Engineer** at Coody, you’ll own features end-to-end, from discovery and architecture through implementation, release, and telemetry. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your core focus is iOS, you’ll occasionally work across the stack: shaping APIs with backend teams, integrating SDKs, and improving CI/CD and automation processes. You’ll drive code quality, performance profiling, accessibility, and security best practices, and you’ll play a key role in teams of varying sizes to deliver reliable, user-loving products.

#### **Who you are**


We are seeking a **Senior iOS Engineer with at least 5+ years of experience**. You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:

* 5+ years building production iOS apps, including handling complex edge cases.
* Solid skills in the Swift ecosystem (e.g. SwiftUI, UIKit, Core Data).
* Experience, or a drive, to build machine-learning features in apps (Core ML/ML Kit).
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* **Based in Sweden**: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).

#### **This is Coody**


We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting,combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.


At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.


Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.


We’re a **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals**, representing more than **14 nationalities**.

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy**. Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice, **explore our Employee Handbook** and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.

#### **How to apply**


Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: Senior Software Developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**  

* Proven experience (10+ years) in software development.
* Strong proficiency in programming languages such as C.
* Experience with real-time operating systems (RTOS) and embedded systems is a plus.
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to work independently and contribute effectively with minimal guidance.
* Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
* Willingness to learn and adapt to new domains and standards.

  

**Application deadline:** 07-04-2026 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Embedded Developer
description:
**Embedded Developer – Consulting assignment**


We at WeQuel are looking for an experienced Embedded Developer for a consulting assignment in Malmö. The role involves developing software solutions for both internal and external applications, where you will work with a strong technical focus in a dynamic environment.


As a consultant with us, you will have the opportunity to work with one of our clients, who are leading companies in the pharmaceutical, automotive, and manufacturing industries, where you will contribute to optimizing processes, implementing new technology, and creating sustainable solutions.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Maintain and develop BLE modules utilized by other developers.
* Work with the latest technology in radio communications.
* Deliver software solutions on a global scale.
* Create firmware designs that optimize performance and power consumption.
* Debug real-time systems with limited visibility using development boards and lab equipment.
* Develop and manage intricate build, test, and validation infrastructures.
* Provide comprehensive documentation and utilize development tools effectively.

**What We’re Looking For**

* Expert proficiency in C, and strong experience in C++ or other system-level languages for embedded systems (RTOS and/or bare-metal).
* Good understanding of BT/Thread and BLE/GATT protocols, including stack implementation.
* Experience with delivering software for ultra-low power devices.
* Strong knowledge of memory management techniques and performance optimization in embedded systems.
* Full-stack mindset.
* Experience debugging wireless sniffers and protocol analyzers.

**Meritorious**

* Experience with Swift or Objective-C.
* Knowledge of cryptography and security in an embedded context.
* Familiarity with build management and scripting: Make/CMake/Python.

**We offer**


At WeQuel, you will become part of a consulting team that values *people first* – we believe that success is created through commitment, collaboration, and development. We offer a flat organization with short decision-making paths, a strong sense of community, and the opportunity to influence your own development.

title: R&D Engineer - Embedded Software developer
description:
**Description**  



  

**The opportunity**


Join Hitachi Energy and be part of a team that’s advancing a sustainable energy future for all. You’ll work on impactful projects that power homes, schools, hospitals, and factories, while collaborating with a diverse group of talented engineers. Our innovative High Voltage Direct Current (HVDC) technology, including the MACH™ system, revolutionizes electricity transmission over long distances. As a member of our R&D team, you’ll contribute to the development of next-generation systems and maintain existing ones, all within a supportive and collaborative environment. Bring your passion and energy to a global team that values diversity and innovation.

**How you’ll make an impact**

* Engage in the development and maintenance of wide range of embedded systems (ARM, DSP, SoC...), from pre-study and design to tests and integration.
* Develop high-quality software modules within specified timelines and efficiently maintain them, including implementing enhancements and bug fixes.
* Create specifications and documentation for software components to ensure clarity and consistency.
* Maintain high code quality through code reviews, test automation, and adherence to up-to-date software development processes.
* Work closely with internal and external customers in agile, cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions.
* Uphold Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity by taking responsibility for your actions and showing care for your colleagues and the business.

**Your background**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Embedded Systems, Computer Science, Electronics, or Electrical Engineering.
* Solid experience in embedded software development using C/C++ and C#, with expertise in real-time/control applications and RTOS.
* Understanding of transmission systems, AC/DC conversion, and distributed digital control.
* Understanding of SW-SW and SW-HW Integration, as the systems involve software, hardware and FPGA components.
* Experience in debugging and root cause analysis.
* Proficient in Business English.

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working time
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

**More about us**


Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today.


Recruiting Manager Somayeh Sarikhani, sonia.sarikhani@hitachienergy.com will be happy to answer your questions regarding this position.


Union representatives - Sveriges Ingenjörer; Mikael Hjort, +46 107-38 25 73; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, +46 107-38 70 43; Unionen: Fredrik Holmgren, +46 107-38 21 85. All other questions can be directed to Lead Recruiter, Agata Koper, agata.koper@hitachienergy.com.

**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**
