title: Junior SQL- och BI-utvecklare
description:
Är du precis klar med dina studier är redo för dina första utmaningar i arbetslivet? Nyfiken på hur digitaliseringen på bästa sätt stödjer arbetsprocesser i ett fastighetsbolag? Vill du vara del av ett controllerteam där du kommer i kontakt med Vasakronans alla olika delar. Motiveras du av att ständigt förbättra din och andras vardag? Då är du kanske den vi söker!

**Om tjänsten**  

Vasakronans controllerteam befinner sig i en brytpunkt där traditionella arbetssätt löper på parallellt med digitala förflyttningar och processförbättringar. Nu behöver teamet förstärkas med en junior SQL- och BI-utvecklare för en projektanställning på två år som kan hjälpa controllerteamet att skapa enklare och mer effektiva arbetsmetoder.


I den här rollen får du kombinera praktiskt arbete med databaser och SQL med att visualisera resultat i BI-verktyg. Du jobbar inom controlling med verksamhetsnära utmaningar samtidigt som du arbetar mycket nära bolagets IT funktion som sätter strategier och ramverk för informationsflödet. Här finns stora möjligheter att växa – både genom att lära dig nya tekniker och genom att delta i projekt som direkt påverkar hur Vasakronan arbetar med data framöver.

**Är det här du?**  

För att trivas och lyckas i rollen uppskattar du ett arbetssätt som präglas av engagemang och nyfikenhet. Vi tror vidare att det är viktigt att du trivs med att jobba agilt samt att själv vara med och forma dina mål och arbetsuppgifter utifrån övergripande målbilder. Du tar gärna egna initiativ och föreslår idéer, driver komplexa frågor och får saker gjorda. Vidare tar du dig an uppgifter med vilja att förstå helheten och har intresse för datamodellering, analyser och erfarenheter från SQL och relationsdatabaser och ett genuint intresse för BI-verktyg. Med dina erfarenheter och idéer bidrar du tillsammans med kollegor inom både controlling och IT till att identifiera framtidens utvecklingsområden.


Vi ser att är du en kommunikativ och positiv lagspelare som gärna delar med dig av dina insikter och samtidigt är lyhörd för andras perspektiv. Du är prestigelös och trivs i en företagskultur där man hjälps åt och arbetar tillsammans för teamets bästa. Du har en akademisk examen data- och systemvetenskap, industriell ekonomi eller annan utbildning med fokus på data och analys.

**Utveckla och utvecklas med oss**  

Du utgår från Vasakronans huvudkontor i Sergelhusen. Här får du en riktigt grym arbetsplats med alla förutsättningar för ett modernt digitalt och varierat arbetssätt som dessutom är byggt för att du ska må så bra som möjligt.


Självklart kommer vi göra allt för att du ska lyckas och här på Vasakronan finns alla möjligheter att driva din egen utveckling. Via olika utbildningar men framförallt genom att delta i eller driva spännande projekt tillsammans med otroligt kompetenta kollegor som gärna delar med sig av sina kunskaper. Här är det du som sätter gränser för din utveckling!

**Välkommen till Vasakronan**  

Sista ansökningsdag är den 17 april men vi arbetar med löpande urval så skicka in din ansökan redan idag.


Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Åsa Lindfors, chef controlling asa.lindfors@vasakronan.se

**Mer om oss**  

Vasakronan är ett av Sveriges största och ett av världens mest hållbara fastighetsbolag med ett fastighetsbestånd om cirka 180 miljarder kronor. Vi skapar värde genom att äga, utveckla och förvalta 2,4 miljoner kvadratmeter fördelat på 166 kontors- och butiksfastigheter i de bästa lägena och områdena i Sveriges fyra största städer – Stockholm, Uppsala, Göteborg och Malmö. Vi är drygt 300 kollegor som tillsammans strävar efter att nå vår vision ”Den goda staden där alla människor trivs och verksamheter utvecklas”.

title: Backend-utvecklare till Insera
description:
Vill du arbeta i en organisation med högt i tak och där dina idéer verkligen gör skillnad? Gillar du att arbeta med stora datamängder och skapa robusta backend-lösningar? Då kan rollen som Backend-utvecklare på Insera vara helt rätt för dig!

**Om rollen**


Som backend-utvecklare på Insera kommer du att vara en del av ett engagerat och kompetent utvecklingsteam som tillsammans bygger och vidareutvecklar Inseras BI-system – Insight. Systemet används av både privata och offentliga verksamheter för analys, budget, prognos och rapportering, och hanterar stora mängder data från olika system.

**Som backend-utvecklare kommer du arbeta med:**

* Utveckling av backend-lösningar i C# och .NET för att hantera stora datamängder och säkerställa en stabil och effektiv prestanda.
* Byggande av REST API:er och integrationer för att säkerställa smidiga dataflöden mellan system.
* Modernisering av befintlig arkitektur, där vi stegvis lyfter tekniken och förbättrar skalbarheten.
* VB-kod eller VB.Net för konvertering till C# och .NET.
* SQL kunskap för att bland annat hantera säkerhetsluckor mm.
* OWASP Top 10 och manuella testverktyg.


I ditt arbete jobbar du nära frontend-utvecklare, SQL-experter och verksamhetskonsultersamt har kontakt med kunder för att förstå deras behov. Du ingår i ett team som arbetar agilt med dagliga stand-ups och kommer till en kultur som uppmuntrar egna idéer, teknisk innovation och kunskapsdelning. Du får stor frihet att påverka både teknikval och utvecklingsprocesser, samtidigt som du har stöd från ett erfaret team.

**Vem är du?**

* För att trivas och lyckas i rollen tror vi att du:
* Har flera års erfarenhet av backend-utveckling, gärna från olika branscher och
* tekniska miljöer.
* Är trygg i C# och .Net samt har erfarenhet av REST API:er och strömmande data.
* Har grundläggande kunskaper i SQL och kan hantera stored procedures.
* Är van att jobba i team och har en prestigelös inställning där du gärna delar med dig
* av din kunskap.
* Tar initiativ och har en nyfiken inställning till att förbättra både kod och processer.

**Det är ett extra plus om du har erfarenhet av:**

* Fullstack-utveckling eller grundläggande frontend-kunskaper (t.ex. JavaScript, CSS mm).
* System inom industri, offentlig sektor eller analysdrivna verksamheter.
* AI och maskininlärning, då det är ett område vi vill satsa mer på framöver.

**Du erbjuds**


En spännande roll med stor frihet och möjlighet att påverka produktutvecklingen. En kultur där vi värdesätter öppenhet, samarbete och medbestämmande. Möjlighet att utvecklas inom SQL, AI och modern backend-teknik genom kurser och interna program. En stabil och växande organisation där du får vara med på en långsiktig resa.

**Om bolaget**


Insera AB är en del av View Group med ca 1400 anställda i Sverige, Norge Finland, UK och Indien med en total omsättning av närmare 1,5 miljarder SEK. Insera har sedan 1995 levererat lösningar för besluts- och ledningsstöd genom att erbjuda ett komplett BI-system med stöd för analys, rapportering, budget, prognos, planering och visualisering. Insera är specialister inom effektivisering av arbetsprocesser och skapar på så sätt mervärde för stora som små kunder. Du hittar Inseras kunder inom både den privata och offentliga sektorn. Från kontoren i Norrköping och Västerås arbetar idag ett väletablerat team av olika specialister inom BI och verksamhetsutveckling. Här tar du del av en organisation med högt i tak och en arbetskultur som präglas av en prestigelös och hjälpsam attityd.

**Övrigt**


Start: Snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.


Placering: Arbetet utförs från kontoret i Norrköping, med viss möjlighet till remote-arbete ca 2 dagar/vecka.


Upplägg: Anställning direkt hos Insera. Rekryteringsprocessen hanteras av VIEW Group. Du är varmt välkommen att kontakta emelie.jakobsson@viewgroup.se vid frågor kring tjänsten eller processen

title: .Net utvecklare
description:
Är du vår nästa utvecklare till vårt Custom Development team? Vi behöver stärka vår leveranskapacitet och möta den ökande efterfrågan. I rollen kommer du att arbeta med att utveckla system och programkod som ofta är del av större lösningar hos våra kunder. Du deltar i hela utvecklingsprocessen – från programmering och dokumentation till testning, inklusive automatiska tester. Du hanterar även felsökning av kundärenden, ofta i direkt kontakt med kund, och ser till att dokumentationen är korrekt och uppdaterad.


Som en del av teamet medverkar du i projekt- och teknikmöten, granskar och godkänner pull requests samt arbetar aktivt i Azure DevOps. I vissa fall stöttar du även arkitekter och säljare i kunddialoger. Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i en dynamisk miljö där teknik och samarbete står i fokus.


Som person delar du med dig av din kunskap, är ödmjuk, lätt att samarbeta med. Du tar egna initiativ och är en självgående, utåtriktad och affärsmässig lagspelare som vill arbeta med människor och teknik. Vi förutsätter att du behärskar svenska och engelska bra i såväl tal som skrift.


Hos oss hittar du en arbetsgivare som värdesätter och uppmuntrar unika perspektiv och idéer. Oavsett vem du är eller varifrån du kommer, om du delar vår passion för teknik och kundrelationer, vill vi höra från dig.

**Vi ser gärna att du har några års erfarenhet inom:**

* DevOps, skapa och hantera CI/CD-pipelines
* Utveckla applikationer med C#
* ORM-verktyget Entity Framework
* Skriva och optimera LINQ-frågor
* SQL-databaser och skriva T-SQL-frågor
* Integrera och konsumera Web API:er
* Visual Studio, VS Code, SSMS: Förmåga att använda utvecklingsverktyg som Visual Studio, VS Code och SQL Server Management Studio.
* Utveckling av lösningar i Azure så som Azure Functions
* Utveckla och underhålla webbaserade applikationer som ASP.NET MVC, CSS, HTML, JavaScript


Om du dessutom har en eller flera av nedan erfarenheter är det välkommet. Om så inte är fallet har du all möjlighet att utveckla dessa kompetenser hos oss:

* Azure AI Foundry
* .Net Blazor
* MS certifieringar ( exempelvis AZ-204, AZ-400)
* Utveckling med hjälp av AI agenter

**Creating the Difference - today, tomorrow, together**

title: Full Stack Developer
description:

 Requirements

* Agile and iterative development approach

* Interest in contributing to an inclusive and sustainable digital environment


 Benefits
   

  

* A challenging, innovating environment.
* Opportunities for learning where needed.

title: Full Stack Developer/ Backend dev(Java/Python/.net) with Javascript exp- Stockholm- Full time
description:
Hiring: Senior Backend / Full-Stack Developer(Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript)
 



 Location: Stockholm, Sweden (On-site)
 



 Job Type: Full-time
 



 Experience- 4 to 10 Years
 



  





  





 We are looking for an experienced Senior Backend / Full-Stack Developer for our Sweden-based client. In this role, you will lead architecture decisions, take technical ownership of projects, and work closely with clients to build scalable, business-critical applications while supporting junior developers
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 Develop scalable backend solutions using Node.js
 



 Build modern applications using Next.js / React
 



 Lead architecture decisions and technical direction
 



 Set up and manage CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure
 



 Work closely with clients as a technical advisor
 



 Improve development processes and mentor junior developers
 



  





 Requirements
 



 4+ years of backend development experience
 



 Strong expertise in Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript
 



 Experience with Next.js, React, or similar frameworks
 



 Cloud experience with AWS, GCP, or Azure
 



 Knowledge of Docker, DevOps, and CI/CD pipelines
 



 Strong technical communication skills
 



 Experience using AI development tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, etc.)
 



 Fluent in Swedish and English
 



 Willing to work on-site in Stockholm
 



  





 Nice to Have: Experience with Kotlin/JVM, Kubernetes or Terraform, and exposure to payment or security-critical systems, mobile development (Android/iOS), or industrial/B2B sectors.
 



  





 What We Offer: A senior role with strong influence on architecture and technology, opportunity to work on impactful projects with leading companies, and a collaborative team focused on innovation and AI-assisted development.
 



  





 📩 Interested or know someone who fits?
 



 Share your resume at niharika.sahu@seventh-contact.com

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 At Tink, we deliver open banking solutions as a part of Visa. We’re creating the foundations that a new world of finance will be built on. By constantly challenging ourselves to go further and do better, we’re developing the ground-breaking services that businesses will use, to revolutionize the way millions of people manage their money. The world of financial services is changing fast, and we will continue to be at the forefront of it.
   

  

 Tink is building an open banking platform that enables banks, fintechs and startups to develop data-driven financial services. Through one API, Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe. Our solutions are ready-to-go products, each developed to solve specific problems and bring value to both businesses and their customers.
   

  

 We are looking for talented, curious, and energetic Fullstack Software Engineers who embrace solving complex challenges on a global scale.  As a Visa Software Engineer, you will be an integral part of a cross-functional development team inventing, designing, building, and testing software products that reach a truly global customer base. While building components of cutting-edge payment technology, you will get to see your efforts shaping the digital future of monetary transactions.
   

  

 The Work itself:
   

  

* Design code and systems that touch 40% of the world population while influencing Visa’s internal standards for scalability, security, and reusability
* Collaborate cross-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions for multiple Visa technical offerings
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, value added service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads
* Develop robust and scalable products intended for a myriad of customers including end-user merchants, b2b, and business to government solutions
* Leverage innovative technologies to build the next generation of Payment Services, Transaction Platforms, Real-Time Payments
* Opportunities to make a difference on a global or local scale through mentorship and continued learning opportunities


 Essential Functions:
   

  

* Works under close guidance to implement basic enhancements and modifications to existing software that complies with design specifications and meets security best practices.
* Learns about automations that improve effectiveness and efficiency of systems and tools.
* Engages with team members to receive feedback on code.
* Follows instructions from manager to implement improvements to code, processes, and designs with and understands customer/business objectives.
* Leverage Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies to optimize code performance, enhance system automation, and deliver smarter solutions that meet evolving business and user needs.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications:
   

  

* Bachelors degree OR relevant work experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Technical Expertise: Experience developing front-end code (e.g., Angular, React) and APIs for software applications (e.g. Node.js, Golang). Knowledge of database software for maintaining and manipulating data. Understanding of systems integration processes and data structures for efficient operations.
* Growth & Innovation Mindset: Curiosity and passion for technology, comfort in challenging traditional solutions, and a drive to learn modern tools like Kubernetes, and Docker.
* Problem-Solving: Ability to approach problems logically and creatively, asking questions and seeking solutions.
* Collaboration: Willingness to work in a team, share ideas, and learn from peers and mentors.
* Adaptability: Openness to feedback, learning new technologies, and adapting to changing priorities.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Senior Java Developer (Azure)
description:

* Java Spring Boot microservices with a clear hexagonal architecture
* Event-driven design
* Azure services such as Event Hub, Storage, and Cosmos DB

* DevSecOps via Azure Pipelines
* Security tooling: Sonar, SCA, SAST, DAST
* Containerized with Docker and deployed on Azure Red Hat OpenShift
* Monitoring using Splunk







 Required skills (1 = low, 2 medium, 3 high level of skill)
 







 Microservice design, 2
 



 Java Spring boot, 3
 



 Liquibase, 1
 



 Azure Devops CI/CD pipeline, 3
 



 NoSQL like Mongo db or cosmos db, 2
 



 Azure cloud competence, 1
 



 Websphere MQ, 1
 



 Container service like openshift, 2
 



 Docker, 1
 



 Terraform, 1
 



 Kafka or similar streaming solution, 1

title: Software Engineer - Python - Cloud - graduate level
description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.
   

  

 We are hiring a Software Engineer to develop, test and release improvements to the Ubuntu on public clouds.
   

  

 The quality and stability of the Ubuntu is critically important, since it's available on every public cloud. You'll work with teams across Canonical working on Ubuntu team, alongside major cloud partners to develop, test and release improvements to the Ubuntu cloud images. You will also be a voice in communication with our users, ensuring their needs are met.
   

  

 This role requires quality-oriented software engineering in Python and a focus on software interoperability over a vast range of target releases and environments. Excellent Python skills are a key requirement, with previous contributions to open source Python projects being an advantage. This role involves creating and managing Ubuntu images; therefore, experience in configuring apt, and knowledge of deb packaging and general system administration is advantageous in this role.
   

  

 Applicants should be passionate about the Ubuntu project and its values and about building tools that are used by millions of people around the world. A personal interest and emphasis on quality, thinking of edge cases, ease of use, documentation, and careful community coordination is important. Ubuntu is used for all kinds of users, from mission-critical environments to hobbyist Ubuntu users; applicants should be ready to work with the whole spectrum of end users and help guide engineering best practices with all of them in mind.
   

  

 The role entails
   

  

* Collaborate proactively with a distributed team
* Write high quality code, with unit and functional tests, to create new features
* Debug issues and produce high quality code to fix them
* Review code produced by other engineers
* Discuss ideas and investigate to find good solutions
* Work from home, with global travel 2 to 4 weeks per year for internal and external events


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* You love technology and working with brilliant people
* You are curious, flexible, articulate, and accountable
* You value soft skills and are passionate, enterprising, thoughtful, and self-motivated
* You have a Bachelor's or equivalent in Computer Science, STEM or similar degree
* You have extensive experience with Python on Linux
* You have interest in and experience with two or more of the following: Ubuntu Linux systems administration, continuous integration, end-system contract management, Debian packaging, working with public or on premise clouds
* Bonus points if you have experience engaging with the open source community


**What we offer colleagues**
 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Team Member Assistance Program & Wellness Platform
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass and travel upgrades for long-haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

**Canonical is an equal opportunity employer**
 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Java Developer with interest/experience in test automation | SEB, Solna
description:
Join us to pioneer test automation and shape our tech landscape, combining your Java expertise with exciting GCP challenges in a brand new setup. This is a unique opportunity to lead the way in building innovative reporting & analytics solutions within a progressive tech environment.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.
   

  

**About the role:**
 As a Solution Developer in Analytics & Reporting, you will be part of an innovative, agile team that embraces experimentation and continuous learning. You will contribute to making SEB a more data-driven bank by working on initiatives such as customer reporting, push notifications, and regulatory reporting.
   

  

 You’ll be instrumental in establishing our test automation capabilities from the ground up, as there is currently no test automation within the team. This exciting opportunity allows for partial work as a dedicated test automation developer, pioneering robust frameworks and building test automation cases. Simultaneously, you will engage partially as a Java developer, contributing to our core applications. Your expertise will be vital in leveraging GCP to build scalable and efficient solutions. This blend of roles offers a unique chance to shape our future technology landscape.
   

  

 In this role, you will partly work as a dedicated test automation developer, designing robust frameworks and building automated test cases, while also contributing as a Java developer to our core applications. Your expertise will be vital in leveraging GCP to build scalable and efficient solutions. making this a unique opportunity to influence and shape our future technology landscape.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Experience with BDD (Behavior-Driven Development) methodology and Test Automation tools
* Experience working with GitHub and GitHub Actions
* A few years of experience in programming; with knowledge in Spring Boot Java, Kubernetes and Splunk
* Knowledge of distributed event streaming systems like Kafka
* Someone who likes to work according to best practices and deliver high quality software craftsmanship
* A positive team player willing to take ownership
* Positive attitude with strong motivation to continuously learn and adapt
* Excellent English skills


**Merits:**
* Any experience in Public Cloud (GCP preferred)


**What we offer:**
* Agile and modern ways of working, hybrid
* Work in the forefront of modern techniques
* Supportive skilled colleagues who value openness and teamwork
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* A diverse and distributed team across multiple sites


**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 17th of April.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Kafka Developer
description:
* Help design, build and continuously improve the clients online platform.
* Research, suggest and implement new technology solutions following best practices/standards.
* Take responsibility for the resiliency and availability of different products.
* Be a productive member of the team.


 Requirements
   

  

* Seeking an Integration Developer with strong hands-on experience in building and managing event-driven integrations using Apache Kafka and Java.
* The role involves stream processing, JSON transformations, secure communication, and deployment on Kubernetes-based environments.
* Develop and maintain integration services using Apache Kafka and Java.
* Build and manage stream processing pipelines using Kafka Streams (including stateful processing, joins, and windowing).
* Design and implement JSON transformations using Jolt.
* Configure and manage secure communication using TLS/mTLS (keystore/truststore, certificate lifecycle management).
* Implement authentication and authorization using OIDC (token handling and validation).
* Deploy, monitor, and operate applications on Kubernetes (configurations, secrets, scaling, troubleshooting).
* Collaborate with SAP systems and downstream consumers to define payload structures, performance benchmarks, and error-handling strategies.
* Strong experience with Apache Kafka (producers, consumers, topics, partitions, offsets, retries, and error handling).
* Hands-on experience with Kafka Streams and Java-based stream processing.
* Proficiency in Jolt for JSON transformation (designing and maintaining transformation specifications).
* Solid understanding of security concepts: TLS/mTLS, keystore/truststore management, Certificate lifecycle management, OIDC fundamentals (token-based authentication and validation)
* Working knowledge of Kubernetes: Deployments, services/ingress, ConfigMaps and Secrets, Scaling and troubleshooting
* Experience with Schema Registry and schema formats (Avro, Protobuf, JSON Schema).
* Familiarity with Kafka Connect and connector-based integrations.
* Exposure to CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions) and Helm.
* Experience with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack) for logging, monitoring, and tracing.


 Benefits
   

  

* A challenging, innovating environment.
* Opportunities for learning where needed.

title: .NET Developer | SEB Life & Pension, Solna
description:
*SEB Life & Pension is one of Sweden’s largest pension and insurance providers, serving both corporate and private customers. Our products and services support important life events and create security in an uncertain world. As a subsidiary within a large financial group, we combine the agility and influence of a smaller organization with the development opportunities and stability of a large international company. Our skilled tech teams play a key role in future-proofing SEB’s digital architecture and customer offerings—work that truly makes a difference for our customers and colleagues.*
 Are you an experienced .NET developer who believes that strong teams create the best results? Join SEB Life & Pension on our modernization journey and help shape the future of financial services.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a .NET Developer, you will be part of a team responsible for maintaining and supporting business-critical applications that are essential to our daily operations. At the same time, you will contribute to the gradual modernization of our technology stack.
   

  

 Your primary focus will be backend development in .NET, ensuring stability, performance, and reliability of existing systems. While much of the work involves maintenance and continuous improvement, you will also have opportunities to help build new technical capabilities. Experience with frontend development is considered a plus, as we collaborate closely with teams working on our digital user interfaces.
   

  

 You will also work in a multicultural and dynamic environment together with our development center in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
   

  

 If you enjoy working with business-critical systems and want to help shape the path forward, we would be happy to connect with you.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 This role will suit you if you have a strong drive to maintain and improve business-critical system and enjoy contributing to a long-term modernization journey. You have experience in developing, implementing and maintaining applications, and you take responsibility for ensuring the stability and quality of the team’s solutions.
   

  

 Colleagues would describe you as someone who builds positive relationships, collaborates well with others, and delivers reliably. You are structured in your way of working and approach problem-solving with an analytical mindset.
   

  

**To succeed in this role, we believe you have:** 
  

  

* A technical education, such as a university degree or equivalent in computer science, software engineering, or a related field
* Several years of professional experience working with:
+ .NET / .NET Core (multiple versions)
+ C#
+ MS SQL and MongoDB
+ REST APIs / Web Services
+ Git

* Strong communication skills
* Fluency in both Swedish and English


**Advantages**
* Containerization and microservices (Docker, OpenShift, Kubernetes, Kafka)
* Frontend development
* Blazor
* Azure DevOps
* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)


**What We Offer**
 We offer a wide range of benefits and opportunities, but at the core of our offering you will find:
   

  

* An international and collaborative working environment
* The opportunity to help transform an entire industry
* Extensive training and continuous learning opportunities
* An inclusive and value-driven culture
* The chance to deliver world-class services to our customers


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than
 **1** 
**2th of April 2026.** 
 If you have questions about the position, please contact Frida Johansson, Head of IT Fund, by email at frida.a.johansson@seb.se
   

  

 We will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. We also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 https://bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Utvecklare till försvarsindustrin
description:
Vill du vara en del av en stor teamleverans till en av HiQs största kunder och samtidigt bidra till ett säkrare samhälle?
   

  

 Vi söker nu dig som är ingenjör som har djup förståelse för teknik och några års arbetslivserfarenhet. I den här rollen kommer du ingå i ett team med erfarna kollegor som alla har hög kompetens inom området. Teamet arbetar i en javabaserad miljö med bland annat utveckling, script, testautomatisering och DevOps.
   

  

 För att trivas hos oss och i rollen tror vi att du som person är flexibel, du räds inte för att göra det som behövs och har förmåga att både samarbeta med andra och arbeta självständigt. Det faller dig naturligt att leverera resultat med hög kvalitet och att lösa kundens problem är din högsta prioritet.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Högskole-/Civilingenjörsexamen inom datateknik, teknisk fysik, elektroteknik eller motsvarande.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av systemutveckling inom Java eller C#.
* Erfarenhet inom testautomatisering, DevOps, felsökning och konfigurering.
* Då arbetet kan omfattas av sekretess krävs svenskt medborgarskap och att du genomför och godkänns i en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll.
* Möjlighet att jobba på plats på kontoret 3-5 dagar i veckan


**Varför HiQ**
 Sedan 1995 har HiQ varit konsultbolaget som förenklat världen för både kunder och slutanvändare med hjälp av teknik, design och kommunikation. HiQ har alltid fokuserat på två saker: att ha kul på jobbet och att leverera lösningar utöver förväntningar - det är vad som driver oss framåt! Vi HiQare är stolta över att ha en kultur som präglas av
 **resultat** 
 ,
 **ansvar, enkelhet** 
 och
 **glädje** 
 . Vi tror på att arbeta tillsammans för att nå våra gemensamma mål och strävar efter att hjälpa varandra att fortsätta växa och utvecklas. Hos oss får du utöver chansen att utveckla din egen kompetens också möjlighet att lära, leda och inspirera dina kollegor.
   

  

*I denna rekrytering tillämpar vi löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan ansökningstiden har gått ut. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!*

title: Technical Evangelist
description:
**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast.
   

  

 We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**Technical Evangelist**
**Location: SF, Stockholm**
**The Role**
 We’re looking for a
 **Technical Evangelist** 
 who lives at the intersection of code, community, and creativity. You’ll be one of the most public faces of Lovable — building with the product, showing what’s possible, and helping developers fall in love with it.
   

  

 This is not a “marketing engineer” role. You will ship real things, write real code, and teach by example.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Build compelling demos, prototypes, and real-world projects using Lovable
* Create technical content: videos, social posts, tutorials, sample apps, and talks
* Engage directly with builders via Discord, GitHub, Twitter/X, events, and meetups
* Speak at conferences, hackathons, and community events (IRL & online)
* Partner with Product & Engineering to influence roadmap based on user feedback
* Help shape the voice, tone, and technical narrative of Lovable
* Be a trusted technical guide for everyone from tire-kickers to power users
* Travel frequently (approximately once per month)


**What We’re Looking For**
* Strong hands-on engineering background (frontend, backend, or full-stack)
* Comfort building demos quickly and explaining why things work, not just how
* Excellent technical communication skills — writing, speaking, and teaching
* Deep empathy for developers and how they actually build
* Curiosity, creativity, and a bias toward shipping
* Experience with dev tools, platforms, or APIs


**Bonus Points**
* Open source contributions or personal projects people actually use
* Prior experience as an engineer or DevRel
* Experience speaking at conferences or running workshops
* Strong presence in developer communities


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal


 Lovable provides equal employment opportunities to applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, or disability.

title: Head of Developer Services
description:
*Lead the platform that powers Nordic HR* 




  





 The fastest way to scale a tech company isn't just through better features. It's through infrastructure that works, developers who aren't blocked, and a platform team that thinks like a product team. That's where this role begins.
 



 At Simployer, we're simplifying work-life for employers across the Nordics through modern HR tech. We're growing, we're building AI-first, and we're redefining how we deliver software at scale. The platform exists and it's running. Now we need the right leader to take it forward.
 



  





**Now we're looking for someone who gets excited by questions like:** 



* How do we architect a platform that will support AI-driven development workflows
* How can our infrastructure platforms accelerate development velocity for our product teams
* What is the most efficient and robust way to securely operate infrastructure supporting millions of users monthly



  





**Your mission** 




 Lead the platform and DevOps effort that keeps Simployer running and helps engineering teams move faster. Not just by managing infrastructure, but by setting direction, raising the bar on developer experience, and making sure every platform decision is grounded in real business impact.
 



 You'll lead a team of 5-7 DevOps and Platform Engineers across a centralized chapter model, own our multi-cloud strategy across Azure and GCP, and be a key voice in technology leadership when it comes to platform direction, vendor decisions, and cloud strategy. You'll also play a role in M&A activity, helping assess and consolidate infrastructure from acquisitions.
 



  





**You'll thrive here if...** 



* You've led DevOps, SRE, or Platform Engineering teams in cloud-native environments and know what good looks like
* You're hands-on with CI/CD, Terraform or Pulumi, Kubernetes, and observability tooling
* You have strong opinions about developer experience and how to reduce cognitive load
* You're pragmatic enough to choose managed services over custom builds when that's the right call
* You're AI-forward and already use it as a genuine productivity multiplier, not a novelty
* You can lead people, manage stakeholders, and communicate clearly at every level of the organization
* You think about platform as a product, not a utility and have ideas on how AI-driven development will be operated in practice



 You don't need to have all the answers. But you do need to feel energized by the questions.
 



  





**What you bring** 




 We're not big on long checklists, and if the mission resonates we'd love to hear from you. That said, you'll need proven experience leading platform or DevOps teams in a multi-cloud environment, and the communication skills to operate as a leader across a growing engineering organization.
 



  





**A message from the Hiring Manager** 




 Hi, I’m David Rejdemyhr, CTO at Simployer. I want to continue building on the strong engineering culture at Simployer, one rooted in solving hard problems and shipping quality code. We’re now entering our next chapter, and I’m looking for a
 **Head of Developer Services** 
 who wants true ownership of our developer experience.
 



 I need someone motivated by building world-class platforms, streamlining our delivery pipelines, and creating an environment where our engineers can spend their time on what they love: building great products. If you’re ready to scale our capabilities and make a lasting impact on how we build software, I’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior Software Developer - Build Nordea's Next-Gen AI & Cloud Contact Centre
description:
**Job ID: 2984**
**Senior Software Developer - Build Nordea's Next-Gen AI & Cloud Contact Centre (Stockholm)**
 We are looking for a Senior Developer to take an important role in shaping Nordea's Contact Centre services for future banking, and be part for our exciting journey with rollout for new AI integrated cloud based platform. This is an opportunity for you to join a team of enthusiastic and experienced Genesys developers – a team where you will grow and contribute to great customer service.
   

  

 Machine learning, AI, cloud computing. We’re migrating one of the Nordics’ largest contact centre platforms to Genesys Cloud, integrating AI-driven routing, analytics, and automation. We are on a doorstep to a digital revolution – joining us puts you at the heart of it. Working with a skilled, self-managing, international team in a fast-pace agile environment, you’ll play a part in making us truly digital. We all have a role in building the best bank that serves our customers’ changing needs through innovative solutions, collaboration and partnering with fintechs.
   

  

 Are you ready to embark on a learning journey where we lead the way and push the limits in transforming the future of banking?
   

  

**Your Future Responsibilities**
 As the Senior Developer, you will work hands-on with technical development, helping to shape our future cloud-based Genesys platform and the connected systems within the Contact Centre area, always with a strong focus on the customer experience. We develop customizations and integrations, and as our core platforms are not developed in-house, much of our technical work involves working within the applications’ capabilities through configuration and scripting. Our portfolio spans desktop applications, web frontends, middleware, and integrations.
   

  

**Your responsibilities will include:**
* Influencing the technical and operational direction of the team, and driving implementations with a strong focus on reliability, security, and solid engineering practices
* Designing, implementing, testing, deploying, maintaining, and continuously improving the application portfolio managed or developed by the team
* Working closely with multiple stakeholders in an international environment to optimize the design, quality, and functionality of our solutions


 Nordea is transforming one of the largest Genesys environments in the Nordics into a modern cloud-based solution, offering you the opportunity to join this journey from the very beginning.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the four key values that guide us in being at our best. We imagine that you enjoy learning and are excited about bringing your ideas to the table. You’re dependable, willing to speak up – even when it’s difficult – and committed to empowering others.
   

  

 We are working with a broad band of technologies and are therefore looking for an experienced software developer with a deep technical background and hands on coding experience within some or more of our tech stack. Besides Genesys our tech stack contains Java, C#, JavaScript and Python.
   

  

**We see two preferred paths into the role:**
* You have hands-on development experience with Genesys Cloud, Genesys Engage, or a similar contact centre platform, combined with development experience in some of the other technologies in our stack
* You have strong backend development and integration experience, with more than five years of hands-on work in parts of our tech stack, and are motivated to learn and grow into Genesys Cloud


**Your background and skills include:**
* Experience with Kubernetes, AWS, Jenkins, WebLogic and Terraform is also an advantage in this role
* You hold a degree in Software Engineering or Computer Science, or have equivalent practical experience
* You should be comfortable designing and implementing enterprise-scale services and have experience with incident management, automation of processes and tasks, testing practices, configuration management, and server deployments
* As part of our portfolio is voice based, knowledge of at least one Nordic language is an advantage


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model –** 
 we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 10/04/2026.
   

  

 For more information, you’re welcome to contact Tommy Leoni at tommy.leoni@nordea.com.
   

  

**The recruitment process consists of the following steps:**
* Preliminary CV selection
* Online interviews with the hiring leader
* Background check


**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships** 
 . We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change** 
 . We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea** 
 . We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.

title: Senior iOS Developer
description:
At Umain, we're not just creating software; we're crafting the future, one innovative project at a time. With our motto "Shape, Ship, Scale," we empower our team to not only envision the future but also play a pivotal role in building it. We're a dynamic team where you can shape the future, ship groundbreaking solutions, and scale your abilities in many different ways.
   

  

 We're on the lookout for developers ready to join us in this journey, bringing passion, creativity, and dedication along with them.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A chance to work on unique projects that explore and push the boundaries of what's possible.
* A fun and fair work environment where your you have the opportunity to expand your skills through unique challenges and fantastic colleagues.
* A personal coach, and a setting where you can grow professionally and personally.
* Being part of multidisciplinary teams, participating in agile teams, being an important player in a highly ambitious setting.


**As a Senior iOS developer at Umain, your role will involve:**
* Design, build & scale high-performance mobile applications using SwiftUI
* Collaborate and participate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features across both platforms.
* Participating in projects & teams alongside major brands and large organisations, and contributing to emerging tech trends and innovations.
* Drive and lead iOS projects. Be able to oversee a team of iOS developers, define standards, and manage team deliveries.
* Able to either work closely with, or take part in solving problems on other platforms like Android, cross-platform and more.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends to ensure our apps are cutting-edge. Experience with ARKit & Vision Pro is a plus.
* Having a deep understanding of the mobile deployment pipeline.


**Who You Are**
* You're an iOS developer (with 10+ years of experience) and a passion for innovation and a knack for problem-solving.
* You're eager to learn, grow, and take on new challenges.
* You value collaboration, diversity, and the opportunity to make a significant impact.
* You believe in the power of technology to shape the future.


**Why Umain?**
* Career Framework:


 We believe in fairness and clarity, which is why we've established a transparent career framework to ensure equal pay and equal opportunities for all. Your growth and success are as important to us as they are to you. Together with your coach, you will build your own development plan and grow in your career.
   

  

* Work-Life Balance:


 At Umain, diversity is our strength. We understand that life doesn’t pause when you walk into the office. That's why we've cultivated an environment that supports an excellent work-life balance. We welcome team members from all walks of life, recognising the richness that different backgrounds, ages, and life stages bring to our team. We're committed to supporting each other, encouraging a healthy work-life balance that respects your needs, whether it's taking care of your family, your pets, or yourself.
   

  

* Innovations and Learning:


 Technology is always evolving, bringing new challenges and opportunities for collaboration and learning. Our developers work closely with designers, analysts, testers and more to tackle these challenges head-on, sharing knowledge and growing together.
   

  

* Skills Over Degrees:


 We’re more interested in what you can do than in the diplomas you hold. Talent, drive, and creativity are what count at Umain. Here, you’ll find opportunities to grow, learn, and excel in your career, regardless of your educational background. If you have the ambition and commitment to succeed, we have the environment and resources to support your journey.
   

  

**Are You Ready to Shape, Ship, and Scale with Us?**
 If you're a developer who thrives on innovation, values a supportive and inclusive workplace, and is eager to make a tangible impact on the future, we’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something awesome together.
   

  

***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our* 
 internal policies
 *. The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Utvecklare Dynamics 365 F&O
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Om oss**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande konsult- och managementbolag inom digital transformation med tusentals medarbetare i Norden och Europa. Vi har flera år i rad utsetts till en av “Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser” av Great Place to Work och rankas av Gartner som ett av de fem främsta företagen inom digital transformation.
   

  

 Bland annat hjälper vi företag att effektivisera och automatisera sina affärsprocesser, från ekonomi och försäljning till produktion, drift och analys. Vi är stolta över att ha byggt ett starkt erbjudande inom ERP och Business Platforms, där vi erbjuder allt från rådgivning och implementation till långsiktig förvaltning.
   

  

 Vi är på tillväxtresa! Som en del i vår tillväxt vill vi stärka vårt team inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 ERP. Här får du vara med och leverera affärssystemslösningar som verkligen gör skillnad — från rådgivning och systemutveckling till implementering och långsiktig förvaltning. Nu söker vi en
 **Utvecklare Dynamics 365 F&O** 
 som vill vara med och skapa affärsvärde på riktigt.
   

  

**Som utvecklare...**
* i Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations kommer du att ansvara för att utveckla och integrera affärslösningar för kunder inom olika branscher. Du arbetar nära verksamhet och arkitekter för att förverkliga kundernas visioner och för att koppla samman Dynamics 365 F&O med andra system för att säkra effektiva och sömlösa affärsflöden, från första idé till färdig lösning.


**Mer konkret…**
 …kommer du att vara involverad i flera spännande projekt där du bland annat arbetar med:
   

  

* Utveckling och anpassning av funktionalitet i Dynamics 365 F&O med X++ och C#.
* Skapande och hantering av integrationer, t.ex. Azure Integration Services, för att koppla Dynamics med externa system.
* Design och hantering av integrationer (t.ex. Azure Integration Services och REST-API:er) för koppling mellan Dynamics och externa system.
* Delta i förstudier och workshops med kunder för att fånga krav och bidra till lösningsdesign.
* Testning och validering av utvecklade lösningar för att säkerställa att de möter både tekniska och verksamhetsmässiga krav.


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har minst 3 års erfarenhet som utvecklare med Dynamics 365 F&O.
* Väl insatt och bekväm med X++, C# och Azure Integration Services.
* Har erfarenhet av integrationer mellan Dynamics 365 F&O och andra system — gärna via REST API.
* Har ett starkt intresse för teknisk utveckling och för att skapa lösningar som effektiviserar affärsprocesser.


**Varför Sopra Steria?**
 Hos oss får du arbeta i en inkluderande och utvecklande miljö med några av branschens främsta experter. Vi erbjuder spännande kunduppdrag, kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och goda karriärmöjligheter – i ett bolag där människan alltid står i centrum.
   

  

 Hos Sopra Steria får du mer än ett jobb, du får en karriärresa.
   

  

* Bli en del av ett toppteam: Arbeta sida vid sida med några av marknadens mest erfarna experter inom affärssystem och integration.
* Utvecklas på riktigt: Vi satsar stort på kompetensutveckling, certifieringar och personlig utveckling.
* Jobba med projekt som utmanar: Våra kunder spänner över många branscher och våra uppdrag varierar från komplexa transformationer till nyskapande lösningar på marknadens modernaste plattformar.
* Kultur som folk faktiskt trivs i: Vi är stolta över en arbetsmiljö där kollegor stöttar varandra, idéer välkomnas och där det är roligt att gå till jobbet.

title: Development Lead till Sweco med nationell placering
description:
*Vill du arbeta med teknik i framkant i några av Sveriges största företag och organisationer? Vi genomför just nu flera digitala transformationer där vi hjälper våra kunder i resan mot AI. Vi söker förstärkning inom Cloudteknik och avancerad systemutveckling och söker kandidater i hela Sverige.*
**Varför jobba hos oss?**
 Sweco är ett internationellt konsultföretag med 23 000 konsulter, varav 7000 i Sverige, som gör över 120 000 projekt globalt per år. På Swecos division Digital Services är vi runt 300 personer landet över med digital kompetens som brinner för innovation och förändring. Det som skiljer Sweco från andra konsultföretag är att vi arbetar väldigt verksamhetsnära och våra digitala projekt blir ofta en viktig del i bolagens verksamhetsutveckling.
   

  

 Vi hjälper just nu flera större kunder att genomföra bolagsövergripande digitala transformationer mot Artificiell Intelligens. Mycket handlar om att sätta upp integrationer mot bolagens centrala IT-system och tanka ned data i centrala datalager, ofta i Microsoft Azure. Där läggs grunden för optimering och artificiell intelligens. Projekten gränsar ofta till Data Science, Business Intelligence och optimering.
   

  

 Som företag satsar vi på ett ständigt lärande med bra kompetensutveckling med interna utvecklingsmöjligheter. Vi är en flexibel arbetsplats som värderar att må bra på jobbet med en sund balans mellan arbete och fritid. Vi finns över hela Sverige och våra kontor ligger oftast väldigt centralt i våra större städer. Det spelar inte så stor roll var du befinner dig, vi fixar flexibla arbetsmöjligheter som passar både dig och våra kunder.
   

  

**Din framtida roll**
 Du kommer framför allt att arbeta med utveckling och uppsättning av nya miljöer och datalager i Cloud-plattformar. Mycket handlar om integrationer mot kundernas verksamhetsnära system. Vi jobbar ofta agilt och du kommer att vara en viktig spelare i prioriteringarna i utvecklingsprojekten. I de digitala utvecklingsprojekten kommer du vara ledande och ofta i nära samarbete med andra utvecklare.
   

  

 Vi arbetar med många av Sveriges större företag och organisationer och som Development Lead blir du en viktig person i deras resa mot framtiden.
   

  

**Den vi söker – är det du?**
 Vi söker en senior utvecklare med Cloudkompetens som kan leda förändringsprocesser inom den digitala teknologins absoluta framkant. Projekten är verksamhetsnära och ligger ofta separat rakt under bolagens ledning. Vi kan erbjuda kreativ programmering där våra utvecklare får använda sina fulla förmågor och kompetens för att lösa kundernas behov.
   

  

 Då de centrala datalagren vi utvecklar ofta ligger i Cloud, företrädesvis Microsoft Azure, så är det viktigt att du har god kompetens kring vilka möjligheter som finns i de moderna Cloud-plattformarna och hur dessa kan förverkligas och användas i bolagens verksamheter.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är en person som tar ansvar för din tekniska utveckling och håller dig uppdaterad inom relevant teknik. I ditt arbetssätt är du strukturerad och du leder ditt arbete självständigt. Som konsult behöver du vara lyhörd för kundens nuvarande och kommande behov. Din affärsmässighet speglas tydligt i ditt arbetssätt och du har en naturlig nyfikenhet att identifiera, initiera och utveckla nya affärsmöjligheter.
   

  

 Du har troligtvis följande
   

  

* Relevant utbildning från universitet eller yrkeshögskola
* Erfarenhet av avancerad system- och integrationsutveckling
* Goda kunskaper i Microsoft Azure (eller likvärdig Cloud-plattform), JavaScript och Node.js
* God vana att arbeta mot olika typer av databaser
* Utveckling av datalager (BI)
* Viss övergripande arkitekturkompetens


 Du uttrycker dig väl på både svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift.
   

  

**Ansökan** 
 Vi behandlar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Under jul- och nyårsledigheten kan återkoppling dröja. Alla sökande får återkoppling när rekryteringsprocessen är avslutad.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Kontakta oss** 
 Vill du höra mer om tjänsten och hur vi jobbar på Sweco? Välkommen att kontakta
   

  

 Johan Ander, Head of Digital Strategy and Innovation, på johan.ander2@sweco.se eller 076-104 20 64
   

  

 Daniela Sandell, gruppchef, på daniela.sandell@sweco.se.
   

  

 På Sweco vill vi vara en arbetsplats präglad av mångfald. Vi tror att fler perspektiv breddar vår förmåga att fortsätta nå våra mål och eftersträvar mångfald i våra rekryteringsprocesser.
   

  

 Sweco planerar och utformar morgondagens hållbara samhällen och städer. Med den samlade kunskapen hos våra 23 000 arkitekter, ingenjörer och andra experter arbetar vi tillsammans med våra kunder för att möjliggöra den gröna omställningen, maximera digitaliseringens potential och stärka samhällets motståndskraft. Sweco är Europas ledande konsultföretag inom arkitektur och teknik med en omsättning på cirka 31 miljarder SEK under 2024. Företaget är noterat på Nasdaq Stockholm. www.swecogroup.com.

title: Business Developer (Stockholm)
description:
🚀 Why BrightAnalytics?
   

  

**BrightAnalytics** 
 , an ambitious, international scale-up within FinTech. We help companies make their management reporting faster, better, and more visual. Our headquarters? Located in Roeselare (Belgium). Five international sales hubs in Rotterdam, Oslo, Stockholm, Copenhagen and Paris. Our ambition? Become the European market leader.
   

  

**Do you have what it takes to scale our SaaS to the Swedish market?** 
 Join our team in Stockholm and you’ll have the opportunity to grow and shape the future of Bright Analytics
   

  

 💡 What does a Business Developer do?
   

  

* You take full ownership of your lead sales pipe
* You understand the requirements and needs of our prospects and introduce them to the BrightAnalytics narrative
* Through targeted segmentation you map out our business opportunities
* By setting up targeted sales actions you expand the number of incoming leads for our Account Executives (outbound sales activities, social selling, trade shows, seminars)
* You take action by looking for new and creative ways of increasing our brand awareness
* This position is the ideal springboard to grow into the role of an Account Executive


**💼 What value do you bring to the sales team?**
* Holding a master’s degree in an economic area. Prior work experience is not a must
* Fluency in Swedish is essential due to the platform’s complexity, and fluency in English is a must in our international environment
* Getting energized from your communication with potential customers and from the discovery and development of business opportunities
* As part of the team you are not afraid to go the extra mile
* Comfortable in a rapidly evolving environment
* Strong interest in business, finance and new technologies


**✨ The Benefits Of Joining This Fintech Scale-up**
* You will be part of a driven, dynamic and enthusiastic team in a varied job
* Weekly internal training sessions and on-the-job coaching will teach you unique skills that will serve you well throughout your career
* We are a financially healthy scale-up with international growth ambitions
* We have an open business culture with room for personal initiative
* You will receive a competitive salary with a motivating bonus system
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Pension Plan
* Insurance (sickness, pension, TGL, TFA)
* 27 vacation days
* Friday after-work drinks, legendary team-buildings, and an annual weekend with the entire BrightAnalytics team


**Ready to boost your career within fintech?**
**Apply today and grow with BrightAnalytics!**

title: Business Developer – Infrastructure, Clean Energy & Sustainable Materials
description:
**Dassault Systèmes** 
 is a global leader in industrial AI and digital transformation, helping businesses virtualize products, organizations, and business models to drive sustainable innovation and measurable impact. Our solutions empower companies and people to imagine and deliver innovations that harmonize products, nature, and life.
   

  

 Through
 **3D UNIV+RSES** 
 , Dassault Systèmes is shaping the Generative Economy by using Virtual Twins of assets, organizations, and businesses to help enterprises manage complexity, unlock innovation, and achieve exceptional performance. 3D UNIV+RSES represents a metamorphosis—transforming our landscape, positioning, portfolio, technologies, clients, organization, and ways of working to open new realms of possibility.
   

  

 The
 **Infrastructure, Energy & Materials (IE&M)** 
 Industry team is grounded in industry expertise, market insights, and real customer experience, and is accountable for shaping new offers, opening new markets, and accelerating pipeline generation.
   

  

 Looking toward 2026 and beyond, our ambition is to create and scale a high-impact role for Dassault Systèmes, shaping how we engage in large capital projects as a trusted Innovation and Digital Partner. At the core of this mission is the Virtual Twin foundation, which helps programs manage risk, improve system performance, and create long-term value across ecosystems.
   

  

 Role & Responsibilities
   

  

 To achieve these goals, we are looking for an experienced Business Developer to join the Nordics region, covering key asset intensive sectors such as civil transportation infrastructure (with a focus on rail infrastructure), clean energy producers (spanning nuclear new-build, renewables, and cleantechs), and process industries (green metals and critical minerals mining). You will:
   

  

* Accelerate growth across capital intensive environments by combining immediate revenue generation with long term market expansion.
* Deliver “quick wins” by identifying and opening qualified opportunities where Industry Process Experiences (IPE) and packaged solutions create rapid, measurable customer value.
* In parallel contribute to mid and long term growth by shaping strategic innovation pathways with key industry players—establishing partnerships, securing first of a kind deployments, and positioning Dassault Systèmes as a long term transformation partner across major capital programs and industrial transitions.


 This role requires a high degree of autonomy, proactivity, and industry knowledge, you’ll leverage an established network, expertise in asset intensive sectors, and a strong understanding of large project dynamics to shape opportunities and deliver impact. Responsibilities include:
   

  

* Engaging directly with asset owners, operators, and global general contractors to demonstrate how the 3DEXPERIENCE platform and Virtual Twin Experiences enhance program execution and improve asset lifecycle performance.
* Initiating and developing strategic, high impact collaborations that help establish new industry standards.
* Transforming large scale capital programs into structured, recurring, high revenue business opportunities.


**Qualifications / Experience**
* Engineering degree or equivalent technical or industry background.
* 15+ years experience in asset intensive or asset heavy industries and proven experience in business development, strategic capture, or partnership leadership roles with the ability to originate, shape, and secure high value engagements.
* Established and trusted network across asset owners, operators, global general contractors, and the broader industrial ecosystem, enabling executive level engagement and partnership development.
* Deep understanding of large capital project delivery, asset lifecycle management, and the strategic drivers influencing investment, performance, and transformation.
* Strong ability to engage senior stakeholders, navigate complex decision processes, and position differentiated value propositions that drive long term business impact.
* Strong cross functional leadership and influence, mobilizing internal teams, partners, and customer stakeholders to secure and deliver strategic initiatives.
* Fluent in Swedish, additional languages are a plus.


 What’s in it for you
   

  

* An international and diverse working environment
* Flexible working hours with hybrid working model, a good work-life balance and comprehensive benefits package
* Extensive skills and career development programs to build your journey with us


 Inclusion statement
   

  

 As a game-changer in sustainable technology and innovation, Dassault Systèmes is striving to build more inclusive and diverse teams across the globe. We believe that our people are our number one asset and we want all employees to feel empowered to bring their whole selves to work every day. It is our goal that our people feel a sense of pride and a passion for belonging. As a company leading change, it’s our responsibility to foster opportunities for all people to participate in a harmonized Workforce of the Future.

title: Experienced Embedded Firmware Developer in Stockholm
description:
**Job Title**
 Experienced Embedded Firmware Developer in Stockholm
   

  

**Job Description**
*At Axis, we’ve always been about pushing the boundaries in pursuit of innovating for a smarter, safer world. We do this by developing IP-based products and innovations for security and video surveillance. We are expanding our Stockholm team and looking for an Experienced Embedded C Developer to join us!*
**The team**
 At Axis, our teams work cross-functionally in projects to develop and deliver world class products! Your team is a new cross-functional team working on a new product. The team brings together firmware engineers with application developers building high-level functionality in collaboration with frontend developers and UX designers. The team consists of both junior and senior engineers working together in an open climate. We believe diverse perspectives are key to innovation. And one thing for sure; teamwork, collaboration and openness to each other’s ideas are essential to everyone at Axis.
   

  

 Many of our teams have Innovation days and Free Fridays where you can freely experiment your ideas. We trust our teams to decide on the best ways of working, the tools to use, and which ideas to explore – a level of freedom that truly empowers our developers.
   

  

**The role**
 You play an important role in the product development by writing well designed, efficient, scalable, readable and testable code in C. You take an early part in feature investigations and pre-studies, including collaborating on prototype code and evaluating using real world testing. Together with your team, you will be involved in setting the coding standards and ways of working for your team. In our projects we collaborate with different competence areas such as mechanics, electronics, industrial design and production technologies to name a few.
   

  

**Who are we looking for/Who are you?**
 You are curious, love challenges and to solve them in a team focused atmosphere. You get inspired by working in an environment of openness, creativity, trust, commitment, playfulness and encouragement.
   

  

 We hope you enjoy modern software development, focusing on incremental releases and user needs. You actively contribute with your ideas and thoughts. You like creating your own network of peers to discuss issues and designs. You value open communication and readily connect with colleagues to get the input you need to progress, whether in Stockholm, Lund or any other Axis site. For this position, we are primarily looking for someone with at least 5 years of working experience within product development.
   

  

**We’d love to hear that you have:**
* A master’s degree in computer science or equivalent practical experience
* Solid work experience from embedded C/C++ programming in a Linux environment
* Knowledge of other programming languages such as C, C++ or Rust
* Experience working with these technologies is a plus: Wifi, Bluetooth, GPS, battery and power saving algorithms
* Perhaps worked with either of the following tools: Git, Gerrit, Jira, Python, Docker, Docker Compose, Yocto or OpenEmbedded


**What Axis Can Do For You**
 At Axis Stockholm we are a newer R&D site with 45+ engineers so far. You will be part of creating and maintaining the collaborative atmosphere and can influence how we want to work in our part of Axis.
   

  

 Axis is a world leader in network video, where innovative technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide.
   

  

 As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.
   

  

 Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, parental leave policies, wellness benefits, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
   

  

 To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:
   

  

 Life at Axis blog
   

  

 Engineering at Axis blog
   

  

 Innovation at Axis
   

  

**Ready to Act?**
 Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications (CV and cover letter).
   

  

 We're looking for the real you, cover letters written in your own words are highly valued!
   

  

 We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!
   

  

 In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Hanna Al-Maawali at +46 46 272 1800.
   

  

 Type of Employment
   

  

 Permanent Employment
   

  

 Posting End Date
   

  

 2026-04-22
   

  

*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* 
*Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
**About Axis Communications**
 We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
   

  

 With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
   

  

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
 For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
   

  

 Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast
