Svea Solar Deutschland GmbH 
Hülchrather Straße 23  
50670 Köln
company_description: Ready to become a true Power Shifter? 🚀☀️ #jointhepowershift

title: Sr. Frontend Engineer - Streaming Experience Player
description:
Vi bygger Nordens största streamingtjänst som når i snitt cirka åtta miljoner nordbor i veckan genom TV4 Play och vår finska motsvarighet MTV Katsomo. Inom Product, Tech & Operations utvecklar vi de tekniska lösningar som bland annat gör det möjligt att streama innehåll, söka och få rekommendationer - så att människor kan ta del av nyheter, sport och underhållning, när och var de vill.


Streaming Experience Player är teamet som ansvarar för att användarna har en best-in-class upplevelse när de streamar: pålitlig uppspelning, engagerande UX och sömlös annonsintegration.


Som Senior Frontend Engineer ansvarar du för att med agentiskt stöd utforma och förvalta våra lösningar på alla plattformar — från arkitekturbeslut till implementation.

### **Ansvarsområden**

* Bygga och underhålla högpresterande videospelare över flera plattformar: Android/Android TV, iOS/tvOS och Web (webbläsare, Chromecast, LG/Samsung TV).
* Jobba agentiskt genom hela kedjan — vi arbetar idag med Claude Code och OpenAI Codex, och alla förväntas arbeta aktivt med att optimera våra arbetssätt kring dagens och framtidens AI-verktyg.
* Skriva designdokument och tekniska specifikationer som grund för välförankrade beslut.
* Äga observability och monitorering av de videospelare du bygger och ansvarar för.

### **Vi söker dig som**

* Är en erfaren Frontend Engineer med minst fem års erfarenhet av frontend-utveckling som kan se helheten kring dina tekniska lösningar och hur de passar in i ett större sammanhang.
* Har erfarenhet av en snabbrörlig miljö med höga krav på självledarskap.
* Förstår att de flesta tekniska beslut sällan är svartvita, och aktivt söker rätt balans.
* Fullt ut har anammat AI som verktyg för att lyfta din och ditt teams leverans.
* Nördar ner dig på riktigt när något fångar dig — oavsett om det handlar om distribuerade system, AI, eller matlagning. Du blir rastlös när du slutar lära dig.
* Är en god kommunikatör och kan förklara komplexa koncept på ett enkelt vis.

**Nuvarande Tech Stack**

* **UI:** React, React Native
* **Uppspelning:** Media3/ExoPlayer, AVFoundation, Shaka, hls.js
* **Streaming-teknologier**: HLS, DASH, DRM, SSAI, CSAI
* **Språk:** Kotlin, Swift, TypeScript
* **Utvecklarverktyg:** Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, CLI/MCP mot andra verktyg
* **Produktivitet:** Linear, Notion, Slack

### **Vad TV4 erbjuder dig**

* Kort väg från idé till beslut. Vi är en senior tech-organisation med hög autonomi för team och individ.
* En kultur med långsiktiga lösningar i fokus — vi prioriterar hållbar kod framför genvägar.
* Du loggar ut på riktigt efter jobbet. Vi har dedikerad on-call med frivilligt deltagande — du förväntas inte vara tillgänglig utanför arbetstid.
* Fint kontor i TV4-huset (nära Gärdets tunnelbana) med eget gym, parkeringsgarage, restaurang och takterrass.
* Kollektivavtal, tjänstepension, försäkringar och friskvårdsbidrag.
* Telefon (Android eller iPhone), MacBook Pro samt rabatter via Benify.

**Praktisk Info**

* TV4 är office-first - Vi arbetar på vårat kontor 4 dagar i veckan.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med 6 månaders provanställning
* Facklig tillhörighet: Unionen. Kontakta **unionen@tv4.se** för frågor.
* Bakgrundskontroll ingår i processen.


Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Customer Success Manager (CSM) till ted&gustaf
description:
**Vi levererar inte bara digitala lösningar – vi skapar framtidens kundupplevelser.**


Vi hjälper företag att lyckas med sina digitala satsningar genom att vara experter på **webb**, **strategi**, **UX**, **design** och **analys**. Att vi i senaste omgången blev nominerade till **Årets byrå** är ett styrkebesked på att det vi gör skapar verklig effekt. För att fortsätta leverera på den nivån bygger vi nu **ett CS-team i absolut framkant**.


Nu söker vi en Customer Success Manager som vill ta helhetsansvaret för vår kundresa under och efter leverans och vara med och driva **framtidens proaktiva kundvård**.


Hos oss får du **ägarskap**, **frihet** och **ansvar** att forma din roll. Du är en erfaren CSM som trivs med att l**eda kundrelationer,** **bygga smarta processer** och **omsätta kundinsikter till affärsvärde**. Du jobbar både strategiskt och operativt – med **relationer**, **kvalitet** och **proaktivitet** i fokus.

### **Ditt uppdrag**


Som CSM hos oss är du **hjärtat i vår löpande kundrelation**. Genom en **välfungerande support**, **proaktiv rådgivning** och **tydlig kommunikation** ansvarar du för att driva **kundnöjdheten** i vardagen. Ditt arbete är en avgörande nyckel till att kunderna får ut maximalt värde av sina lösningar och i förlängningen väljer att stanna kvar hos oss. Rollen är en spännande hybrid: du löser kundens problem i vardagen, men du ansvarar också för att lyfta blicken, fånga upp strategiska insikter och driva merförsäljning.


Beroende på din profil och erfarenhet kan du dessutom driva ett internt fokusområde (t.ex. AI, Analys eller Operations) för att bygga teamets samlade förmåga.

**I rollen kommer du att:**

* **Driva strategisk kundutveckling:** Bygga relationer med beslutsfattare, identifiera affärsmöjligheter (uppsell/cross-sell) och ta fram underlag inför strategiska affärsgenomgångar.
* **Äga kundupplevelsen (support & utbildning):** Agera *First line* support, felsöka problem och utbilda våra kunder i deras CMS och digitala verktyg för att minska antalet återkommande frågor.
* **Bygga processer:** Du tar fram och förvaltar strukturerna för vår support. Det handlar om allt från ärendehantering och SLA-uppföljning till att bygga upp vår kunskapsbank.
* **Effektivisera med AI:** Du är nyfiken på hur vi kan använda moderna verktyg för att jobba smartare. Du driver arbetet med att implementera AI-stöd i supportflödet för att frigöra tid till mer värdeskapande arbete.

### **Vem är du?**


Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av **kundansvar**, **support** eller **förvaltning** inom digitala tjänster, SaaS eller byråvärlden. Du har en teknisk förståelse för webb och CMS, men din drivkraft är din förmåga att **organisera** och **kommunicera**.

* **Affärsmässig:** Du förstår kundens affär och utmaningar. Du bygger förtroende hos både redaktörer och beslutsfattare, och ser hur vi kan skapa mätbart värde för dem över tid.
* **Strukturerad:** Du gillar ordning och reda. Du ser inte processer som byråkrati, utan som ett sätt att leverera kvalitet över tid.
* **Serviceminded:** Du drivs av att hjälpa andra. Du är pedagogisk och har tålamod att förklara tekniska saker på ett enkelt sätt.
* **Trygg lagspelare:** Du trivs bäst när du får vinna tillsammans med andra. Hos oss arbetar du i ett dedikerat CS-team där vi stöttar varandra, bollar komplexa frågor och delar kunskap. Även om du tar stort eget ansvar, har du alltid ett starkt team i ryggen.
* **Nyfiken:** Du är intresserad av ny teknik och hur den kan förbättra ditt och kundernas arbete.
* **Drivande:** Du väntar inte på att någon ska säga åt dig vad som behöver förbättras – du ser det och fixar det.
* **Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska**: Rollen kräver att du uttrycker dig obehindrat i både tal och skrift.

*Det är starkt meriterande om du har ett analytiskt öga och kan sätta upp spårning via till exempel GTM, samt visualisera data i tydliga dashboards. Du är van vid att omvandla denna data (t.ex. från supportsystem eller webbanalys) till konkreta insikter och åtgärder för kunden.*

### **Varför ted&gustaf?**


Vi är en digitalbyrå som skapar **smarta lösningar** för **ambitiösa kunder**. På ted&gustaf sätter vi **kvalitet, innovation och hållbarhet främst** – både i våra projekt och i vår kultur. Vi är ett skarpt, drivet team där du får utrymme att påverka, växa och ta ansvar.

* **Påverkan:** Du får en nyckelroll i att forma hur vi tar hand om våra kunder och driver vår transformation från reaktiv support till proaktivt partnerskap.
* **Utveckling:** Vi är inne på en resa där vi moderniserar hela vårt arbetssätt. Du får vara med och bygga "framtidens support" hos oss.
* **Kultur:** Vi är en byrå som värdesätter hantverket och varandra. Här får du kollegor som är experter på det de gör och som bryr sig om att vi levererar med kvalitet.


Denna roll rekryteras till kontoret i Stockholm.


Vill du vara med och forma **Nordens vassaste digitalbyrå**?

**Hör av dig – vi ser fram emot att träffas!**

title: User Experience Designer
description:
UX/UI Designer - Shape the Future of AI-Powered Video Experiences
 



  





 📍 Stockholm | 💰 Up to ~60,000 SEK/month | 🏢 Hybrid (1–2 days onsite)
 



  





 Are you a passionate UX/UI Designer ready to make a real impact in the world of AI, video, and enterprise technology?
 



  





 We’re working with an innovative, fast-growing tech company that’s redefining how organisations communicate through video. With over two decades of experience in broadcasting and production, they’ve evolved into a cutting-edge AI platform transforming everyday meetings into fully produced, professional-grade broadcasts.
 



  





 Now, they’re looking for a talented UX/UI Designer to join their Stockholm team and help shape the next generation of their product.
 



  





 Why This Role is Exciting:
 


* 🤝
 **Work alongside global tech leaders** 
 - Collaborate on a product deeply integrated with a leading enterprise ecosystem
* 🎥
 **Build something meaningful** 
 - Your designs will directly impact how major organisations communicate and share information
* 🚀
 **Join at a pivotal growth stage** 
 - A strong product, established partnerships, and huge market opportunity
* 🧠
 **Creative ownership** 
 - Flat structure, real influence, and the ability to shape product direction
* 🍽️
 **Great culture** 
 - Collaborative team, regular social moments, and a genuinely supportive environment



  





 The Role
 



 You’ll join a small but ambitious product team, working closely with another UX/UI Designer and frontend developers to elevate the platform’s user experience.
 



  





 Your focus will be on designing intuitive, accessible, and engaging interfaces for a powerful AI-driven video production tool.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities:
 


* Design seamless UX/UI for a complex, feature-rich platform
* Create user flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity designs
* Work closely with product and engineering to refine requirements
* Conduct user research and translate insights into design improvements
* Develop user personas, journeys, and key user stories
* Ensure strong accessibility standards (e.g. contrast, keyboard navigation)
* Contribute to design systems and consistency across the platform



  





 What We’re Looking For
 


* 5–10 years’ experience in UX/UI design
* Strong proficiency in
 **Figma**
* Experience with or strong interest in
 **Fluent & Fluent 2 design systems** 
 (highly beneficial)
* Solid understanding of accessibility best practices
* Experience with user research, personas, and usability testing
* Working knowledge of
 **CSS** 
 and
 **JavaScript**
* Familiarity with tools like
 **Jira**
* A proactive, adaptable mindset with strong problem-solving skills



  





 💡 Bonus if you’ve worked with video, streaming, broadcasting, or media-related products.
 



  





 What’s on Offer
 


* Salary landing around Mid-50s to 60K SEK, depending on experience
* Permanent position
* Hybrid working (1–2 days per week in the office)
* Standard Swedish benefits (pension, healthcare, wellness allowance, 25+ days holiday)
* A collaborative, passionate team with a strong product vision



  





 Ideal Candidate:
 



 You’re not just a designer - you’re someone who cares deeply about usability, thrives in a fast-moving environment, and enjoys being part of a tight-knit, ambitious team. You’re comfortable taking ownership, occasionally going the extra mile, and contributing to a product you can truly be proud of.
 



  





 We also welcome applications from candidates available to start immediately, as we have capacity to accommodate an earlier start & onboard quickly 😊

title: Business Analyst
description:
In bank and Digital Lending you have the opportunity to:
 



  




* Contribute to all areas: to analyze, design, develop, test, and maintain our lending products.
* Lead the work of gathering requirements from the business and other stakeholders.
* Together with UX designers make our lending solutions for our customers as seamless as possible.
* Be part of our Data Driven Development journey: gather and analyze customer data, rise hypothesis, and take decisions based on that.
* Actively participate in architectural discussions, providing valuable insights and recommendations for system enhancements and improvements.
* Express Product Backlog in terms of Jira User stories with acceptance criteria and other required details.
* Plan, prioritize and estimate the work together with the team members, and Product Owner.
* Support Product Owner in finding a good balance between life cycle management, maintenance, regulatory compliance as well as development.



 What is needed in this role:
 



  





 \* Worked with Corporate Lending before is a huge plus.....
 


* University degree (preferably in Computer Science, Information Technology, Mathematics, Statistics, Finance or Economics).
* Proficient in requirements gathering, analysis, and documentation.
* Strong understanding of software development processes, software architecture layers, API integrations.
* Experience in agile way of working (preferable Scrum, SAFe frameworks).
* Understanding of data driven development and data analytics.
* Business domain knowledge within the Lending area is considered as an advantage.
* Excellent communication skills and being fluent in English, both spoken and written.
* Swedish language is considered as an advantage.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

title: Senior Product Designer - Platform Design
description:
The Platform Design team is on a mission to fuel innovation through design. We don’t just build tools: we shape world-class ecosystems and craft high-impact solutions that empower organizations to thrive in an increasingly complex digital world.
   

  

 As part of our Shipping Our Expertise (SOE) team, you will be at the forefront of a major strategic shift at Spotify. This is an incredibly exciting space where we productize the "Spotify way" of working into a catalog of emerging SaaS products. We are building the future of how some of the most renowned software development companies in the world, from industry giants to agile startups, operate, collaborate, and scale.
   

  

 This role is a unique hybrid, bridging the gap between deep Product UX, Brand identity, and Product Marketing. You will not only apply our build systems but actively compose the visual language and user experience for the future catalog of software shipping from Spotify. It’s about creating a new professional standard for software used by diverse customer types worldwide, including cross-functional partnerships, R&D teams, company managers, and operational functions.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Frame complex problem spaces and define the design strategy for our emerging SaaS catalog, exploring multiple solutions before landing on a high-conviction recommendation.
* Own the design quality and cohesion of sophisticated user journeys, ensuring our product UX and visual language are consistent, seamless, inspiring, and world-class.
* Contribute to and evolve a design system that supports a growing catalog of external-facing products, balancing existing Spotify paradigms with fresh, innovative visual instincts.
* Craft intuitive experiences for a wide range of customer types, from executive decision-makers to technical specialists, ensuring our software solves sophisticated organizational challenges.
* Expertly represent the design field in product rituals and high-stakes collaborator forums, including studio-wide All Hands.
* Leverage AI-assisted workflows and tools to expedite idea generation and rapid prototyping, enabling faster iteration while maintaining a high bar for craft, clarity, and human-centered outcomes.
* Partner with Product, Engineering, and Data Science at the highest levels to co-create strategic direction and challenge the team's understanding of the problem space.
* Empower and mentor other designers, fostering a culture of high-caliber design strategy and execution.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You possess incredible aesthetic taste and instincts, "sweating the details" of visual design while remaining grounded in functional, high-utility product UX.
* You understand how to take the core energy of the Spotify brand and refine it into a professional SaaS context that feels Alive, Human, and Meaningful.
* You have a proven track record partnering cross-functionally in a complex product environment, such as scaled tech companies, platforms, or leading agencies.
* You have experience in product marketing and are proficient with content management systems (ideally Webflow or similar) to bring brand stories and product value-propositions to life.
* You approach projects with a comprehensive mentality, proven to deliver solutions that simplify complex workflows for diverse user groups.
* You excel at sharing critical information across teams and can back up your ideas with clear rationale and data-driven insights.
* You are committed to continuous growth, adapting seamlessly to the fast-paced shifts of the global SaaS landscape.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London (UK) or Stockholm (Sweden).
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Head of Design
description:
Do you want to lead the design of Sweden’s most loved financial platform? At Avanza, we don't just "do" design – we use it to democratize finance.
 



 We are looking for a Head of Design to lead our talented team in making the complex simple and the future of savings intuitive. We believe design creates clarity and control. You’ll lead the design of experiences that help millions shape a better future and make smarter financial decisions.
 



 If you want to combine a deep love for the craft with bold, modern leadership in a culture that thrives on innovation and heart, this is where you belong.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 As Head of Design, you masterfully balance a genuine passion for the craft with a sharp strategic mindset. You lead the vision for the entire design organization, from deep user insights to the final visual experience, and play a pivotal role in shaping both product strategy and business-critical decisions.
 



 A central part of your mission will also be shaping design in the AI era, driving how we integrate AI and personalization to build a proactive customer experience rooted in security and trust. You help customers take control of their finances by translating complex technology and regulatory requirements into simple, intuitive experiences.
 



 In this role, you will:
 


* Partner closely in the Product- and Tech leadership team, to ensure that delivering true customer value remains at the heart of everything we build.
* Scale and evolve our design organization, fostering a world-class creative and safe culture that attracts and develops top talent.
* Navigate organizational, technical, and regulatory complexity to drive alignment and synergy between teams and leadership.
* Drive innovation and strategic change with confidence, while hands-on and through your team ensuring a product where world-class UX makes the complex simple.



 The Team: You report to our CPO and have the overall responsibility for a design organization of approximately 30 people. You directly lead three Design Leads, each responsible for teams of UX designers and UI specialists across different areas. Your mission is to coach them to success and ensure a cohesive, world-class customer experience across the entire product. You also hold a Design Lead role within the Customer Experience area, driving several key aspects of the overall experience.
 



  





**Who You Are** 




 We are seeking a senior leader with world-class UX expertise, passionate about developing others and with a proven track record of coaching managers in fast-paced tech environments. You have a natural ability to zoom out and see the big picture, setting long-term direction, while also possessing a keen sense of how UI details and UX insights work together to create products that customers love and that strengthen both brand and trust.
 



  





 An excellent designer in your own right, equally comfortable working hands-on and guiding your team when needed. We also believe that you have:
 


* Proven leadership experience from a similar role, ideally within complex digital products or platforms.
* A strategic and bold mindset, comfortable taking calculated risks while always keeping customer trust at the center.
* Strong relational skills, with a supportive and down-to-earth approach that naturally builds trust across an organization.
* A good understanding of the Swedish language. Since we primarily operate in Swedish, you need to be comfortable following and participating in discussions, though full spoken fluency is not a requirement.



  





**Application** 




 Does this sound like you? Great! Send in your application by clicking the "Apply Now"/ "Skicka ansökan" button in the ad as soon as possible. We look forward to hearing from you!
 



  





*We kindly but firmly decline any contact from recruitment agencies or advertising sales representatives.*

title: Product Optimization Manager
description:
CDON Group operate some of the leading e-commerce marketplaces in the Nordics. Through their platforms CDON and Fyndiq, they connect millions of consumers with thousands of merchants every day. To continue improving their marketplace experience, we are now looking for a Product Optimization Manager who can turn product data into meaningful insights and measurable improvements. This role sits at the intersection of data, product strategy, and user experience — helping the organization make smarter decisions through analytics, experimentation, and clear recommendations.
 



  





 If you enjoy working where data meets product strategy, and want to help shape the future of one of the Nordics’ largest marketplaces, we would love to hear from you! The selection is ongoing so send in you application today.
 



  





**You are offered** 




  




* Meaningful ownership – shape their analytics infrastructure and experimentation culture from the ground up
* Close collaboration – work directly with senior product and design stakeholders on impactful initiatives
* Flexible hybrid work from their Stockholm office
* Competitive compensation and benefits package
* A team culture built around curiosity, transparency, and continuous learning



  





**About the role** 




  





 As a Product Optimization Manager, you will own the product analytics and experimentation setup for their marketplace platform. You will work closely with Product Managers, UX Designers, and their Data team to analyze user behavior, identify opportunities, and run experiments that improve conversion, engagement, and overall product performance. Together, you will help build a strong culture of data-informed decision-making across the product organization.
 



 This is a hands-on individual contributor role where you will have a real impact on how their product evolves.
 



  





**Tasks** 




  





*Product Analytics & Insights:* 



* Define, monitor, and report on key product KPIs, including user behavior, conversion funnels, and feature adoption
* Build and maintain dashboards and reporting frameworks that provide stakeholders with a clear view of product performance
* Translate complex behavioral data into clear, actionable recommendations that guide product decisions
* Identify patterns and opportunities that help improve the customer journey and conversion rate



  





*A/B Testing & Experimentation* 



* Design and run end-to-end product experiments, from hypothesis and setup to analysis and recommendations
* Collaborate with Product Managers and Designers to identify high-impact testing opportunities
* Own and prioritize the product experimentation roadmap
* Help establish experimentation as a core practice across the organization



  





*Analytics Infrastructure & Tracking* 



* Own the strategy and governance of our Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager (GTM) setup
* Implement, test, and troubleshoot tags, triggers, and variables to ensure accurate data collection
* Work with engineers to maintain a clean and reliable data layer



  





*Cross-functional Collaboration* 



* Work closely with Product Managers to shape product roadmaps and measure feature impact
* Support UX Designers with quantitative insights to validate design hypotheses
* Participate in product discovery, strategy discussions, and sprint planning, ensuring a strong data perspective from the start



  





**We are looking for** 




  




* Proven experience in product analytics, CRO, or a similar data-focused role
* Experience working with digital products or e-commerce platforms
* Hands-on expertise with Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager (GTM)
* Experience designing and analyzing A/B tests using tools such as GrowthBook, Optimizely, or similar platforms
* Strong experience collaborating with Product Managers and UX Designers
* Ability to communicate analytical insights clearly to non-technical stakeholders
* Experience with at least one data visualization tool such as Looker, Tableau, Power BI, or similar



  





 It is considered a plus if you have:
 



  




* Familiarity with SQL or Python for deeper data exploration
* Experience working with BigQuery or other cloud-based data warehouses
* Experience from marketplace or multi-sided platform environments



  





 PRACTICAL DETAILS
 



  





 Contact: Kathinka Evers
 



 Selection: Ongoing
 



 Start: Asap with regards to notice period
 



 Location: Ynglingagatan 16, Stockholm
 



 Full time position

title: Product Manager
description:
**Are you our next Product Manager?** 




  





 As a Product Manager, you will work closely with engineering, design, and data to continuously improve our storefront experience. This is a hands-on role with a strong focus on execution, delivery, and learning through iteration, working alongside an experienced e-commerce team. 
 



  





 You will take clear strategic direction and priorities and translate them into concrete product improvements. Over time, the role offers the opportunity to grow in scope and responsibility as you build context, product judgment, and ownership. 
 



 Your mission is to help make shopping with Photowall clearer, smoother, and more effective - from navigation to checkout - while learning what truly drives customer value in a high-impact e-commerce environment. 
 



  





 As a Product Manager you belong with the Product team in our Growth-department. The Product team consists of two developers and one product designer, and is being led by our Chief Growth Officer. You will of course work in close collaboration with both marketing and data teams, ensuring alignment across initiatives and leveraging insights to drive product decisions.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Own the execution of customer-facing product initiatives for the storefront
* Translate business priorities into clear product requirements and delivery plans
* Work closely with frontend developers and UX/design to deliver high-quality solutions
* Plan, run, and analyze A/B tests and experiments
* Use data and user insights to identify and prioritize improvements
* Coordinate multiple initiatives in parallel and ensure timely delivery
* Follow up after launch to measure impact, document learnings, and iterate



  





**Requirements** 



* 4–6 years of experience as a Product Manager or Product Owner in digital products or e-commerce
* Proven ability to deliver end-to-end product improvements independently
* Experience working closely with engineering and design teams
* Experience creating detailed user stories and technical tickets for engineering teams
* Experience in e-commerce
* Analytical mindset, with experience using data, funnels, and experiment results
* Structured and reliable, with strong follow-through
* Familiarity with experimentation and analytics tools
* Interest in UX, personalization, and customer journey optimization



  





**About Photowall** 




 At Photowall, we are more than just a global leader in custom-made wallpapers and wall murals -we’re passionate about transforming spaces and bringing design to life. With a presence in over 20 markets we’re on an exciting journey of growth. Our vision is to keep expanding, both geographically and through innovative new products. As proud members of the
 **Network of Design (NOD)** 
 , we are constantly pushing the boundaries of interior design to create inspiring and meaningful spaces.
 



  





 Here you’ll have the chance to shape our future and influence the development of our technical platform, all while working in a company that’s committed to the ever-evolving world of interior design. If you’re passionate about design and eager to grow, Photowall is the place for you. We can’t wait to welcome you aboard as a key player in our exciting journey!
 



  





 Apply today and help us shape the future of design at Photowall!

title: Accessibility Specialist
description:
Do you want to help develop accessibility initiatives to improve the user experience of digital services? At Nexer Digital, we have an exciting opportunity for someone with the knowledge of current accessibility regulations and the technical skills to apply them. We are hiring an Accessibility Specialist.
   

  

 The role is hybrid, with one of our offices in Stockholm, Malmö or Gothenburg as your main location.
   

  

**THE ROLE OF ACCESSIBILITY SPECIALIST**
 We are looking for an Accessibility Specialist to ensure that digital platforms and products are accessible to all users, regardless of disability or technical ability. In this role, you will develop and implement strategies and processes to ensure that digital products comply with accessibility standards and guidelines.
   

  

 As an Accessibility Specialist, your main responsibility is to drive, coordinate, and further develop accessibility work. You will assess the current state through audits and analyses in order to propose strategies and initiatives in both the short and long term. You will provide advice and support to clients and work to increase competence and engagement around accessibility.
   

  

 Your task is to ensure that customer solutions can be used by everyone, meaning that interfaces, content, pedagogy, and code are designed in an inclusive way for all users.
   

  

**Examples of responsibilities include:**
* Reviewing and auditing accessibility of websites, applications, or documents
* Planning and conducting usability testing
* Participating in requirements work and analysing websites, applications, and documents from an accessibility perspective
* Collaborating with developers, communicators, and designers to create accessible websites and services
* Conducting workshops and training sessions within accessibility
* Creating guidelines, policies and instruction materials
* Designing and driving plans and strategies for digital inclusion


**Essential skills:**
* Strong knowledge of standards, laws, and regulations in the field, such as EN 301 549, WCAG 2.1 (and 2.2), European Accessibility Act and Web Accessibility Directive (DOS Act).
* Technical understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, WAI-ARIA, and semantic markup
* Solid knowledge of universal design, different types of functional variations, and their needs
* Experience with tools for manual and automated accessibility testing
* Experience in developing, driving, and designing digital services
* Experience working in projects using agile development methods
* Fluency in both Swedish and English, spoken and written


**Desired skills:**
* Relevant academic education in digital design (UX design, frontend development, visual design) or equivalent experience/qualifications
* At least 4–5 years of experience in accessibility, usability, or UX design – both strategic and operational
* Certifications such as WAS, CPACC, or ADS
* Experience using accessibility tools such as screen readers
* Experience conducting user testing
* Experience with tools such as Figma and Miro
* Experience facilitating workshops and delivering training sessions or lectures
* Experience working with design systems
* Knowledge of design thinking
* Experience working in the public sector


**PERSONAL QUALITIES**
 To succeed in this role, you are creative, analytical, and solution-oriented. You have a genuine interest in creating both customer and business value, as well as the ability to independently drive your work forward with high quality. You are also a problem solver who constantly strives toward new goals and successfully leads projects.
   

  

 As a consultant with us, you will have significant responsibility and freedom of action within your assignments. You will also shape and contribute to proposals, bids, and client pitches, ensuring accessibility is positioned as a core value.
   

  

**APPLICATION**
 If you believe you are the right person for the role, submit your application and CV today! We're reviewing applications and holding interviews on an ongoing basis. Unfortunately, we are unable to accept applications via email. If you have questions about the position or about Nexer Digital, please contact
 **Hanna Karppi** 
 , at
 **hanna.karppi@nexergroup.com**

title: Product Manager - R&D
description:
This role is a part of the R&D team at Avalanche Studios Group. This department has a singular focus: finding the next big thing! We do this by building prototypes and quickly testing them with real players.
   

  

 As a Product Manager in the R&D team at Avalanche Studios Group, your role is to lead and evolve the Playtesting Program that allows us to quickly test early game prototypes with external players. This role is key to our efforts of testing game ideas with real players often and early. You will focus on scaling the program to the next level, ensuring we can validate concepts effectively very early in development.
   

  

**The Position**
 As the Product Manager, you will take holistic ownership of the Playtesting Program. Your primary focus will be to define and execute the program's overall strategy and expansion. This includes cultivating a thriving ecosystem of playtesters and ensuring robust testing capabilities. The goal is to assess product-market fit and inform decisions about a prototype's future development. Furthermore, you will actively build out our internal capabilities for evaluating and testing ideas sourced from external partners.
   

  

 You will report to the Product Director, R&D. This on-site role is based in our Stockholm office, with the opportunity to work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Program Strategy & Expansion: Developing and refining the Playtesting Program strategy to scale effectively, including expanding its scope to incorporate external partners.
* Execution & Collaboration: Ensure the successful execution of playtests, working closely with User Research, the Community Manager, and development teams.
* Performance & Evaluation: Defining, tracking, and driving efforts to meet key success metrics related to playtester engagement and growth. Regularly evaluating the program to identify and implement improvements that support large-scale operation.


**Who You Are**
* Entrepreneurial and Proactive: Comfortable initiating and managing change with an entrepreneurial mindset.
* Proven Experience: Experienced in scaling products and/or services within the tech industry, preferably within gaming. This includes coaching internal support teams, as well as directing external agencies.
* Strong Communicator: Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, as well as strong presentation skills to confidently address stakeholders at all organizational levels.
* Organized and Collaborative: Demonstrates strong project management skills and thrives as a team player within a matrixed organization.
* Product Vision and Strategy: Proven ability to translate strategic business objectives into a clear product vision and roadmap, driving innovative and impactful gaming experiences.
* Passionate about Gaming: Has a genuine passion for and actively plays video games. Stays up to date with industry trends and demonstrates an understanding of what motivates players.


 Note: Research shows under-represented groups in the industry might not apply to a job if they don’t check off every requirement. At Avalanche, we’re more about your drive to learn and interest in tackling challenges than what’s on your resume! So don’t stress if you don’t tick every box— shoot us your application anyway! Diverse opinions and different experiences are what make our teams so great, not itemized lists of qualifications.
   

  

**The Stockholm location**
 Our Stockholm office is situated in Södermalm, the beating heart of the city’s game industry. It’s a physical representation of our games – the lush vegetation of Just Cause and theHunter: Call of the Wild meets corroded metal straight out of Mad Max. Our hybrid model requires you to be in the office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays to foster collaboration and creativity.
   

  

**Our values**
 At Avalanche Studios Group, we create worlds beyond limits. But that’s not exclusive to our games, so we’re committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. All Avalanchers have a shared responsibility to create an open work environment where everyone is treated equally and respectfully. Being part of our world is not contingent on your heritage, your gender, or sexual orientation. It’s all about your passion and creativity.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 To apply for this position, please register below and provide your CV in English. We review applications continuously. All further studio-related information is provided under a non-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 At Avalanche Studios Group we're always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our passionate team, but please note that relocation assistance is not available for this role.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Industrial Designer (IDUE)
description:
**About SHL Medical**
 SHL Medical is a world-leading provider in the design, development, and manufacturing of advanced self-injection devices. With a global team of 6,000 employees, we partner with leading pharmaceutical and biotech companies to deliver innovative autoinjectors, pen injectors, and other drug delivery systems that ensure effective treatment for patients. Headquartered in Switzerland since 2018, with key operations in Sweden, Taiwan, and the US, we are united by a commitment to innovation, impact, and growth. Together, we empower our people to develop solutions that make a meaningful difference in the lives of millions of patients while fostering a supportive, inclusive, and dynamic workplace for our colleagues.
   

  

**Job Overview**
 The Industrial Designer is responsible for shaping next-generation drug-delivery devices through strong Industrial Design (ID), close collaboration with Usability Engineering (UE), and rigorous application of User-Centered Design (UCD) principles.
   

  

 The role bridges
 **form, function, usability, and brand** 
 , ensuring design solutions are aesthetically compelling, ergonomically sound, technically feasible, and supported by user evidence throughout the development lifecycle.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Lead and contribute to product design concepts for next-generation devices in close collaboration with multiple stakeholders (e.g. Business and Marketing, and Project Teams, especially Engineering, and Usability Engineering).
* Translate user needs and requirements into high-quality visualizations, including sketches, renderings, CMF concepts, and 3D mock-ups.
* Define and maintain product-specific graphic and visual design languages aligned with brand and platform strategies.
* Develop color, material, and finish (CMF) concepts, including preparation, alignment, and verification with stakeholders.
* Prepare and maintain the Industrial Design Specification, ensuring traceability of design intent throughout development.
* Actively collaborate with Usability Engineers to integrate UCD principles from early concept phases through validation.
* Support Human Factors and Usability activities for internal development projects and customer programs, ensuring design decisions are informed by user insights.
* Prepare models and prototypes (physical and digital) for internal reviews, formative user studies, and customer engagements.
* Support and participate in user research activities, including observation, synthesis of findings, and design iteration.
* Support cross-functional project teams with design expertise throughout all development phases.
* Communicate design concepts and rationale clearly to internal stakeholders and external partners/customers.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* 3+ years of professional experience as an Industrial Designer, preferably in medical devices, regulated products, or complex consumer products.
* Experience as an Industrial Designer with products for mass production.
* Strong understanding of User-Centred Design and Human Factors principles, with hands-on experience collaborating with usability engineers.
* Degree in Industrial Design, Product Design, or equivalent.
* Strong communication skills in Swedish and English and ability to work effectively in cross-functional, international teams.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Proven ability to translate user insights into robust, manufacturable design solutions.
* High proficiency in CAD and visualization tools (e.g., SolidWorks, Rhino, KeyShot or equivalent, Adobe Suite).
* Experience in prototyping techniques, 3D-printing, and model making.


**We Offer**
* Challenging assignments in a fast-growing and innovative industry.
* A multicultural team and modern working environment with state-of-the-art facilities and technologies.
* A place where we take pride in the inclusive and collaborative environment we have built - one where a true sense of belonging fosters meaningful exchange and shared growth.
* Various opportunities for personal and professional development within a global organization.
* Flexible hours and hybrid working policy.


 Interested in joining SHL Medical and in supporting us with your expertise and personality? Then we look forward to receiving your application to our Talent Acquisition Department.
   

  

 For more information on SHL Medical, please visit: shl-medical.com/careers
   

  

**Please note: We do not accept applications from recruitment agencies for this position.**

title: VFX Internship
description:
Hology Interactive
 
 is revolutionizing 3D development to make it easier for creators, educators, web developers, designers, and artists to build projects and experiences for everyone to enjoy using web technologies. We are seeking passionate and innovative student interns to join our team and craft immersive 3D experiences using our proprietary Hology Engine. This internship offers a unique opportunity to gain invaluable hands-on experience in the rapidly evolving field of interactive 3D technology while contributing to our product's development.
 




  






 We are looking for a VFX artist intern for our PC game demo project, the art direction is stylized art.
   






**As an intern, you will:** 




  




* Contribute to environmental and some character visual effects that enhance gameplay and player immersion. You will be able to include specific approved VFX you worked on in your personal portfolio upon completion of the full contracted internship period.
* Collaborate with our programmer to design dynamic, cinematic, and optimized VFX
* Develop and implement effects that support gameplay. The art direction is stylized art
* Give feedback to our existing game engine and assist in testing features
* Research on specific subject matter topics for VFX inspirations and more
* Assist in getting feedback from gameplay testers to improve the VFX
* Assists with tutorial creation and documentation for the game engine on VFX related topics



  





**Technical Skills and Experience** 




  




* Flexible to adapt to new game engines and tools such as Affinity and Blender
* Ability to follow and match an established art direction
* Familiarity with version control tools such as GitHub



  





**Bonus:** 

 simple rigging and animation in Blender, and/or web programming experience (TypeScript/JavaScript)
 




  





**Personal Attributes** 



* Adaptability and enthusiasm for exploring diverse technologies and tools
* Strong self-motivation and ability to work independently
* Exceptional problem-solving skills and meticulous attention to detail
* Curious and willing to deep dive with research into specific subject matter
* Ability to accept feedback and follow directions



  





**Additional Details** 



* Duration: 3 months internship or 6 months LIA
* You have to be a student who needs LIA or internship credit for a university or vocational school
* Location: This is remote work with some possible in-person events/meetings in Stockholm
* Start Date: May or June, 2026. Negotiable
* Flexible work hours with prior agreement
* Days off in accordance with your institution's policy
* Mentorships on shaders, concept development, UX design for VFX, CV review, research methods, and more subject specific matter
* The working language is English. Bonus: knowledge of Swedish or Japanese



 Contact Us
 

  






 Please send your CV in PDF format and portfolio link to
 

 hello@hology.app
 

 with the subject line “
 
**(Your Name):** 


**Summer VFX Internship.**

title: Backend Engineer - Sana Agents
description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**
We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.**About the Team**
About Sana  

Sana is an AI lab building superintelligence for work. We believe organizations can accomplish their missions faster when teams can effortlessly access knowledge, automate repetitive work, and learn anything with the help of agentic AI. As part of Workday, we are committed to building AI that augments people - not replaces them.  

  

We bring this mission to life through two products. Sana Agents provide a seamless way to access all your company’s apps, knowledge, and data, enabling AI agents to do real work so teams can process and act on information at unprecedented scale. Sana Learn is an AI-powered learning hub that combines the simplicity of a modern learning platform with intelligent features like an AI tutor, automated content generation, and interactive apps, making knowledge not just accessible but actionable.  

  

We’re a talent-dense, product-obsessed team of engineers and designers from companies like Google, Spotify, Apple, and Databricks, united by deep technical excellence and rapid iteration. Our tools already help over a million people learn and work better across hundreds of leading enterprises - and we’re just getting started.**About the Role****About the role**
You'll build and evolve the core services that power agents and product features, with a focus on enterprise-scale workloads, performance optimization, and long-term architectural sustainability. You drive architecture and systems design to ensure our platform can support high volumes of data, entities, and demanding enterprise clients.**In this role, you will*** Design and decompose services and APIs for scale and clarity
* Build eventing and queue systems for reliable, high-throughput data flows
* Lead schema evolution, migrations, query/index optimization and caching strategies
* Define and enforce consistency models and multi-region readiness
* Optimize for performance budgets and privacy/tenant isolation
* Work hands-on with TypeScript/Node, Postgres, and distributed systems primitives.

**What success looks like*** Core services are reliable, scalable, and easy to evolve
* Risks are identified and solved before issues become critical
* APIs are clear, well-documented, and power seamless product experiences
* Data boundaries are robust - privacy and tenant isolation are never compromised
* Performance budgets are met, even under heavy load
* You are a trusted partner for distributed systems design and implementation

**Our tech stack**
We build on a simple modern stack optimized for both humans and AI.* **Backend:** TypeScript, Kotlin, Node.js
* **Frontend:** TypeScript, React, Tailwind
* **Databases:** Postgres, Redis
* **Cloud infra:** GCP/Kubernetes/Terraform

**About You**
Basic Qualification
8+ years experience in software development engineering.  

4+ years experience designing, developing, and deploying distributed systems.  

[Insert years] experience designing and developing distributed system components, demonstrating knowledge of principles such as consistency, availability, and fault tolerance.  

Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field such as Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline, or equivalent practical experience.
Other Qualification
Demonstrated ability in Algorithmic Thinking, including [insert specific algorithms or data structures relevant to distributed systems], to design efficient and scalable solutions for [insert specific distributed computing problems].  

Solid experience with API Development, including understanding of [insert specific API protocols like REST or gRPC] and experience in designing and building [insert specific types of distributed APIs].  

Good understanding of Code Testing methodologies, such as [insert specific testing types like integration or contract testing], and experience with [insert specific testing tools or frameworks] in a distributed environment.  

Strong understanding of Distributed Systems Software principles, including [insert specific concepts like consistency models or fault tolerance mechanisms], and experience in [insert specific distributed technologies or frameworks].  

Working knowledge of High Availability strategies and their implementation in distributed systems, including [insert specific techniques like load balancing or redundancy].  

Experience with Large Scale Data Processing technologies and frameworks such as [insert specific tools like Spark or Kafka] within a distributed architecture.  

Good understanding of Large Scale Systems design principles, including [insert specific aspects like scalability or data management in distributed contexts].  

Good understanding of Object-Oriented Design (OOD) principles and their application in building modular and maintainable distributed components.  

Working experience with Source Control Management (SCM) tools such as [insert specific SCM tools] and branching strategies for collaborative distributed development.  

Basic understanding of System Security principles and best practices relevant to distributed environments, including [insert specific security aspects like authentication or authorization].  

Proven ability in Team Collaboration within a distributed software development team.  

Good skills in creating Technical Writing Documentation for [insert specific types of technical documentation] related to distributed systems. **Our Approach to Flexible Work**  

With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in-office each week, we simply **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.  

At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com.**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**
At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.  

Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.  

In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

description:

title: Data engineer (AI)
description:
**The Department of Immunology, Genetics and Pathology** at Uppsala University has a broad research profile with strong research groups focusing on cancer, genetic and autoimmune diseases. A fundamental idea at the department is to stimulate translational research and thereby promote closer interactions between medical research and health care. Research is presently organized in six research programs: Cancer Precision Medicine, Cancer Immunotherapy, Genomics and Neurobiology, Molecular Tools and Functional Genomics, Neuro-Oncology and Neurodegeneration and Vascular Biology. Departmental activities are also integrated with the units for Oncology, Clinical Genetics, Clinical Immunology, Clinical Pathology, and Hospital Physics at Uppsala University Hospital. The department has teaching assignments in several education programs, including Master Programs, at the Faculty of Medicine. The department has a yearly turnover of around SEK 550 million, out of which about two thirds derive from external funding. IGP has approximately 400 employees, out of which 100 are PhD-students, and there are in total more than 850 affiliated staff members. More information about the department's activities can be found here: www.uu.se/en/staff/department/immunology-genetics-and-pathology

**SciLifeLab** (www.scilifelab.se), established in 2010, is a hub for life science research in Sweden and a collaboration between Swedish universities. SciLifeLab forms an internationally unique infrastructure and research community, bringing together groundbreaking life science technologies with data and AI expertise. Computational methods and artificial intelligence applied to large-scale molecular data are transforming the study of biological systems at all levels, from molecular structures and cellular processes to human health and global ecosystems.  

The successful candidate will be working at the SciLifeLab Data Centre, a central unit within SciLifeLab with responsibility for IT- and data management issues, serving the SciLifeLab’s infrastructure platforms and other SciLifeLab-organised programs and activities, including the national research program for data-driven life sciences (DDLS). We have a national assignment and operate a range of services for life science data and e-infrastructure. We also work with issues about FAIR data and open science, and in close collaboration with major national and international partners.

**Duties**
  

SciLifeLab is now recruiting Data Engineers to integrate AI within SciLifeLab’s ecosystem of data and IT services for data-driven research. The role involves developing and maintaining systems and services for deployment, monitoring, and maintenance of AI models created in research contexts. In addition, it involves developing and maintaining services allowing integration of large language models, foundation models focused on life science data, and narrow models in complex research workflows (for example, through AI agent architectures). The responsibilities include continuously monitoring global AI developments and assessing the relevance to the life science research community.  

You will work in an agile team of data engineers, system developers, data stewards, and community managers building systems with the goal to empower researchers in life science to leverage the latest AI technologies. We are looking for individuals who are passionate about technology and eager to contribute to the future of life science research.  

We offer a dynamic and inspiring work environment. We also value colleagiality, knowledge sharing between teams and developers, and provide opportunities for continuous learning and development.

**Qualifications**
  

Applicants must have relevant education, certificates, or work experience that demonstrate expertise for the role. In addition, the following are required:
  

* Documented several years of experience in training, evaluating, and deploying machine learning models, including deep neural networks and relevant frameworks
* Documented several years of experience in systems development with Python and version control systems, e.g., Git
* Documented experience with using container and cloud technologies such as Docker, Helm, and Kubernetes
* Documented experience in large-scale data management, high-performance computing systems, GPU acceleration, and parallel file systems
* Ability to communicate fluently in English, both spoken and written
**Additional qualifications**
  

* Knowledge of or interest in biomedical research and infrastructure
* Experience working with Scrum or similar agile methodologies
* Experience with AI related frameworks and libraries such as LangChain/Haystack, etc.
* Diligence, initiative, and an interest in supporting Swedish research in artificial intelligence and data-driven life science

Great emphasis will be placed on personal suitability. The applicant must have excellent collaboration skills, initiative, and strong communication abilities, as well as demonstrated active competence progression relevant for this position. As a person, you should be flexible, creative, and service-oriented. You should also be quality-conscious as well as goal- and results-oriented.

**About the employment**  

The employment is a permanent position, probationary period may be applied. Scope of employment 100 %. Starting date as agreed. Placement: Uppsala

**For further information about the position, please contact:** Ola Spjuth, SciLifeLab AI Lead, ola.spjuth@scilifelab.se, Johan Rung, Head of SciLifeLab Data Centre, johan.rung@scilifelab.se

**Please submit your application by 17 April 2026, UFV-PA 2026/866**


Uppsala University is a broad research university with a strong international position. The ultimate goal is to conduct education and research of the highest quality and relevance to make a difference in society. Our most important asset is all of our 7,600 employees and 53,000 students who, with curiosity and commitment, make Uppsala University one of Sweden’s most exciting workplaces. Read more about our benefits and what it is like to work at Uppsala Universityhttps://uu.se/om-uu/jobba-hos-oss/ The position may be subject to security vetting. If security vetting is conducted, the applicant must pass the vetting process to be eligible for employment. Please do not send offers of recruitment or advertising services. Submit your application through Uppsala University's recruitment system.

title: JU söker Systemadministratör med systemansvar tentamen
description:
Högskoleservice är en del av Jönköping University. Med vår stora bredd tillhandahåller vi väsentligen all stödverksamhet. Hos oss får du en stimulerande och dynamisk arbetsmiljö där du träffar många människor och har stora möjligheter att utvecklas.

**Vill du vara en del av en organisation som sätter människan i fokus?** Vid Jönköping University (JU) arbetar vi utifrån vår vision ”People First”, där vi strävar efter att skapa en inkluderande och hållbar framtid för studenter, personal och samhället i stort. Genom ett tillitsbaserat arbetssätt stärker vi vårt samarbete och förmåga att möta framtidens utmaningar.

  

Vill du jobba i ett team där ideér tas tillvara och utveckling är en del av vardagen? Inom avdelningen Utbildningsstöd finns tentamensteamet som arbetar med tentamensprocessen. JU ligger i framkant när det gäller digital tentamen och vi vill nu stärka verksamheten ytterligare och söker därför en systemadministratör med systemansvar.


Som systemadministratör har du det tekniska och strukturella helhetsansvaret för Inspera i organisationen. Du säkerställer att plattformen fungerar stabilt, säkert och effektivt och driver både förvaltning och vidareutveckling. Rollen spänner över operativt, taktiskt och strategiskt arbete, och du är en naturlig länk mellan verksamhet, IT och leverantör.


Du ansvarar för systemkonfiguration, uppdateringar, integrationer, behörighetsstyrning och struktur- och mallhantering. Du ger kvalificerat verksamhetsstöd till administratörer och lärare, utvecklar manualer och utbildningsmaterial samt planerar och genomför utbildningsinsatser. Genom att följa upp användning och statistik identifierar du förbättringsområden och driver utvecklingsarbete kopplat till digital examination.

 **Vi söker dig som har** relevant utbildning inom IT, systemvetenskap eller informationssäkerhet samt erfarenhet av systemadministration i en större organisation. du har även:

* god förståelse för behörighetsstyrning, roll- och identitetshantering
* erfarenhet av integrationer mellan olika verksamhetssystem
* förmåga att arbeta strukturerat med dokumentation, rutiner och processer


För att trivas i rollen är du en strukturerad och noggrann person som har en stark analytisk och lösningsorienterad förmåga. Du är pedagogisk och serviceinriktad samt trivs med att stötta användare i deras dagliga arbete. Du kommunicerar tydligt och förtroendefullt med god förmåga att bygga relationer över hela organisationen. Du driver ditt arbete självständigt men uppskattar samtidigt samarbete och ett prestigelöst teamklimat.

 **Det är meriterande** om du har kunskap om säker digital examination och Safe Exam Browser samt erfarenhet av:

* digitala examinationssystem, gärna Inspera
* utbildningar, workshops eller användarstöd
* digitaliserings- eller utvecklingsprojekt
* högskole- och/eller universitetssektorn.

  

Vi erbjuder en tillsvidareanställning på heltid där provanställning kan komma att tillämpas och tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Vi har flexibel arbetstid och tillämpar kollektivavtal samt individuell lönesättning. Vi sätter stort värde vid att vara en organisation med en mångfald av färdigheter, erfarenheter och förmågor och välkomnar därför sökande från alla bakgrunder. Som anställd är du berättigad till förmåner i enlighet med svenska lagar och avtal. Läs mer om våra villkor och förmåner, exempelvis förmånliga statliga avtal när det gäller löne-, pension- och anställningsvillkor.

  

Välkommen med din ansökan tillsammans med CV och personligt brev, senast 2026-04-08. I denna rekrytering sker löpande urval, så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!

  

Högskoleservice är en del av Jönköping University. Med vår stora bredd tillhandahåller vi väsentligen all stödverksamhet. Hos oss får du en stimulerande och dynamisk arbetsmiljö där du träffar många människor och har stora möjligheter att utvecklas.


Jönköping University är ett modernt lärosäte som kännetecknas av sin internationalisering och entreprenörsanda. Här finns välkvalificerade, uppfinningsrika och företagsamma medarbetare från hela världen. Vi utvecklar ny kunskap och delar kompetens genom hållbara samarbeten med näringsliv, offentlig sektor och andra akademiska institutioner. Vi erbjuder en jämlik och inkluderande arbetsplats och vi välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund. Läs mer om oss på www.ju.se

title: Produktägare med intresse för utveckling
description:
Vill du arbeta för väl fungerande energimarknader, med frågor viktiga för samhället i dag och i framtiden? Då är Energimarknadsinspektionen (Ei) arbetsplatsen för dig. Vi påverkar regelutvecklingen och energiomställningen i både Sverige och Europa, och bidrar till aktiva och medvetna energikunder. Vi har en hög IT-standard, och ett utvecklat digitalt och flexibelt arbetssätt, som gör det möjligt att arbeta på olika platser. Och vi växer. Vi rekryterar inom en rad olika områden – välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss!


Avdelningen Verksamhetsstöd har en myndighetsövergripande roll och fungerar som ett strategiskt och operativt stöd till övriga avdelningar, så att Ei kan fullgöra sina uppdrag och nå sina mål. Vi arbetar för att Ei:s verksamhet ska vara effektiv med god kvalitet. På avdelningen finns sex enheter: ekonomi, HR, säkerhet, IT, kommunikation och chefsekonomfunktionen.


IT-enheten ansvarar för alla teknikrelaterade frågor och leder både utvecklings- och förvaltningsprojekt för att stärka vår digitala infrastruktur.


IT-enhetens uppdrag är att stärka myndighetens effektivitet och stabilitet genom ett modernt och flexibelt IT-stöd. Enheten består av åtta medarbetare och utgör länken mellan verksamheten och våra leverantörer. IT-drift, helpdesk och utveckling är outsourcad. Vi arbetar med moderna verktyg och molnlösningar med stort fokus på att stödja verksamheten. Verksamheten är till stor del digitaliserad idag och vi befinner oss just nu i en spännande förändringsresa där vi bygger en ny, modern IT-arkitektur baserad på molnteknik. Det innebär också att vi arbetar med moderna agila arbetssätt i vår utveckling.


Nu söker vi en produktägare till IT-enheten.

### **Arbetsuppgifter**


Som produktägare hos oss har du ett övergripande ansvar över vissa system och sköter allt ifrån utvecklingsprojekt till vidareutveckling och budget. Du kommer att vara länken mellan verksamheten och IT där du identifierar och prioriterar behov. Vidare driver du projekt i varierande storlek inom områden som systemutveckling, infrastruktur och arbetssätt. Du kan även komma att få delansvar i den generella IT-leveransen från vår driftpartner.


Du arbetar tätt tillsammans med dina kollegor på IT-enheten och bidrar med din kompetens för att lösa de utmaningar vi ställs inför. Som en del av en sammansvetsad IT-enhet arbetar vi flexibelt och delar ansvaret för att skapa de bästa IT-lösningarna. Hos oss får du möjlighet att ta stort eget ansvar och påverka både strategiska beslut och operativt arbete. I vår ständigt utvecklande miljö arbetar vi tillsammans agilt med utvecklare i DevOps-team. Vi söker dig som gillar att ta initiativ och bidra med nytänkande i en bransch som står inför snabba och nödvändiga förändringar. Vi lovar dig en intressant resa att vara med på.

### **Kvalifikationer**


I det här jobbet ska du ha

* relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT alternativt arbetslivserfarenhet som vi bedömer som likvärdig
* erfarenhet av förvaltningsledning, projektledning eller annat arbete inom IT som vi bedömer som relevant för rollen
* god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska.


Vi ser det som meriterande om du har erfarenhet av projektledning eller förvaltningsledning på en större myndighet. Erfarenhet av DevOps eller arbete enligt agila arbetsätt är också meriterande.


Utöver din formella kompetens lägger vi stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper. I den här rollen är det viktigt att du

* har god kommunikations- och samarbetsförmåga
* har helhetssyn, är lyhörd och har ett användarperspektiv
* har god förmåga att självständigt leda förändringsprojekt
* är analytisk och noggrann
* är innovativ, lösningsorienterad och prestigelös.


Detta erbjuder vi På Ei arbetar du med aktuella och samhällsviktiga frågor i en organisation med stor påverkan på omvärlden. Hos oss är din kompetens i fokus, och du får goda möjligheter att utvecklas och ta stort eget ansvar. Vi erbjuder ett modernt, tillitsbaserat och flexibelt arbetssätt. Vi erbjuder också möjligheten att lära, växa och bidra med kunskap. Det kan vara i samarbeten med engagerade kollegor här på Ei eller i olika nätverk. Läs gärna om våra förmåner. Om Ei Energimarknadsinspektionen (Ei) är en expert- och tillsynsmyndighet med uppdrag att arbeta för väl fungerande energimarknader. Vi har tillsyn över och utvecklar spelreglerna på el-, fjärrvärme- och naturgasmarknaderna och arbetar för att trygga samhällets behov av fungerande energidistribution och handel. Vi arbetar också för att stärka kundernas ställning och driver elpriskollen.se – Sveriges enda oberoende jämförelsesajt för elpriser. Ei har även till uppgift att bidra till utvecklingen av marknaderna för el och naturgas inom Norden och EU. Det gör vi bland annat genom att delta i nätverk med övriga europeiska tillsynsmyndigheter. Ei har runt 230 anställda och vi finns i moderna lokaler i Eskilstuna. Praktisk information Välkommen med din ansökan som ska innehålla ansökningsbrev och CV på svenska. Du ansöker genom att klicka på knappen Ansök. Vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning vid tillsvidareanställning. Läs eller se film om vårt intressanta uppdrag och hur det är att jobba på Ei.

title: TEKNIKINFORMATÖR / INFORMATIONSINGENJÖR
description:
Sigma Technology* All open positions
* Open Positions details
**JOB DESCRIPTION**
-------------------

**Är du teknikintresserad och vill ta steget in i ett nytt yrkesområde?**  

Gillar du att skriva, strukturera och förklara saker på ett tydligt sätt?  

Känner du att det är dags för en ny riktning i karriären, en där du får kombinera teknik, kommunikation och analys?


Då kan rollen som teknikinformatör vara helt rätt för dig.


Hos Sigma Technology får du möjligheten att växla in i en ny yrkesroll och utvecklas tillsammans med erfarna kollegor, coachande ledare och en kultur där kunskapsdelning är självklar. Du behöver inte ha arbetat som teknikinformatör tidigare – det viktiga är att du är nyfiken, driven och vill bygga kompetens inom området.

**Om rollen**
Som junior teknikinformatör arbetar du i uppdrag där du får lära dig yrket i praktiken. Du jobbar nära ingenjörer, utvecklare och specialister för att skapa tydlig och strukturerad teknisk information.


Roligt, varierande och lärorikt, perfekt för dig som vill utveckla en ny karriärväg.

**Du kommer bland annat att:*** skriva tekniska instruktioner, guider och användarmanualer
* strukturera och kvalitetssäkra information för olika målgrupper
* samla in information via intervjuer, workshops och systemtest
* lära dig moderna dokumentationsverktyg, standarder och processer
* bidra till att förbättra användarvänlighet och informationsflöden


Du får stort stöd i början och växer successivt in i mer avancerade uppgifter.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

**Vi söker dig som:*** har ett **stort intresse för teknik, system eller produkter**
* vill byta karriär eller utvecklas i en ny riktning
* uttrycker dig väl i skrift på både **svenska och engelska**
* är noggrann, analytisk och gillar struktur
* har lätt för att kommunicera och samarbeta
* är nyfiken och motiverad att lära dig ett nytt yrkesområde
**PREFERRED ADDITIONAL SKILLS, PERSONAL TRAITS, EXPERIENCE**
------------------------------------------------------------

**Meriterande men inte krav:**

* teknisk eftergymnasial utbildning (kan vara kortare utbildning, YH, universitetskurs)
* erfarenhet från industri, IT, support, service, dokumentation eller tekniknära roller
* grundläggande vana av dokumentationsverktyg, XML eller Adobe
* erfarenhet av att skriva i något sammanhang (arbete, utbildning, fritid)


Det viktigaste är din **drivkraft**, din **lärvilja** och ditt **engagemang**.

**WE OFFER**
------------

* en trygg start i yrkesrollen med onboarding
* möjlighet att byta karriär och bygga en långsiktig framtid inom teknikinformation
* varierande uppdrag i olika branscher, i takt med att du blir mer erfaren
* kompetensutveckling genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna kunskapsforum
* flexibla villkor och balans mellan arbete och privatliv
* en inkluderande kultur där vi hjälper varandra och har roligt tillsammans


Hos oss får du växa, utvecklas och forma en ny karriär, med trygghet och stöd hela vägen.

**CONTACT**
-----------
