title: Teamledare Mjukvaruteam
description:
Professional Galaxy är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.


Vi söker nu en Teamledare Mjukvaruteam

**Beskrivning**  

Du kommer att leda ett av teamen som jobbar med utveckling av Gripensystemet, som är ett av världens mest avancerade stridsflygplan. Primärt kommer du att jobba med vidareutveckling, förvaltning och refaktorering av presentations- och registreringssystem i Gripen C/D.


Din roll som teamledare hos oss innebär att koordinera och arbetsleda ett (eller potentiellt två) team av mjukvaruutvecklare/testare som arbetar med enskilda mjukvarukomponenter samt helheten för systemet och dess plats i flygplanet. De arbetsprocesser som används idag inom teamen är i olika grad i behov av modernisering till ett mer agilt arbetssätt.

**Uppdraget innebär primärt:**  

* Planera, följa upp och kommunicera teamarbetet
* Koordinera teamets utvecklingsplan med externa stakeholders
* I samarbete med närmaste chef och teamen fortsätta utveckla arbetssätten än mer åt det agila hållet. Vi har idag en hybrid/blandning som innehåller inslag av Scrum/Kanban
* Coacha teamet i dess agila resa som team och som individer
**Ytterligare uppgifter kan, i mån av tid och kompetens, vara att delta i teamets uppgifter, exempelvis:**  

* Vidareutveckling och anpassning av testramverk
* Kodgranskning
* Optimering och vidareutveckling av designen
* Kravanalys
* Portering, verifiering samt dokumentation av mjukvarufunktioner i samband med byte av mjukvaruplattform (RTOS och drivrutiner)
* Integration och funktionstestning på målplattformen i labb, simulatorer och riggar
**Din profil**  

Vi söker dig som har en passion och förmåga att skapa högpresterande team (team som uppfinner och utvecklar högkvalitativa mjukvarulösningar snabbt och effektivt på ett inkluderande och trivsamt sätt). Du är målinriktad och har ett agilt mindset. Du tar dig gärna an nya utmaningar och har en analytisk ådra. Vi värdesätter att du är produktiv, strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten i ditt arbetssätt. Du har mycket goda sociala egenskaper och kan arbeta såväl självständigt som i grupp.

**Krav**  

* Arbetat med agil utvecklingsmetodik, t.ex. Scrum
* Erfarenhet av teamledning av team som jobbar inom ett eller flera av: utveckling, test och optimering av inbyggda mjukvarusystem
* Erfarenhet av att jobba i mixade datormiljöer (Linux, Unix, Windows)
**Meriterande**  

* Jobbat med agil transformation, t.ex. införande av Scrum (från ”vattenfall”)
* Erfarenhet av projektledning i någon form/skala
* Kunskaper om/intresse av:
* Embedded Linux
* Hur ett RTOS fungerar
* OpenGL / OpenGL ES / bildbehandling / videoströmning
* Skriptprogrammering (exempelvis Python, Bash)
* DevOps
* Atlassians verktygssvit (Jira, Confluence etc.)
* Erfarenhet av Pascal eller ADA
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetskritisk standard (flyg, automotive, medicin)

Då kunden är ett internationellt företag med samarbete både inom och utom landet kräver tjänsten goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.

**Offerera innan:** 2026-04-23 (30 d kvar)  

**Startdatum:** ASAP  

**Slutdatum:** Öppet


Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.


Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande.


Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.


Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: Teknisk Säljare Norden – Bli en del av Kanthal
description:
**"Vi söker talanger – bli en del av VIPAS AB"**
  

  

"Är du en driven IT-professionell som vill utvecklas i en dynamisk konsultmiljö? Bli en del av VIPAS AB och arbeta med projekt som utmanar och inspirerar."

**Vår Verksamhet**


"Vi på VIPAS AB kombinerar teknisk expertis med affärsfokus för att leverera lösningar som verkligen gör skillnad. Genom modern teknik som Java och Python och med vår erfarenhet inom mjukvaruutveckling och DevOps skapar vi innovativa, skalbara lösningar som hjälper våra kunder att nå sina mål."

##### **Vill du kombinera teknik och affär i en internationell miljö?**


Nu söker vi en **Teknisk Säljare för Norden** till **Kanthal** – en global ledare inom industriella högtemperaturlösningar. Här får du möjligheten att arbeta med banbrytande teknik och bidra till några av världens mest avancerade industriprojekt.


Du kommer att arbeta mot marknaderna i **Danmark, Norge och Island** och vara en viktig del i att driva innovation och affärsutveckling inom termiska system.

##### **Din roll**


Som Teknisk Säljare blir du en nyckelperson i Kanthals säljteam, där du i nära samarbete med produktionsenheten i **Hallstahammar** arbetar med både teknisk rådgivning och affärsutveckling.


Du ansvarar för hela säljprocessen – från behovsanalys till affär och uppföljning.

##### **Dina ansvarsområden**

* Bygga och utveckla långsiktiga kundrelationer genom regelbundna kundbesök
* Identifiera kundbehov och ta fram skräddarsydda tekniska lösningar
* Driva nykundsbearbetning och utveckla affärsmöjligheter
* Hålla presentationer, hantera offerter och förhandla avtal
* Ansvara för hela säljcykeln – från första kontakt till avslutad affär
* Följa upp affärer, analysera resultat och bidra till strategiska beslut
* Rapportera marknadsinsikter och bidra till prognosarbete

##### **Vi söker dig som**

* Har en akademisk examen inom **maskinteknik, elektroteknik eller värmeteknik**
* Har minst **5 års erfarenhet** av teknisk försäljning eller liknande roll
* Gärna har erfarenhet från ugnstillverkning eller termisk utrustning
* Trivs i en internationell miljö och har erfarenhet av B2B-försäljning
* Har goda kunskaper i **Office-paketet**
* Talar och skriver **flytande svenska och engelska**  

*(kunskaper i norska/danska är meriterande)*
* Har **B-körkort**

##### **Vem är du?**


Du är en driven och affärsorienterad person som brinner för att skapa värde för kunder. Du är:

* Relationsskapande och kommunikativ
* Självständig och initiativtagande
* Lösningsorienterad och nyfiken
* Strukturerad med starkt resultatfokus
* En lagspelare som trivs i tvärfunktionella samarbeten

##### **Placering & arbetssätt**


Du kan vara baserad i exempelvis **Västerås, Stockholm, Linköping, Göteborg eller Malmö**.

* Hybridarbete är möjligt
* Regelbundna resor till Hallstahammar ingår
* Internationella resor förekommer

##### **Vi erbjuder**

* En spännande roll i en **global och innovativ koncern**
* Möjlighet att arbeta med avancerad teknik i framkant
* Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter – både tekniskt och professionellt
* Ett engagerat team och en dynamisk arbetsmiljö

 **Om Kanthal**


Kanthal är en del av **Alleima** och är världsledande inom industriell värmeteknik och resistansmaterial. Genom innovativa lösningar och nära kundsamarbeten bidrar de till att minska klimatpåverkan i några av världens mest avancerade industriprojekt.


**Låter detta som din nästa utmaning? Ansök redan idag!**

**"Bli en del av vårt framgångsrika team"**

* "På VIPAS AB värdesätter vi drivna och engagerade medarbetare. Vi erbjuder attraktiva villkor och en arbetsmiljö som främjar kompetensutveckling och karriärtillväxt. Hos oss får du arbeta med spännande projekt inom flera branscher och bidra till banbrytande IT-lösningar tillsammans med ett erfarent och innovativt team."

**"Vi vill höra från dig"**  

"Tveka inte – skicka din ansökan till **pooja@vipas.se** och upptäck möjligheterna hos VIPAS AB."

**Behörighet för ansökan :-** "För att kunna ansöka krävs svenskt medborgarskap eller ett giltigt arbetstillstånd för Sverige."

**Din ansökan**


"Intresserade kandidater uppmanas att skicka in CV och personligt brev. Observera att rekryteringen sker löpande, vilket innebär att tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum."

title: Infrastructure Engineer – Hybrid Compute & AVD
description:
*At the Vitrolife Group, we work every day to unlock the full potential of science and technology to reduce the barriers towards building a family. Together we help our customers and their patients to fulfill the dream of having a baby.*

**Build a Stable, Scalable Hybrid Workplace Platform**


Are you curious about platform engineering, automation, and helping deliver stable, predictable infrastructure? We’re looking for an Infrastructure Engineer to support the ongoing operation and improvement of our hybrid compute and End‑User Computing (EUC) platform, spanning on‑prem virtualization and Azure services like AVD.

  

This role is ideal for someone who wants to grow their technical depth in virtualization, Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD), automation, and modern platform engineering practices.

**Your Mission**


As a Infrastructure Engineer, you will support the virtualization and EUC platform, including on‑prem virtualization environments and integrations with Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) and FSLogix.

  

You’ll help maintain standardized configurations, assist with automation tasks, follow established platform patterns, and contribute to smooth day‑to‑day operations. By learning and applying best practices, you help ensure the platform remains stable, secure, and consistent as the business evolves.

  

You will collaborate closely with senior engineers, contributing to documentation, routine maintenance, troubleshooting, and improvements—enabling teams across the organization to work efficiently without unnecessary manual effort.

**What You’ll Do**

* Support the day‑to‑day operation of hybrid compute and EUC platforms.
* Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) and FSLogix configuration, maintenance, and troubleshooting.
* Help maintain and update golden images and standardized VM templates.
* Contribute to Infrastructure as Code efforts using Terraform and Packer under guidance.
* Assist in building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.
* Follow automation‑first and self‑service principles, helping reduce manual work where possible.
* Document processes, update runbooks, and participate in continuous improvement activities.
**What You Bring**

* Foundational knowledge of on‑prem virtualization (Hyper‑V / Azure Local; VMware exposure is a plus).
* Familiarity with Azure Virtual Desktop and FSLogix, or a strong willingness to learn them.
* Knowledge of structuring work in tools like Jira and Confluence.
* An interest in automation, Infrastructure as Code, and platform engineering practices.
* Understanding of or willingness to learn security/governance frameworks (ISO 27001, NIS2, GDPR).
* Ability to follow established designs and standards, with a mindset focused on consistency and simplification.
* Curiosity, reliability, and a desire to grow into more advanced platform responsibilities.
**Bonus Points For**

* Basic scripting skills (PowerShell, Python).
* Understanding of zero‑trust principles or secure DevOps concepts.
* Experience with monitoring tools Azure Monitor or Datadog.
* Interest in knowledge sharing, or team collaboration.
 *Please note that this role is based in Valencia or Gothenburg.*

 *Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so please submit your application as soon as possible.*
company_description: The Vitrolife Group is a world-leading global provider of medical devices and genetic testing services.

title: Senior Infrastructure Specialist – Azure Platform
description:
*At the Vitrolife Group, we work every day to unlock the full potential of science and technology to reduce the barriers towards building a family. Together we help our customers and their patients to fulfill the dream of having a baby.*

**Enable Teams to Build Securely at Scale**


Are you passionate about cloud automation, infrastructure as code, and enabling teams to move fast without compromising governance? We’re looking for a Senior Infrastructure Specialist to join our Azure platform team. Your mission is to make Azure easy, secure, and predictable to consume - through standardized landing zones, reusable modules, and self-service automation.

**Your Mission**


You’ll design and evolve Azure landing zones, subscription architectures, and governance models that enforce security and compliance by default. By building reusable Terraform modules and CI/CD-driven automation, you’ll empower product teams to provision and manage Azure resources independently - within clear guardrails. You’ll work as part of an enabling platform team, collaborating closely with network security and virtualization DevOps functions.


You’ll ensure Azure platforms align with ISO 27001–style control frameworks, translating security and compliance requirements into policy-as-code, RBAC baselines, and automated guardrails. Instead of manual reviews or exception handling, compliance is embedded directly into landing zones and infrastructure modules - making secure deployments the default experience.

**What You’ll Do**

* Design and maintain Azure landing zones, management groups, policies, and RBAC.
* Build and own reusable Terraform modules for Azure services.
* Enable self-service Azure provisioning via CI/CD pipelines.
* Collaborate with network security and virtualization teams on clear interfaces.
* Provide reference architectures and guidance to product teams.
**What You Bring**

* Strong experience with Azure governance, landing zones, and subscription design
* Deep hands-on experience with Terraform and infrastructure automation
* String experience in structuring work in Atlassian tools or equivalent.
* Experience building CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions).
* Proficiency in PowerShell, Bash, Python, or .NET
* Understanding of ISO 27001, NIS2, GDPR, and related frameworks
* Passion for automation, standardization, and platform enablement
 *Please note that this role is based in Valencia or Gothenburg.*

 *Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so please submit your application as soon as possible.*
company_description: The Vitrolife Group is a world-leading global provider of medical devices and genetic testing services.

title: Senior PostgreSQL Database Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.

**About the Role:**  

We are seeking a Senior Database Engineer with strong expertise in PostgreSQL and MongoDB to join a high-performing Data Foundation team. In this role, you will be responsible for managing and optimizing application databases in a cloud-based environment, ensuring performance, scalability, and reliability.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Manage and maintain PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Oracle databases in a cloud environment (AWS)
* Perform database administration tasks, including monitoring, tuning, backup, and recovery
* Handle capacity planning, performance optimization, and database consolidation
* Collaborate with development teams to support SQL development, enhancements, and runtime activities
* Provide technical guidance to project teams on database design and best practices
* Work closely with architects to design and implement scalable database solutions
* Contribute to automation, stability, security, and quality improvements
* Support CI/CD practices and continuous improvement initiatives
* Participate in on-call support rotations when required

**Requirements:**

* Minimum 3+ years of hands-on experience managing PostgreSQL and MongoDB in production environments
* Strong experience working with AWS cloud services
* Advanced proficiency in SQL and relational database concepts
* Experience in query optimization and performance tuning
* Proven ability to work independently and drive technical initiatives
* Experience managing large-scale database environments and implementing changes
* Experience with Oracle databases
* Knowledge of monitoring tools beyond CloudWatch
* Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
* Background in database development
* Experience with automation and scripting
* Fluent in English (written and spoken)
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Proactive and self-driven mindset
* Collaborative team player with a “can-do” attitude
* Passion for technology and continuous learning

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: DevOps/Infra Engineer
description:
#### **Why choose Coody**


At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

**Maximized Compensation.** Typically a +40% salary increase.

**Freedom & Flexibility**. No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.

**Employment Security.** High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.

**Shape the Future.** Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*

 **What you’ll be doing**


As a Senior DevOps/Infra Engineer at Coody, you’ll have the opportunity to work with some of the most inspiring digital entertainment companies in the world, in fields such as Gaming, AR/VR, Music, and other forms of interactive media. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams, including developers, designers, artists, producers, and product managers.


You’ll need to be adaptable and ready to hit the ground running in new environments. We see every challenge as an opportunity to grow. Typically, you’ll work on 1-2 assignments per year for companies in industries that you’re passionate about.

##### **Who you are**


We’re looking for talented engineers who loves to build immersive experiences and bring ideas to life. You thrive in fast-paced environments, enjoy pushing technical boundaries, and want the freedom to work on exciting projects - without the corporate nonsense.

* **5+ years of experience in software development or DevOps/Infrastructure engineering.**
* Experience from modernization and migration of the entire CI/CD infrastructure
* Proven experience designing, building, and optimizing CI/CD pipelines for C#
* Strong skills using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform and Ansible
* A relevant degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Game Development, or similar
* **Based in Sweden** - You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, or permanent residency
* Be able to work from the clients office in central Stockholm about 3 days per week
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)

#### **This is Coody**


We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting,combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.


At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.


Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.


We’re a **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals**, representing more than **14 nationalities**.

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy**. Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice, **explore our Employee Handbook** and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.

##### **How to apply**


Excited to take the next step in your career and work on meaningful client assignments? Apply now, and we’ll be in touch shortly.

title: Scrum Master
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Rollen:**  

* Utveckla och stötta teamets agila arbetssätt utifrån Scrum och närliggande metoder.
* Facilitera planering, uppföljning och förbättringsarbete med fokus på helhet och leveransförmåga.
* Arbeta med hinder, beroenden och flöde i samspel med andra team och funktioner.
* Vara en naturlig länk mellan team, produktledning, arkitektur och omgivande organisation.
* Bidra till en kultur präglad av tillit, transparens och kontinuerligt lärande.
* Vidareutveckla hur vi arbetar med agilt ledarskap i en tekniskt avancerad och reglerad miljö.

  

**Ska-krav:*** 4-8 års erfarenhet
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad erfarenhet under de senaste 5 åren som ScrumMaster, Agile Coach eller motsvarande roll.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i minst ett uppdrag där agila arbetssätt tillämpats i en organisation med minst tre parallella utvecklingsteam eller motsvarande komplexitet.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet från minst två uppdrag där teamet bestått av flera kompetenser såsom utvecklare, arkitekter, drift/DevOps eller test.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att facilitera agila ceremonier och workshops såsom sprintplanering, retrospektiv eller PI-planering i minst två uppdrag.

  

**Meriterande:**  

* ha erfarenhet med att i rollen som ScrumMaster arbeta i tekniskt avancerade miljöer med arkitektur- och plattformsfrågor.


Med tekniskt avancerad miljö avses i detta uppdrag en IT miljö där minst två av följande förutsättningar föreligger:

* Flera parallella utvecklingsteam som arbetar mot gemensam plattform eller arkitektur.
* Plattformskomponenter såsom containerplattform, integrationsplattform eller gemensamma dataplattformar.
* Organisationer där utveckling, drift och säkerhet samverkar i samma leverans.
* Arkitekturfrågor som rör integrationer, API:er, datamodeller eller plattformstjänster.
* Distribuerade system där flera applikationer eller tjänster samverkar.

  

**Sista ansökningdag:** 02-04-2026 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.


Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

**Var god förklara hur du uppfyller alla kraven.**  

  

**Omfattning:** 100%  

**Ort:** Stockholm  

**Period**: 21-04-2026-20-04-2027  

**Sista ansökningdag:** 02-04-2026  

  

*Vi presenterar löpande. Om du är intresserad av ett uppdrag rekommenderar vi att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.*

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

 As a Senior Platform Engineer, you play a critical role in maintaining and evolving our enterprise integration platforms. This role blends engineering and operations, ensuring our platforms are not only reliable today but improved for tomorrow. You will focus heavily on proactive engineering work — such as automating platform operations, improving observability, designing for resilience, and optimizing performance — while also owning key operational responsibilities like lifecycle management, stability assurance, and deep‑dive troubleshooting. Through both preventative work and targeted operational excellence, you will ensure our Kafka, Solace PubSub+, and API Management platforms remain trusted, resilient, and ready for future growth."
   

  





  

  





**Key Responsibilities:**




**Platform Architecture & Infrastructure Leadership**



* Lead the implementation, and optimization of complex platform infrastructure, ensuring high availability, fault tolerance, and compliance with architectural standards.
* Maintain scalable platform ecosystems using advanced cloud capabilities including container orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), serverless computing, and distributed systems.
* Drive continuous evolution of integration platforms to meet emerging business and technology needs.



**Integration Platform Operations & Reliability (Kafka, Solace PubSub+, API Management)**



* Operate, maintain, and enhance enterprise-grade integration platforms, including Apache Kafka, Solace PubSub+, and API management platforms (e.g., Azure API Management).
* Lead platform lifecycle management for at least one of these technologies, covering upgrades, scaling, patching, performance optimization, HA configuration, and automation.
* Own production reliability for integration platforms, ensuring stability, observability, and proactive risk mitigation.
* Troubleshoot complex platform issues, oversee incident resolution, and drive long-term corrective actions.



**Cloud Engineering & Automation**



* Implement advanced cloud services and Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) using technologies such as ARM, Bicep, Terraform, and CI/CD automation.
* Automate large-scale operational processes to reduce manual work, improve reliability, and enforce consistency.
* Identify and implement new cloud-based technologies, optimizing platform performance and resilience.



**Platform Operations, Observability & Reliability Engineering**



* Ensure the stability, health, and performance of enterprise integration platforms across multiple environments.
* Design end-to-end observability through dashboards, monitoring, alerts, and tracing frameworks (OpenTelemetry, Grafana, Splunk, Azure Monitor).
* Lead complex incident and problem management processes, including root cause analysis and long-term corrective action.



**Security, Risk & Compliance**



* Define and enforce platform security best practices across the full platform lifecycle.
* Implement vulnerability management programs, secure configuration baselines, and continuous compliance monitoring.
* Lead risk assessments, security reviews, and ensure compliance with organizational and regulatory standards.



**Performance Optimization & High Availability**



* Fine-tune platform performance including compute, networking, data flow, database interactions, and capacity planning.
* Design and maintain high-availability architectures and advanced failover strategies.
* Lead Disaster Recovery planning, execution, validation, and continuous improvement.



**Technical Leadership & Collaboration**



* Mentor junior and mid-level engineers, providing technical guidance.
* Act as a cross-team technical integrator, collaborating with platform developers, architects, security teams, and other stakeholders.
* Influence platform standards, engineering best practices, and long-term platform strategy.



  

  





**Required Technical Skills:**



* 7+ years in platform engineering, SRE, DevOps, or cloud infrastructure roles.
* Mandatory hands-on experience with at least one enterprise integration platform: Apache Kafka, Solace PubSub+, or API Management (Azure API Management preferred).
* Expert knowledge of cloud platform services (Azure preferred) including containers, serverless, identity, networking, and advanced workload design.
* Strong background in automation, scripting (Python, Bash, PowerShell, or similar), and IaC.
* In-depth knowledge of cloud security, compliance, and governance frameworks.
* Proven experience leading complex platform initiatives and mentoring engineering teams.
* Hands-on experience with observability, reliability engineering, and performance tuning.



  

  





**Key Soft Skills**



* Communicates clearly and effectively across technical and non‑technical audiences.
* Demonstrates leadership, ownership, adaptability, and strong analytical skills.
* Embraces innovation, continuous learning, and improvement.
* Acts collaboratively and fosters a strong engineering culture.



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

***Please note***
 : As our culture and teamwork are very important to us, four days (80%) per week of in-office presence in our office are required.
   

  





 This is a full-time position with placement in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
   

  





  

  





**WHO WE ARE:**
  

 Shaping the future of fashion with people, data, and tech. The fashion and retail industries are going through a transformation, driven by customers' technology and sustainability expectations. At H&M Group, we want to shape the future of fashion and lifestyle by harnessing the power of smart tech and data. With our 74-year history of innovation, we understand the need to collaborate and co-create with engineers and tech specialists around the world to achieve our vision.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT WE OFFER!** 
  

  

 You are joining a unique value-driven culture, a large tech network and community where you can be yourself. Besides the obvious perks such as staff discount card, flexible work life, learning communities, wellness benefits, parental benefits etc. There are endless opportunities to experiment and grow in any direction that you want, and when you grow, we grow. Being a major player gives us countless opportunities to make a real impact and shape the future.

title: DevOps Engineer -  Financial Services
description:
DevOps Engineer - Financial Services
   

  

 Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vi söker nu erfarna DevOps Engineers som vill arbeta nära våra finansiella kunder i Stockholm och bidra till att utveckla, drifta och vidareutveckla moderna applikationer i containerbaserade miljöer med fokus på Kubernetes.
   

  

 I rollen verkar du i gränslandet mellan utveckling, drift och säkerhet och tar ansvar för att skapa stabila, säkra och skalbara lösningar. Du blir en central del i våra kunders team och samarbetar tätt med utvecklare, driftorganisation och verksamhet för att möjliggöra fullt automatiserade och robusta leveransflöden – hela vägen från kod till produktion.
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Samarbeta med utvecklingsteam och applikationsförvaltning för att skapa trygga, effektiva och säkra arbetssätt.
* Utveckla och förbättra automatiserade lanseringsprocesser med fokus på säkerhet i CI/CD-flöden.
* Upprätthålla och stärka kvaliteten i CI/CD pipelines, inklusive automatisering av tester, kodanalyser och säkerhetstester.
* Stödja kundens användare och förvaltning i frågor kopplade till DevOps och drift av applikationer i Kubernetes, både genom felsökning och rådgivning.
* Genomföra förändringar och förbättringar i samråd med kund.
* Delta i tekniska tester och felsökning internt och tillsammans med externa leverantörer.


 Teamet består både av konsulter från CGI och anställda från kunden och tillsammans utvecklar vi arbetsmetoderna för att skapa, leverera och underhålla lösningar. Din kunskap och erfarenhet efterfrågas och kommer göra skillnad i ett verksamhetskritiskt sammanhang.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har en stark teknisk bakgrund och god förståelse för säkerhetsaspekter inom modern utveckling och drift.
   

  

 Du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av IT utveckling och applikationsförvaltning, gärna inom bank och finans.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att designa, implementera och förbättra CI/CD pipelines enligt DevSecOps principer.
* Vana av operativ support, felsökning och incidenthantering i produktionsmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av on premise miljöer och automatisering via Infrastructure as Code.
* Tidigare konsultvana och erfarenhet av samarbete med utvecklare, arkitekter och säkerhetsteam.


 Meriterande kompetenser
   

  

* Kubernetes (drift, felsökning eller utveckling).
* Praktisk erfarenhet av DevOps/DevSecOps och CI/CD verktyg som GitLab CI, Jenkins eller Azure DevOps.
* Erfarenhet av Linux, containerteknik (Docker/OCI) och on prem miljöer som VMware.
* Erfarenhet av reglerade eller säkerhetskritiska miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av hybridmiljöer (on prem + moln), utveckling eller Azure DevOps Server on prem.
* God kommunikativ förmåga på svenska i tal och skrift.


 Som erfaren IT konsult förväntas du kunna kombinera teknisk kompetens med verksamhetsförståelse och förmåga att skapa värde för kunden genom effektiva lösningar. Rollen kräver både självständighet och samarbetsförmåga – från att driva egna uppdrag till att bidra strukturerat i större projektteam. För att trivas i rollen bör du även vara kommunikativ och van vid agila arbetssätt.
   

  

 I rollen krävs det svenskt medborgaskap för säkerhetsklassning samt att du behärskar svenska flytande i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Skicka in din ansökan redan idag! Vi genomför löpande intervjuer och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Har du frågor om rollen? Kontakta gärna Carl Johan Pott på carljohan.pott@cgi.com
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Vice President Engineering, Open Banking
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Visa is seeking a seasoned and forward‑thinking engineering leader to head our Open Banking Technology organization. As open banking rapidly expands, Visa is investing heavily across payments, data, risk solutions, and AI‑driven innovation—and this role is central to shaping that future.
   

  

 In this position, you will lead a 200+ person engineering team distributed across multiple global locations, driving the strategy, delivery, and scale of Visa’s next‑generation Open Banking products. You will play a key role in expanding into new markets, strengthening product quality and security, and accelerating innovation across the portfolio. Partnering closely with product, business, and executive teams, you will help define and deliver the next phase of Visa’s open banking growth journey.
   

  

 As Vice President of Engineering, you will be a key leader in our organization—chartered to infuse next‑generation thinking into product development practices, anticipate and leverage emerging technologies for strategic advantage, and drive innovation initiatives to deliver a highly differentiated product offering to our clients. You will also champion an AI‑first mindset, ensuring that machine learning, large language models, automation, and intelligent developer tooling are deeply embedded into how we design platforms, build products, and operate at global scale.
   

  

**Essential Functions**
* Strategic & Technology Leadership for Open Banking Define the long‑term business and technology strategy for the Open Banking vertical, aligning platform vision, product roadmap, and enterprise objectives.
* End‑to‑End Product & Platform Ownership Lead planning, architecture, and delivery of all Open Banking roadmap commitments, ensuring platforms are highly scalable, secure, and compliant.
* Large‑Scale Engineering Leadership & Talent Development Oversee a global 200+ engineering organization, recruit top leaders, cultivate an AI‑first, high‑performance culture with strong mentoring, coaching, and technical excellence.
* Engineering Excellence, Quality, and Operational Integrity Champion rigorous engineering practices, continuous improvement, and best‑in‑class security, reliability, and compliance across all systems.
* Culture of Accountability, Innovation & Modernization Foster ownership, empowerment, and sustained innovation while driving modernization toward cloud‑native, real‑time, AI‑ready platforms and data foundations.
* AI Strategy, Client Solutions Innovation & LLM Integration Develop and execute an enterprise AI strategy that enhances client solutions (fraud detection, risk insights, personalization). Deliver high‑value ML/LLM use cases—including support automation and intelligent payment workflows.
* Developer Productivity & AI‑Enhanced Engineering Practices Accelerate engineering velocity and quality through adoption of AI‑powered developer tools, intelligent CI/CD, and modern engineering best practices.
* Cloud AI Services & Scalable Platform Architecture Define and govern cloud AI architecture using AWS/GCP/Azure services, vector databases, and real‑time inference systems optimized for scale, cost, and compliance.
* Executive, Board, and Regulatory Representation Represent technology in board‑level discussions, regulatory reviews, and executive forums, articulating strategy, risk posture, and platform outcomes.


**Qualifications**
* 12 or more years of work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 10 years of experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters/ MBA/JD/MD) or at least 8 years of work experience with a PhD
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a STEM field, with advanced coursework or specialization in AI, machine learning, or data driven systems preferred.
* 15+ years of relevant experience, including 10+ years of technical leadership and 10+ years of people management leading large, distributed global engineering teams.
* Proven leadership of 200+ global engineers across multiple time zones and cultures, with experience scaling complex organizations and AI focused teams.
* Expertise in designing and engineering highly available, secure, scalable platforms, including systems that support real time AI/ML workloads and data intensive operations.
* Hands on experience implementing cloud native architectures, modern design patterns, and cloud based AI/ML services (AWS, GCP, Azure).
* Strong command of core engineering best practices, SDLC, and modern DevOps/MLOps practices, including CI/CD, automated testing, model deployment, observability, and drift monitoring.
* Experience leading AI, ML, or LLM driven product development, including model lifecycle management, applied machine learning, and integration of large language models into enterprise platforms.
* Demonstrated ability to drive adoption of innovative and AI enhanced technologies, including developer productivity tools (AI coding assistants, intelligent quality tools, automated pipelines).
* Experience in Agile product development and matrixed organizations, with the ability to drive alignment across engineering, data, AI research, product, and risk stakeholders.
* Proven change management skills, especially in modernizing legacy systems, transitioning to cloud native and AI ready architectures, and transforming engineering organizations with an AI first mindset.
* Ability to establish a highly collaborative, high performance, innovative culture that encourages ownership, experimentation, responsible AI use, and continuous improvement.
* Exceptional analytical reasoning, creativity, and judgment, with the ability to balance strategic thinking and hands on technical depth—especially when navigating complex AI related initiatives.
* Track record of recruiting, growing, and retaining high caliber engineering and AI/ML talent, and building strong leadership pipelines.
* Excellent communication and executive level influence skills, including the ability to simplify complex AI concepts for business, regulatory, and board audiences.
* Success operating in both large global enterprises and high growth environments, with deep knowledge of financial services, payments, and Open Banking strongly preferred. This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Senior cloud-focused Software Engineer
description:
**The job**
 We are looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join us in building our automation and communication platform. We help solve our customers communication needs by automating repetitive tasks in help desk, sales and marketing. We are looking to do a technical shift and move parts of it to kubernetes running on AWS - do you wanna be part of it from the start?
   

  

 Software is the core part of our business at Lime and we work together in a cross-functional team for the engineering teams to get the business input. Together with our Product Owners we use ShapeUp as the agile methodology. We meet regularly and decide what’s essential to the product and how it should evolve.
   

  

 The Engineers at Lime are problem solvers who strive to understand how everything fits together. We do pragmatic solutions to hard problems, a good mix of freedom and responsibility, and most importantly – have a great time at work! We are encouraged to come up with new ideas and experiment a lot. We think long-term and our ambition is to write clean and maintainable code. We take ownership of architecture and automated testing.
   

  

 We always stick to the “best tool for the problem” approach – we listen to industry trends with interest, but evaluate if something is right for us. We do things that matter to our customers and maintain a vision to stay on the right path.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Skills & Requirements**
**Our main stack**
* C#
* Vue
* TypeScript
* MS SQL
* Redis


**Its a real plus if you**
 Have experience with developing and hosting SaaS solutions on AWS, setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps) and previous experience in taking architectural responsibilities in projects
   

  

**Our process**
 We have a lightweight process using the latest Agile techniques with stable feature cycles, no deadlines and an emphasis on understanding the actual problem rather than specifications.
   

  

 Even though we try our best, our tech and processes are far from perfect. That’s why we are looking for like-minded craftspeople to join us on the journey to building a company and product we can be proud of!
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A stable and calm working environment
* Ergonomic workplace equipment
* Continuous education in the latest techs
* Promote personal skill development with various activities
* Commuter friendly offices in Stockholm, Gothenburg and Lund

title: Sr. SW Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Visa’s Technology Organization is a community of problem solvers and innovators reshaping the future of commerce. At Visa Open Banking/Tink, we’re creating the foundations that a new world of finance will be built on. By constantly challenging ourselves to go further and do better, we’re developing the ground-breaking services that businesses will use, to revolutionise the way millions of people manage their money. The world of financial services is changing fast, and we will continue to be at the forefront of it. Through one API, Visa Open Banking/Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe and other global markets.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 If money makes the world go around, we are the ones actually making the money go around! This role is a part of our Payments area and our mission is to allow customers to process payments from any account, at any bank to their own service in a fast and seamless way. Check out reference cases and more information here.
   

  

**What We Offer You**
 As one of the first companies in Europe who initiate payments through open banking, working in Payments often means solving complex problems for which there’s no blueprint! You will be working in an international environment where your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Work with technologies which is mainly Java, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Datadog, REST and much more.
* Develop reliable, scalable, high performance and highly distributed open banking payments products for different markets using your technical expertise.
* Innovate around new features and measure how these features perform, being instrumental in bringing the product vision to life.
* Collaborate and build high-quality Payment products by following best engineering practices.


 We strongly believe in the power of collaboration, both within our team and in partnership with other teams and stakeholders. Working together is the cornerstone of building exceptional teams, delivering outstanding products, and fostering personal growth. It forms the very essence of our work culture and defines how we operate. Actively contribute to product quality improvements, valuable service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
 We are currently seeking a talented individual to join the Payments area. We see that you enjoy working with others and that you have a passion for what you do. You want to better the product you are working on as well as your knowledge and skills.
   

  

**We Would Like You To Have**
* Proven experience working with Java technologies.
* Experience with a fast-paced environment that is product centric.
* Experience from working with DevOps methodologies and tools.
* Experience working with agile methodologies and understand the value of tracking engineering key metrics.
* Collaborate multi-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions.
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, valuable service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads.
* Leverage innovative technologies to build the next generation of Payment Services,


**The Skills You Bring**
* Energy and Experience: A growth mindset that is curious and passionate about technologies and enjoys challenging projects on a global scale
* Challenge the Status Quo: Comfort in pushing the boundaries, ‘hacking’ beyond traditional solutions
* Language Expertise: Expertise in one or more general development technologies like Java, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Datadog, REST and much more.
* Builder: Experience building and deploying modern micro services with quality and scalability.
* Learner: Constant drive to learn new technologies.
* Partnership: Experience collaborating with Product, Developers and Agile/Scrum teams.
* We do not expect that any single candidate would fulfill all of these characteristics. For instance, we have exciting team members who are really focused on building scalable systems but didn’t work with payments technology or web applications before joining Visa.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Bachelors degree OR relevant work experience
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Frontendutvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

* Har god kunskap i Java för backendtjänster, gärna med Apollo och PostgreSQL
* Har god erfarenhet av webbtestverktyg, gärna Mocha, React och WebdriverIO
* Förstår CI-pipelines och infrastrukturverktyg som Bazel och Git
* Har erfarenhet av att skriva och underhålla automatiserade tester
* Har kunskap inom data engineering, gärna med Scala och Scio
* Är bekväm med att arbeta i olika domäner och kodbaser (Android, iOS, C++, webb, Bash, Python m.m.)
* Har en stark förståelse för mjukvaruarkitektur och designprinciper
* Har erfarenhet av att designa skalbara och underhållbara testsystem och infrastrukturer
* Är bekväm med att använda AI-agenter, såsom Claude eller Cursor, för att förbättra utveckling och verktyg

 02-04-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.

title: Software Deployment Lead NB Zone
description:
**Software Deployment Lead Nordic Baltic Zone**
 We are looking for a Software Deployment Lead – Design and Build software – Nordic Baltic Zone to manage the rollout and adoption of our software solutions across the Nordic Baltic region. Schneider Electric has a wide cutting-edge portfolio of software, tools and configurators to support the design, optimization and building processes of our customers and partners.
   

  

 In this role, you will work closely with internal sales teams, design offices, panel builders, system integrators and contractors. You will play a key part in defining, deploying, and training our partners on our software tools within electrical distribution, building systems, and related solutions.
   

  

 This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys working in an international environment, understands design and build processes, and can form a strong overall picture of both technical and business needs. The role is also suitable for early career candidates with strong motivation to learn and grow.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Software Definition & Deployment**
* Manage the rollout of software tools within the Nordic organization.
* Understand the overall software portfolio of Schneider internal and external third-party software and tools and the value they can bring.
* Understand how Schneider can best support the design and build processes of our partners with our software and configurators.
* Actively collect market feedback on software requirements and functionalities.


**Sales & Customer Support**
* Provide hands-on support for channel sales teams, helping them convey the message and bring added value to design offices, panel builders, contractors, and system integrators.
* Act as a subject-matter expert for software related topics.
* Offer pre-sales and post-sales software expertise to internal sales teams.


**Training & Enablement**
* Deliver training to internal and external stakeholders (software, tools/configurators, or process related).
* Prepare and present training materials to different audiences.
* Ensure successful adoption of software tools across markets.


**Required Skills & Experience**
* Ability and motivation to work in an international and Nordic-wide environment.
* Good understanding of design/planning/building processes and related software tools.
* Ability to form a clear overall picture of technical concepts and workflows.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Experience collaborating with internal teams, customers, and external partners.
* Not required to be highly technical but must understand processes and tools well enough to guide others.
* Proficiency in English. Other Nordic languages are considered a bonus.


**Why Schneider Electric?** 
  

  

 At Schneider Electric, we are committed to fostering a vibrant and inclusive work culture where every employee is empowered to thrive. As part of our team, you can expect:
   

  

* Professional Growth: Access to continuous learning opportunities, mentorship programs, and career development resources to nurture your potential and drive your career forward.
* Innovative Environment: Be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking organization that encourages creativity, innovation, and entrepreneurial spirit as we lead the way in digital transformation and sustainability.
* Work-Life Balance: We value your well-being and offer flexible work arrangements, comprehensive wellness programs, and support to help you maintain a healthy work-life balance.
* Global Impact: Contribute to meaningful projects that address global energy challenges and sustainability, making a positive impact on the world while advancing your career.
* Inclusive Community: Join a diverse and inclusive community where your unique perspectives are celebrated, and your voice is heard, fostering an environment of collaboration and belonging.


**Did we get you inspired?**
 Apply now to embark on an exciting career journey with us!
   

  

 Submit your application today as we will fill the position as soon as a suitable candidate is found.
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €36 billion global revenue
   

  

 +13% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 #1 on the Global 100 World’s most sustainable corporations
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Funktionsutvecklare på Saab Dynamics
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
**Din roll**
 Hos Unmanned Systems söker vi dig med några års erfarenhet som vill arbeta med utveckling av autonoma system och programvara. Vi ser att din bakgrund sannolikt finns inom områden som självkörande fordon, robotik eller civila drönartillämpningar.
   

  

 Teknikutvecklingen inom området går snabbt och arbetet präglas av variation och samarbete. Du får möjlighet att arbeta nära andra kompetenser och vara med och utveckla nya funktioner i en miljö där idéer och kunskap delas.
   

  

**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter**
* Utveckla styralgoritmer för autonoma system
* Bidra till systemutveckling i samverkan med andra delar av organisationen
* Delta i workshopar tillsammans med användare för att förstå behov och funktionskrav
* Vidareutveckla simulatorer baserat på tester som genomförts
* Handleda examensarbetare kopplat till datadrivna metoder och nya funktioner


 Tjänsten är placerad i våra helt nya lokaler i Solna.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som är nyfiken och samarbetsinriktad och ser gärna att du:
   

  

* Har intresse för obemannade och autonoma system
* Har erfarenhet av utveckling inom området
* Har förmåga att sätta dig in i teori, exempelvis via forskningsartiklar, och omsätta detta i reglertekniska algoritmer för realtidssystem


 Hos oss är system och mjukvaruutveckling en gemensam insats där olika perspektiv och erfarenheter är viktiga.
   

  

**Meriterande erfarenheter**
* Erfarenhet av drönartillämpningar


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
**Vad du blir en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidra till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26 100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.

title: Software Engineer, AFRY Automotive
description:
**Company Description**
**About AFRY:** 
 AFRY provides engineering, design, digital and advisory services. We are devoted experts in industry, energy and infrastructure sectors, creating impact for generations to come. AFRY has Nordic roots with a global reach.
   

  

 Our shared principles - Results driven, Client Centric, Empowering and Accountable - guide us in how we work, grow and succeed together. Join us and unlock transitions towards a sustainable and resilient society.
   

  

**About AFRY Automotive:** 
 AFRY Automotive, located in the Stockholm region with office in Södertälje/Solna, operates in a truly international environment, collaborating with several sites worldwide, including Brazil, India, and Gothenburg. We support our customers with expertise in design, engineering, and embedded systems, both through in-house projects and on-site with the customer. AFRY Automotive provides consulting services to the automotive industry and genuinely contributes to a more sustainable future by creating smarter and more sustainable vehicles.
   

  

 The automotive industry is undergoing significant transformation, with vehicles increasingly being designed and produced to become more autonomous and electrified. This shift aims to create a sustainable transport sector for the future, and AFRY Automotive is at the heart of this exciting change.
   

  

**Team Culture:** 
 At AFRY Automotive, we believe in fostering a supportive and inclusive team culture where everyone feels valued and heard. Our teams are built on mutual respect, collaboration, and a shared passion for innovation. We encourage open communication and the sharing of ideas, knowing that diverse perspectives lead to better solutions. Our workplace is one where you can grow both professionally and personally, with opportunities for continuous learning and development. We celebrate successes together and support each other through challenges, creating a positive and enjoyable work environment. Laughter and camaraderie are integral parts of our daily work life, making AFRY Automotive not just a place to work, but a place to thrive.
   

  

**Job Description**
*Software Engineer – Contribute to the Future of Sustainable Mobility*
**Your Role with Us**
 As a
 **Software Engineer** 
 , you’ll join a dynamic, cross-functional team where collaboration, knowledge sharing, and continuous learning are at the heart of everything we do. Together, we design and integrate cutting-edge software and systems for
 **electrified powertrains, ADAS, infotainment, and connected vehicles** 
 . You’ll work closely with global customers as well as on projects driven from our own offices—always pushing the boundaries of innovation.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Design, implement, and test embedded software for advanced vehicle systems.
* Work with real-time operating systems (RTOS) and AUTOSAR architecture.
* Integrate software with hardware components and ensure compliance with functional safety standards (ISO 26262).
* Collaborate with experts in electronics, system design, testing, and cybersecurity.
* Engage directly with customers—often leading global OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers—to deliver technical solutions.
* Stay ahead of the curve with emerging technologies like AI, computer vision, and V2X communication.


**Qualifications**
**What We’re Looking For**
* A Bachelor’s degree in engineering, computer science, information systems, or equivalent.
* 5+ years of experience in embedded software development.


**Valuable Experience**
* Programming in C, C++ or Python.
* Driver development in RTOS environments.
* Software development within AUTOSAR.
* Knowledge of SoC components (clocks, PLLs, GPIO, interrupt controllers, peripherals such as SPI, I2C, PCIe, CAN, Ethernet, USB, UFS) and power management.
* Development of embedded multimedia products for Android or network-based systems in graphics, video, camera, display, or computer vision.
* Familiarity with ISO 26262 and functional safety.


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience with multi-processor architectures, ARM processors, cache management, and interrupts.
* Knowledge of virtualization technologies related to CPU and memory management.


**Additional Information**
 At AFRY, you’ll have the opportunity to grow in an environment where technology, structure, and care go hand in hand. We believe in the power of collaboration, continuous learning, and creating solutions that make a real difference – for our clients and for society as a whole.
   

  

 Welcome to submit your application, the deadline is
 **2026-04-26**
 Please note that selection will be ongoing, so apply now as the position may be filled before the deadline.
   

  

 Don't forget to update suitable information for this position in your CV.
   

  

 We only accept applications thrue this system. Apply by clicking the "Apply now" button. Applications by e-mail will not be considered.
   

  

 Contact persons for questions:
   

  

 Hiring manager
   

  

**Johan Krii** 
 , Service Area Manager
   

  

 johan.krii@afry.com
   

  

 We kindly ask not to be contacted by staffing and recruitment agencies or salespeople offering additional job advertisements.
   

  

*At AFRY, we engineer change in everything we do. Change happens when brave ideas come together. When we collaborate, innovate technology, and embrace challenging points of view. That’s how we're making future. We are actively looking for qualified candidates to join our inclusive and diverse teams across the globe. Join us in accelerating the transition towards a sustainable future.*
