title: Teknisk säljare AWS till K3 Nordic
description:
“Det här är en chans att forma både K3 Nordics och våra kunders framtid.
  
  

Rollen ger frihet att ta ansvar, skapa resultat och vara med och bygga nästa fas av vår tillväxt.” - Patrik Lagerträd, affärsområdeschef Cloud, AWS.
  
  

K3 Nordic har i över 30 år hjälpt företag att växa med teknik som möter deras komplexa IT-behov. De erbjuder allt från on-site-tjänster till avancerade molnlösningar och arbetar nära sina kunder för att lösa deras mest komplexa IT-utmaningar. Här möts djup teknisk kompetens och lång erfarenhet i ett prestigelöst team där värme, respekt och samarbete genomsyrar allt. Nu söker bolaget en teknisk säljare som arbetar nära kunder och guidar dem i hur AWS kan användas för att utveckla deras verksamhet.
  
  

Om rollen
  
  

Som teknisk säljare AWS på K3 Nordic omsätter du molnteknik till affärsvärde. Rollen är rådgivande och strategisk. Du sätter dig in i kundens utmaningar, diskuterar lösningar och följer upp tills tekniken verkligen levererar resultat. Det handlar inte om färdiga paket. Det handlar om att förstå, analysera och forma lösningar som fungerar i verkligheten.
  
  

Dagarna är aldrig likadana. Ena dagen går du igenom kundens molnarkitektur tillsammans med kollegor och upptäcker nya möjligheter. Du behöver inte kunna allt själv – expertisen finns alltid nära till hands. Nästa dag visar du hur lösningarna kan skapa trygghet, flexibilitet och verkligt affärsvärde, på ett sätt som beslutsfattare förstår. Rollen är en mix av teknisk förståelse och social kompetens. Du bygger förtroende, guidar kunder och skapar relationer som håller över tid, samtidigt som du växer tillsammans med teamet.
  
  

– “När du hjälper en kund att omvandla teknik till verkligt värde, ser du effekten av vårt arbete på riktigt. Det är det som gör det här jobbet så spännande,” fortsätter Patrik.
  
  

K3 erbjuder
  
  

K3 Nordic erbjuder en arbetsmiljö där teknisk kompetens, kundfokus och kultur står i centrum. Här får du arbeta nära kunder, ta ansvar i dina affärer och vara med och påverka både din egen och bolagets utveckling. Rollen är en chans att växa, påverka och leverera verkligt värde i ett bolag som satsar långsiktigt.
  
  

– “Vi bygger något långsiktigt. Vi värderar individen, vi värderar relationer och vi vill skapa en kultur där alla växer tillsammans. Nu hoppas vi att du vill bli en del av oss,” avslutar Patrik.
  
  

Låter det här som din nästa utmaning? Välkommen med din ansökan.
  
  

**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:**  

* Analysera kundens IT-miljö och identifiera hur molnlösningar kan förbättra prestanda, säkerhet och kostnadseffektivitet.
* Bygga och utveckla långsiktiga relationer med kunder.
* Kommunicera tekniska lösningar på ett tydligt och begripligt sätt.
* Driva processen från första kontakt till avslut och uppföljning.
* Delta i kundmöten och aktiviteter där teknik möter affärsbehov.
* Bidra till hur K3 paketerar och kommunicerar sina molntjänster.


Är du den vi söker?
  
  

För att lyckas i rollen har du erfarenhet av försäljning inom IT eller molntjänster, och har arbetat nära AWS i någon form – via partner, konsultbolag eller kundprojekt. Du är trygg i dialog med både teknik- och affärsbeslutsfattare. Din styrka ligger i att omsätta teknisk kunskap till verkligt affärsvärde.
  
  

Du är kommunikativ, självgående men lagorienterad, drivande och nyfiken. Erfarenhet av molnbaserade lösningar, kostnadsoptimering, säkerhet eller relevant AWS-certifiering är meriterande.
  
  

Information och ansökan
  
  

I denna rekrytering samarbetar K3 Nordic med AxÖ Consulting. För mer information om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Therése Astvald på telefon 079-347 82 21 eller via mejl therese.astvald@axoconsulting.se.
  
  

Urval och intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande, så vi ser gärna att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Stor vikt läggs vid din personlighet.
  
  

AxÖ Consulting AB har lång och gedigen erfarenhet från rekryterings- och konsultbranschen och har arbetat med såväl privat marknad som inom offentlig sektor. För mer information och ansökan besök www.axoconsulting.se. Vi tar tyvärr inte emot ansökningar via brev eller e-post.
  
Varmt välkommen med din ansökan.

title: Senior Data Platform Engineer
description:
About Kambi
  
Kambi Group plc is a leading B2B provider of premium sports betting services to licensed gaming operators. Our services provide an end-to-end solution for operators wanting to launch a standalone Sportsbook or bolster their existing offering with an innovative sports betting product. From front-end user interface to customer intelligence, risk management and odds compiling, all built on our in-house developed software, we strive to deliver the ultimate service and solution to our partners.
  
Our vision is to create the world’s leading sports betting experiences, together with our partners.
  
Purpose
  
Be part of a highly skilled, self-organized engineering team building scalable data and machine-learning infrastructure in the cloud. You’ll help design and evolve event-driven data pipelines and model-serving capabilities that power high-value decision-making across the business, working closely with key stakeholders and quantitative analysts to turn complex data into actionable insights and deliver Player and Risk Management products.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Collaborate with engineers and analysts to design, implement, and maintain cloud-native data and ML services.
  
Build and optimize streaming and batch data workflows with Kafka, dbt/SQL, and related technologies.
  
Develop robust backend components and services in Java/Spring Boot and contribute to model-serving capabilities in Python where appropriate.
  
Contribute to architectural discussions and propose practical solutions in a fast-moving, exploratory environment.
  
Champion best practices in testing, monitoring, and observability to keep data products reliable and secure.
  
  

Desired Skills & Experience
  
(You don’t need to tick every box, strong skills in several areas plus willingness to learn are what matter most.)
  
Java/Spring Boot expertise (core requirement).
  
Proficiency in Python for data and ML workflows.
  
Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or similar) and modern CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins, Argo CD).
  
Familiarity with Kafka and dbt/SQL for streaming and transformations.
  
Experience with Spark or similar distributed processing frameworks is a plus.
  
  

Personal Qualities (Critical for Success)
  
Driven & Self-Motivated – thrives when goals evolve and problems are ambiguous.
  
Communicative & Collaborative – shares ideas openly and builds trust across disciplines.
  
Curious & Adaptive – eager to explore new tools and approaches.
  
Humble & Team-Oriented– values collective achievement in a highly self-organized team.
  
  

Interested in learning more? Please submit your CV and a cover letter — we’d love to hear from you!
  
#wearekambi
  
Kambi's ongoing commitment to Diversity and Inclusion in the workplace
  
If you require any reasonable adjustment during the recruitment process, please notify your recruiter, who will assist you however they can. Diversity and inclusion is at the heart of who we are and who we aim to be. While we are proud of the positive and inclusive company culture we have created, we know we can do so much more. Kambi constantly evolves its Diversity and Inclusion strategy to ensure it becomes an even more inclusive and positive place to work, with the core management team reaffirming its commitment to delivering on employee feedback.
  
Creating an inclusive environment
  
We believe Kambi's greatest strength is the collective talent of our employees. Kambi is committed to ensuring we create an inclusive work environment where everyone can feel valued, thrive and achieve their potential, regardless of who they are or what their background is. We know that it is only by having a balance of different voices, values and opinions that Kambi is able to be the market leader it is today.
  
#wearekambi

title: Outcome Customer Engineer, SaaS Delivery
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 4 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer-facing or support role.
* Experience in deployment planning, orchestration, or change management.
* Experience in programming languages, debugging, or systems design.
* Experience engaging with, presenting to, or influencing technical stakeholders or executive leaders.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience selling technical solutions in one or more of the following: productivity and collaboration solutions, infrastructure modernization, application modernization, data management, data analytics, Cloud AI, networking, migrations, or security.
* Experience with Google Cloud products and differentiation from competition.
* Experience working with product and support teams and using technical proficiencies to resolve blockers and accelerate customer delivery.
* Experience with end user AI Platforms, ISV SaaS solutions, identity management, and security compliance.
* Experience guiding customers through the organizational change and delivery preparation to adopt new, cloud-powered business processes.
* Experience with development or implementation of AI agents in an enterprise environment.

**About the job**
-----------------


The Google Cloud Platform team helps customers transform and build what's next for their business — all with technology built in the cloud. Our products are developed for security, reliability and scalability, running the full stack from infrastructure to applications to devices and hardware. Our teams are dedicated to helping our customers — developers, small and large businesses, educational institutions and government agencies — see the benefits of our technology come to life. As part of an entrepreneurial team in this rapidly growing business, you will play a key role in understanding the needs of our customers and help shape the future of businesses of all sizes use technology to connect with customers, employees and partners.

As a SaaS Outcome Customer Engineer (OCE), you will drive the onboarding and adoption of our Google Cloud SaaS products, clearing blockers and ensuring the customers get the maximum benefit from their investment faster. You will manage and execute the deployment plan, transitioning scoped license agreements into production by providing technical leadership to customers and partners. You will have a direct impact on the velocity and incremental consumption of customer license agreements, leading to accelerated value realization, higher adoption, and future expansion opportunities.  

  

You will blend sales expertise, market knowledge, direct technical engagement, and technical project management to prove the value of Google Cloud SaaS products.


Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Develop and orchestrate a structured, end-to-end deployment plan across customer, professional services, and partner teams, onboarding the implementation team, clearing blockers, managing timelines and progress, and ensuring readiness (e.g., capacity, training).
* Employ coding, debugging, or systems design to resolve technical blockers and accelerate deployment.
* Drive and track progress of the initial and ongoing ramp of license agreements, moving customers from agreement to consumption as quickly as possible.
* Identify expansion opportunities for new license agreements within the account during project execution.
* Drive sustainable product usage to help customers realize value on an ongoing basis and secure future agreement renewals.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Modern Workplace Specialist
description:
Vill du vara med på en spännande resa där du får kombinera teknisk expertis med kundnära arbete? Vårt team Workplace Operations söker nu en senior konsult som trivs i en dynamisk miljö där inte alla svar är givna – men där vi tillsammans hittar lösningarna.


Du kommer att utgå från Stockholm och bli en del av ett engagerat team med ett tiotal drivna kollegor runt om i Sverige. Tillsammans arbetar vi i gränslandet mellan konsultverksamhet och operativ drift – det bästa av två världar. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste tekniken i ett tight team, samtidigt som du har stor påverkan på hur vi utvecklar och levererar våra tjänster.


I denna roll ansvarar du för ett antal tilldelade kunder och fungerar som deras främsta kontaktperson.

* Att hålla regelbundna månadsmöten med kunderna och planera tekniska implementationer

**Vi ser gärna att du har några års erfarenhet inom:**

Det är meriterande om du har certifieringen MD-102 Endpoint Administratör!

title: Infrastructure Specialist – Azure Platform
description:
*At the Vitrolife Group, we work every day to unlock the full potential of science and technology to reduce the barriers towards building a family. Together we help our customers and their patients to fulfill the dream of having a baby.*

**Help Modernize Our Azure Footprint and Enable Teams to Work Smarter**


Are you passionate about automation, infrastructure as code, and helping teams move from manual processes to modern cloudnative practices?  

  

We’re looking for a Infrastructure Specialist to join our Azure platform team.

  

In this role, you’ll help convert legacy infrastructure into automated, standardized offerings—and you’ll spend focused periods embedded inside product teams, helping them adopt Terraform, CI/CD automation, and platform guardrails.

  

If you enjoy learning, collaborating, and solving real technical problems that remove friction for engineering teams, this role is for you.

**Your Mission**


You’ll work alongside Azure engineers to modernize older Azure environments, migrate manual setups to Terraform, and help product teams adopt platform standards. By embedding into teams, you’ll accelerate their transition away from adhoc infrastructure, guiding them toward automated, secure, and repeatable patterns.

  

Your work will make our Azure landscape cleaner, more governed, and easier for teams to build on.

**What You’ll Do**

* Support the modernization of legacy Azure resources into automated, Terraformbased implementations.
* Work directly inside product teams for short periods, helping them adopt modules, pipelines, and landing zone standards.
* Assist in cleaning up old infrastructure: tagging, RBAC, policy alignment, subscription hygiene, and drift reduction.
* Contribute to Terraform modules, documentation, and examples under guidance from senior engineers.
* Help implement and troubleshoot CI/CD workflows using GitHub Actions.
* Participate in creating automated guardrails that keep environments consistent and compliant.
* Collaborate with network security, virtualization, and AVD specialists when product teams need integrated platform capabilities.
**What You Bring**

* Foundational understanding of Azure services and cloud concepts.
* Experience with Terraform or other IaC tools.
* Experience with structuring work in Jira / Confluence or equivalent tools.
* Interest in CI/CD automation (GitHub Actions experience is a plus).
* Basic scripting skills in PowerShell, Bash, Python, or .NET.
* Curiosity about cloud governance, landing zones, and platform engineering practices.
* A desire to learn while owning smaller modernization tasks independently.
* Enjoy collaborating with product teams and making their lives easier.
**Why This Role Matters**


This role is ideal for someone early in their cloud/platform career who wants:

* Hands on experience with real Azure modernization work
* Exposure to platform engineering patterns
* The opportunity to embed into product teams and understand their challenges
* To help create a secure, governed, and automated Azure environment used across the entire company
 *Please note that this role is based in Valencia or Gothenburg.*

 *Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so please submit your application as soon as possible.*
company_description: The Vitrolife Group is a world-leading global provider of medical devices and genetic testing services.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
#### **Why choose Coody**


At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

**Maximized Compensation.** Typically a +40% salary increase.

**Freedom & Flexibility**. No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.

**Employment Security.** High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.

**Shape the Future.** Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.

 *As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*

#### **What you’ll be doing**


As a **Senior Machine Learning Engineer** at Coody, you'll take on fullstack Machine Learning Assignments covering the full spectra from GenAI, developing and training models in production, and building cloud platforms where they can run. Each assignment is 6–24 months and will give you both broadness and deepness from various industries and companies. Often, we play a key role for the project, product and team we work in. You will dive into complex systems, ramping up fast, and delivering real impact from day one. Beyond coding and training models, you’ll influence product direction, and fostering a collaborative, high-trust team culture.

#### **Who you are**


We believe that you have about **4+ years of experience** and a proven track record of delivering real results within Machine Learning. If you’ve got the following, you’re probably a great fit:

* A track-record of building and training ML models in production
* Cloud experience (AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with commonly used data tools (e.g., Spark, Dask, PySpark, Apache Beam)
* Expertise in Python and modern ML/AI libraries (PyTorch/TensorFlow, Transformers, LangChain, LangGraph, Vertex AI)
* Strong understanding of ML infrastructure: deployment, monitoring, debugging, optimization
* A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, or similar
* You must be based in Sweden with a Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)

#### **This is Coody**


We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting,combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.


At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.


Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.


We’re a **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals**, representing more than **14 nationalities**.

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy**. Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice, **explore our Employee Handbook** and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.

title: Visma Enterprise söker Cloud Architect!
description:
*Brinner du för att designa skalbara molnlösningar och vill vara den som sätter teknisk riktning för en plattform som några av Sveriges största företag förlitar sig på? Vill du ha en roll där du både ritar arkitekturen och kavlar upp ärmarna och bygger den? Missa inte chansen att bli en del av Visma Enterprise!*  

  



**Om rollen**  

Vi söker en Cloud Architect som vill ta nästa steg i att forma vår plattform. I rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i att designa och vidareutveckla den infrastruktur som vår produkt har. Du ingår i ett tight plattformsteam på sex personer och ansvarar för de övergripande tekniska besluten – men rollen är inte en renodlad ritbordsroll. Du deltar i det dagliga arbetet, implementerar det du designar och utbildar genom att dela kunskap med dina kollegor längs vägen.  

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter inkluderar bland annat:**  

* Designa och vidareutveckla nätverksarkitektur, trafikflöden och säkerhetsmodeller.
* Äga IAM-struktur och övergripande säkerhetsdesign i vår AWS-miljö.
* Fatta teknikval kring databaser, caching och andra infrastrukturkomponenter med fokus på kostnadseffektivitet och stabilitet.


- Utforma backup- och återställningsstrategier.  

* Utbilda teamet och närliggande utvecklingsteam i best practices.
* Arbeta hands-on i teamets dagliga arbete – du felsöker, bygger och driftar precis som övriga i teamet.

  

**Vem söker vi?**  

Vi tror att du har flera års erfarenhet av att designa och driva molninfrastruktur i produktion. Du har ett tekniskt helhetsperspektiv och trivs med att både stå vid whiteboarden och skriva Terraform. Du är en lagspelare som gärna delar med dig av din kunskap och ser utbildning av kollegor som en naturlig del av din roll. Som person är du kommunikativ, lösningsorienterad och trivs bäst med frihet under ansvar.  

  

En viktig del av rollen är att bygga lösningar och processer som även utvecklingsteamen kan ta del av. Vi arbetar aktivt för att minska klyftan mellan plattform och utveckling, och du blir en nyckelperson i det arbetet.  

  

**Vi tror att du har:**  

* Gedigen erfarenhet av molninfrastruktur i produktion sedan tidigare, företrädesvis AWS.
* Erfarenhet av kontainer-teknologi miljöer och Kubernetes sedan tidigare.
* God förståelse för nätverksdesign, IAM och trafiksäkerhet i molnmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet sedan tidigare av att välja och förvalta databaslösningar med balans mellan kostnad och prestanda.
* Bekväm med att använda AI-agenter som verktyg i det dagliga arbetet.
* Erfarenhet eller intresse av observability (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry eller liknande).
* Erfarenhet eller intresse av CI/CD-design och deployment-strategier.
* Förmåga att kommunicera obehindrat på både svenska och engelska.
 **Meriterande Erfarenhet**  

* Erfarenhet av SaaS-drift med kundspecifika miljöer.
* Kunskap inom compliance-ramverk som ISO 27001 eller GDPR ur ett infrastrukturperspektiv.
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi eller liknande).

  

**Vad erbjuder Visma?**  

Hos oss jobbar du i en av Europas ledande IT-koncerner som kännetecknas av stark framåtanda, prestigelöshet och entreprenörskap. Vi erbjuder en flexibel arbetsmiljö där engagemang skapas genom utmaningar och trygghet. Våra lösningar förenklar vardagen för tusentals människor och bidrar till ett smartare samhälle.  

  

**Övrig information****Placeringsort:** Göteborg, Malmö, Helsingborg, Stockholm, Växjö.

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 7 april 2026 (urval och intervjuer sker löpande).

**Kontaktperson:** Jens Sigvardsson, Development Manager  

E-post:**jens.sigvardsson@visma.com**

 **Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

  

Läs mer om vår Privacy Statement här: https://www.visma.com/privacy

title: Marketing & Communications Manager to Net insight
description:
##### ***Do you want to shape the future with us?***


Net Insight is a leading media technology and network solutions company enabling broadcasters, service providers, and enterprises to deliver high-quality live video, data, and cloud services worldwide.


Headquartered in Stockholm, Net Insight is recognised for innovation in synchronisation, media transport, and cloud-based production workflows. Customers include many of the world’s most prominent broadcasters, telcos, and sports rights holders.


Following a strategic realignment in recent years, the product portfolio has undergone significant modernisation. Net Insight is now building on a strong foundation, continuing its evolution into a more market- and product-led business — with a clear focus on growth, scalability, and commercial impact.

##### **The Opportunity**


We are looking for a Marketing & Communications Manager to join our global marketing team. This role acts as the in-market extension of global marketing—ensuring that brand, messaging, and go-to-market strategies are executed effectively while reflecting local market dynamics and customer needs.


You will play a key role in building awareness, supporting pipeline generation, elevating customer stories, and driving engagement through events, content, and partnerships. This is a highly collaborative role that connects global strategy with market execution to accelerate commercial success.

##### **What You’ll Do**

* Plan and execute integrated marketing activities, including events, campaigns, and customer engagements, to drive awareness and pipeline
* Activate and localize global content and go-to-market initiatives to ensure relevance while maintaining brand consistency
* Coordinate PR activities and media engagement in alignment with global communications
* Develop and amplify customer and partner stories across channels, including case studies, content, and joint initiatives
* Support account-based marketing (ABM) with tailored messaging and assets for strategic regional accounts
* Collaborate cross-functionally with sales, partners, and global teams to ensure effective execution and lead management
* Track performance of campaigns and activities, and share insights to support continuous improvement and global alignment

##### **What You’ll Bring**

* 5+ years of experience in B2B marketing, ideally within tech, media, telecom, or SaaS
* Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple initiatives simultaneously
* Experience in event planning, PR coordination, and social media activation
* Ability to translate global strategies into effective market execution
* Strong content and storytelling capabilities, with attention to brand and messaging
* Familiarity with marketing automation tools such as HubSpot is a plus
* Excellent communication skills in Swedish and English, both written and verbal
* A collaborative mindset and ability to work cross-functionally in a global organisation

##### **Education**

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field

##### **The Impact**


In this role, you will directly contribute to increased market awareness, stronger demand generation, and improved engagement with customers and partners. You will play a key role in ensuring consistent execution of global go-to-market initiatives while bringing valuable market insights back into the organisation.


Your work will help accelerate pipeline growth, strengthen customer relationships, and ensure a continuous flow of high-quality customer stories and market intelligence into global marketing.

**Location**  

Stockholm

**Reports to**  

Chief Marketing Officer

**Contract**  

Permanent, full-time

 **WELCOME TO APPLY**


The position is permanent, full-time employment located in our headquarters in Solna Business Park. We value work-life balance; therefore, you can combine remote work and work from the office.


For more information about the position, please contact recruiting manager Yaya Selva at yaya.selva@netinsight.net.

 **ABOUT NET INSIGHT**

*Net Insight (Nasdaq: NETI B) provides the highest performing, most open video transport and media cloud technology for content providers as the industry standard for flexibility and service across live contribution, distribution and remote production media workflows.*

*For over 25 years, the world’s leading content owners, broadcasters, production companies, service providers and enterprises have trusted Net Insight’s Emmy Award winning Nimbra technology to guarantee media delivery. Today, Net Insight partners with hundreds of customers in over 70 countries to ensure media flows across managed and unmanaged IP networks, and the cloud – from anywhere, to everywhere. It enables customers to get the best from any mix of virtualized, cloud and IP technology and is the only platform to support all the major industry standards, protocols and clouds.*

*Welcome to Net Insight, where* ***innovation****,* ***collaboration****, and* ***trust*** *are the cornerstones of our success. As one team, we are committed to delivering value to our customers, contributing to the growth and success of our company. Together we create a dynamic and positive workplace where everyone is valued, engaged and empowered to make an impact*

title: Cloud Infrastructure & Security Consultant
description:
*– leverera säkra och moderna molnlösningar tillsammans med oss!*


Cloud Infrastructure & Security är ett område där efterfrågan ökar snabbt – och där vi på Fellowmind satsar långsiktigt. Nu söker vi en Cloud Infrastructure & Security Consultant som vill arbeta handson med att bygga, säkra och vidareutveckla våra kunders molnplattformar.


Det här är en roll för dig som gillar leverans, teknik och verklig kundnytta.

**Det här kommer du att göra**
------------------------------


Som Cloud Infrastructure & Security Consultant arbetar du nära våra kunder i deras Azuremiljöer och är en viktig del av våra leveranser inom moln och säkerhet.

##### **Du kommer bland annat att:**

* Implementera och konfigurera Azuremiljöer enligt etablerad arkitektur och best practice
* Arbeta med molnmigreringar, modernisering och vidareutveckling av befintliga miljöer
* Implementera och förbättra säkerhetslösningar inom Azure och Microsoft 365
* Arbeta med identitet, åtkomst, nätverk, backup och övervakning
* Samarbeta tätt med arkitekter och seniora kollegor i större uppdrag
* Vara debiterande i kunduppdrag och bidra till hög kvalitet i leveransen

Du får möjlighet att växa tekniskt, ta mer ansvar över tid och fördjupa dig inom både cloud och security.

**Vem vi tror att du är**
-------------------------

* Erfarenhet som Cloud Consultant, Infrastructure Consultant eller motsvarande
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Microsoft Azure
* Kunskap inom exempelvis:
* Virtuella maskiner, nätverk och lagring i Azure
* Identitet och åtkomst (Microsoft Entra ID)
* Säkerhetsfunktioner i Azure och Microsoft 365
* Ett strukturerat arbetssätt och vilja att följa best practice
* Mycket god svenska och engelska
##### **Meriterande (men inte krav):**

* Erfarenhet av Defender, Sentinel eller arbete med ITsäkerhet
* Microsoftcertifieringar
* Bakgrund från konsultbolag eller kundnära roller
**Varför Fellowmind**
---------------------


Hos oss blir du en del av ett bolag som kombinerar djup kompetens i Microsoftplattformen med en kultur som faktiskt märks i vardagen. Vi är en ledande Microsoftpartner, jobbar strukturerat med cloud readiness, säkerhet och governance – och vi bygger våra lösningar för att hålla över tid.


Våra värderingar – always personal, better together, serious about fun och act with courage – genomsyrar hur vi jobbar, samarbetar och utvecklas tillsammans. Du blir en del av ett bolag som är People at heart, men samtidigt tekniskt ambitiöst.

**Det praktiska:**
------------------


Start: Gärna omgående men vi har givetvis en förståelse att du har en uppsägningstid som vi måste ta hänsyn till.


Omfattning: Heltid, kontorstider, men vi är väldigt flexibla här och utgår från att det ska fungera för alla parter.


Placering: På något av våra kontor i Göteborg, Stockholm eller Malmö.


Rekryteringsprocessen kommer att bestå av telefonintervju, djupintervju, tester/case och referenstagning.

**AI som en del av vardagen och framtiden**
-------------------------------------------


AI är en central del av hur vi skapar värde på Fellowmind. Vi arbetar mot strategin AIfirst, där vi tror på styrkan i att AI kan hjälpa oss att bli bättre - bland annat genom att effektivisera arbetssätt, stötta beslutsfattande och bygga egna lösningar. Det betyder att AI, och inte minst agentic AI har en roll både i våra kunduppdrag och internt. För oss handlar AI om nyfikenhet, lärande och att hela tiden utveckla hur vi jobbar – tillsammans.

**Om Fellowmind**
-----------------


Fellowmind är en europeisk marknadsledare inom digital transformation. Vi kombinerar djup branschkunskap och personlig vägledning med Microsofts molntjänster för hela affärsplattformen, från ERP, molninfrastruktur, dataanalys och AI, till CRM, intranät och Modern Workplace. Fellowmind är ett internationellt bolag med över 2000 medarbetare och har kontor i Nederländerna, Danmark, Finland, Polen och Sverige. Läs mer på www.fellowmind.se

title: Cloud Infrastructure & Security Architect
description:
*– bygg, säkra och forma framtidens molnplattformar tillsammans med oss!*


Cloud Infrastructure & Security är ett område vi satsar på – på riktigt. Våra kunder står inför allt från molnmigrering och modernisering till ökade säkerhetskrav, governance och kostnadskontroll. Därför bygger vi nu vidare vårt erbjudande och söker en Cloud Infrastructure & Security Architect som vill ta en nyckelroll i den satsningen.


Hos oss får du arbeta i gränslandet mellan strategi, arkitektur och leverans, nära både kund och kollegor.


Rollen passar perfekt för dig som kanske känner du att du att du fastnat i din utveckling eller inte får utvecklas med de nyaste teknikerna och känner dig redo att ta mer ansvar och vara en viktig kugge i utveckling av området hos oss på Fellowmind!

**Det här kommer du att göra**
------------------------------


I rollen som Cloud Infrastructure & Security Architect arbetar du med att designa, leda och kvalitetssäkra våra kunders molnplattformar – främst inom Microsoft Azure.

##### **Du kommer bland annat att:**

* Ta fram arkitektur och målbild för Azure-miljöer (landing zones, nätverk, identitet, säkerhet och governance)
* Leda och driva cloud transformationer, migreringar och modernisering till Azure
* Säkerställa security by design enligt Zero Trust-principer och etablerade ramverk som NIS2, CIS och NIST
* Arbeta med governance, compliance och kostnadsstyrning (FinOps) i molnet
* Vara teknisk rådgivare i workshops, arkitekturdialoger och presales
* Fungera som mentor och tekniskt stöd för konsulter inom området
* Vara debiterande i kunduppdrag och bidra till att vidareutveckla vårt erbjudande inom Cloud Infrastructure & Security

Det här är en roll för dig som vill kombinera teknisk spets med ansvar, förtroende och påverkan.

**Vem vi tror att du är**
-------------------------

* Flera års erfarenhet som Cloud Architect, Azure Architect eller senior infrastrukturkonsult
* Djup kompetens inom Microsoft Azure, exempelvis:
* Azure Landing Zones och nätverksarkitektur
* Identitet och åtkomst (Microsoft Entra ID)
* Säkerhet (Defender, Sentinel, Zero Trust)
* Governance, policyer och RBAC
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta kundnära, leda tekniska dialoger och fatta arkitekturella beslut
* Vana att arbeta som konsult i debiterande uppdrag
* Mycket god svenska och engelska
##### **Meriterande (men inte krav):**

* Microsoftcertifieringar inom Azure och/eller Security
* Erfarenhet av FinOps eller större, komplexa Azuremiljöer
**Varför Fellowmind**
---------------------


Hos oss blir du en del av ett bolag som kombinerar djup kompetens i Microsoftplattformen med en kultur som faktiskt märks i vardagen. Vi är en ledande Microsoftpartner, jobbar strukturerat med cloud readiness, säkerhet och governance – och vi bygger våra lösningar för att hålla över tid.
  

Våra värderingar – always personal, better together, serious about fun och act with courage – genomsyrar hur vi jobbar, samarbetar och utvecklas tillsammans. Du blir en del av ett bolag som är People at heart, men samtidigt tekniskt ambitiöst.

**Det praktiska:**
------------------


Start: Gärna omgående men vi har givetvis en förståelse att du har en uppsägningstid som vi måste ta hänsyn till.


Omfattning: Heltid, kontorstider, men vi är väldigt flexibla här och utgår från att det ska fungera för alla parter.


Placering: På något av våra kontor i Göteborg, Stockholm eller Malmö.


Rekryteringsprocessen kommer att bestå av telefonintervju, djupintervju, tester/case och referenstagning.

**AI som en del av vardagen och framtiden**
-------------------------------------------


AI är en central del av hur vi skapar värde på Fellowmind. Vi arbetar mot strategin AIfirst, där vi tror på styrkan i att AI kan hjälpa oss att bli bättre - bland annat genom att effektivisera arbetssätt, stötta beslutsfattande och bygga egna lösningar. Det betyder att AI, och inte minst agentic AI har en roll både i våra kunduppdrag och internt. För oss handlar AI om nyfikenhet, lärande och att hela tiden utveckla hur vi jobbar – tillsammans.

**Om Fellowmind**
-----------------


Fellowmind är en europeisk marknadsledare inom digital transformation. Vi kombinerar djup branschkunskap och personlig vägledning med Microsofts molntjänster för hela affärsplattformen, från ERP, molninfrastruktur, dataanalys och AI, till CRM, intranät och Modern Workplace. Fellowmind är ett internationellt bolag med över 2000 medarbetare och har kontor i Nederländerna, Danmark, Finland, Polen och Sverige. Läs mer på www.fellowmind.se

title: Partner Marketing Manager
description:
**Partner Marketing Manager**
-----------------------------


Join Nimblr as our **Partner Marketing Manager** and play a key role in driving growth through strategic partnerships. In this role you’ll design and execute impactful joint campaigns with MSPs and key partners, bringing our cybersecurity awareness solutions to market through creative, data-driven initiatives. Working closely with sales and product teams, you’ll enable partners with the tools and insights they need to succeed while building strong, lasting relationships. If you enjoy blending strategy, collaboration, and hands-on execution in a fast-growing tech environment, this is your opportunity to make a real impact.


#### **Key Responsibilities️**

* Develop and execute joint marketing programs with MSPs and strategic partners to drive awareness, pipeline, and revenue growth.
* Collaborate with channel account managers to create tailored go-to-market plans and campaigns to reach targets.
* Design and manage co-branded campaigns across digital channels, events, webinars, and content marketing.
* Create partner enablement materials such as playbooks, campaign kits, and sales collateral.
* Coordinate product launches and training initiatives with partners to boost adoption and engagement.
* Track and report on the success of partner marketing activities, providing insights and recommendations for improvement.
* Build strong relationships with partner contacts and internal teams (sales, product, and cyber intelligence) to ensure alignment.

#### **What we are looking for**

* 4+ years of experience in partner marketing, channel marketing, or partner advocacy within a B2B SaaS environment.
* Proven experience working with Managed Service Providers or channel partners.
* Strong understanding of digital marketing, co-marketing, and the MSP ecosystem.
* Excellent communication, relationship management, and project management skills.
* Data-driven mindset with the ability to analyze and optimize campaign performance.
* Fluency in English, written and spoken

 **Nice to have**

* Post-Secondary education in Marketing or a similar field
* Experience working in IT- or cybersecurity
* Fluency in a Nordic language

#### **What We Offer**

* An energetic, ambitious scale-up culture that thrives on thinking fast and big.
* Genuine impact: your initiatives will matter—and your voice will be heard.
* Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
* A culture of growth: continuous opportunities to learn, advance and shape our path. A dynamic, collaborative environment with a strong company culture.


At Nimblr, we believe in taking care of our team. Beyond a competitive salary, we offer a wide range of perks designed to support your well-being, growth, and work-life balance. Enjoy flexibility, Give-Me-A-Break-Day, wellness hours, and the chance to work from one of our offices across Europe


### **Who are we?**


Nimblr has offices and employees across all Nordic countries, as well as in Portugal, the Baltics, Poland, and Vietnam, with a talented team of nearly 70 people. The company is in a fast and exciting growth phase. Nimblr offers a cloud-based platform for cybersecurity training, built on expertise in IT security, e-learning, and behavioural psychology. Our engaging training equips employees with the skills and knowledge needed to strengthen resilience against potential cyber threats.

#### **Apply now**


Does this sound like the challenge you are looking for? Don't miss this opportunity – we look forward to receiving your application.

title: CRM-specialist
description:
### **OM UPPDRAGET**

*Att jobba för Rädda Barnen är att göra skillnad. Som medarbetare på Rädda Barnen vet du att ditt arbete bidrar till att göra världen till en bättre plats för barn och unga, du är omgiven av engagerade kollegor som delar gemensamma värderingar. Hos oss har du förmånen att både utvecklas och utmanas.*


Det centrala medlemsteamet leder arbetet för att Rädda Barnen ska vara en modern folkrörelse för alla som vill engagera sig för barns rättigheter. Teamets uppdrag handlar om att skapa fungerande ramar för medlemskap och engagemang – från struktur och arbetssätt till konkret stöd för lokalföreningar och distrikt. I arbetet ingår också att följa upp medlemsutvecklingen samt att utveckla engagemangsformer, utbildning och politisk mobilisering. Teamet har även ansvar för CRM/Salesforce ur verksamhetsperspektiv, med fokus på hur systemstöd och data möjliggör ett sammanhållet arbete i hela organisationen.


Verksamheten bedrivs i en geografiskt utspridd organisation med hybrid arbetsform. Teamet består av rådgivare och arbetar både strategiskt och operativt i nära samverkan med den regionala verksamhetsutvecklargruppen, lokalföreningar, distrikt samt andra centrala funktioner.

**Ansvarsområden**


CRM-specialisten ansvarar för och driver aktiviteter med målet att öka medlemsantal, underlätta engagemang och minska avhopp. Inom ramen för det arbete som CRM-specialisten driver, säkerställa kvalitet och leverans på övriga organisationen kring system, funktionalitet och det innehåll som krävs för att nå satta mål. I rollen ingår ett nära samarbete med kollegor inom Rädda Barnen och i synnerhet är det viktigt med ett nära samarbete med övriga i teamet Folkrörelse och engagemang.

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter och mål**

* Planerar och arbetar operativt utifrån strategisk verksamhetsplan, mål, budget och KPI:er
* Genomför urval och segmenteringar, bygger medlemsresor.
* Ansvarar för uppföljning och analys av medlemsresor, aktiviteter och kampanjer
* Säkerställer att analyser och insikter delas och används i det fortsatta arbetet
* Bygger och kravställer funktionalitet i CRM-systemet.
* Har ett nära samarbete med givar-/medlemsservice i frågor som rör CRM.
  

Rollen är verksamhetsnära och kombinerar analys, struktur och praktiskt genomförande, med ett tydligt mål att ta organisationen från en ojämn implementering till ett mer sammanhållet, begripligt och hållbart CRM-arbete. Tyngdpunkten ligger på att skapa tydlighet, samsyn och fungerande arbetssätt – snarare än att driva kampanj eller rekryteringsarbete.

### **ÄR DU VÅR NYA KOLLEGA?**

**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du som söker har följande kvalifikationer:**

* Utbildning inom området eller motsvarande erfarenheter inhämtade på andra sätt.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete i CRM i verksamhetsnära roll
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift

**Meriterande erfarenheter är:**

* Salesforce, Marketing Cloud, Experience Cloud
* Kunskap inom Marketing Automation (MA)
* Kunskap inom GDPR
* Erfarenhet av förändringsarbete kopplat till system och arbetssätt
* Erfarenhet av att stötta andra att arbeta med CRM
* Erfarenhet av CRM‑arbete inom ideell medlemsorganisation
* Förståelse för medlemsstyrda organisationer med flera nivåer (lokal, regional, nationell)
* Erfarenhet av att navigera i organisationer med delat ägarskap, komplex styrning och många intressenter.

 **Personliga egenskaper som är viktiga för rollen är:**

**Strukturerad:** Har förmågan att se vad som behöver prioriteras, är effektiv och använder resurserna för att på bästa sätt nå resultat.  

**Resultatorienterad**: Har en förmåga att arbeta utifrån verksamhetens mål och prioriterar åtgärder som ger störst effekt och tar ansvar för att nå målen.  

**Samarbetsorienterad:** Har ett prestigelöst förhållningssätt i sitt samarbete med andra och agerar som en del i teamet och inkluderar andra.  

**Analytisk:** Ser logik och samband i komplex information och har förmågan att se långsiktiga lösningar.


På Rädda Barnen är vi stolta över våra gemensamma värderingar som förenar och vägleder oss i vårt viktiga arbete.

### **LÅTER DET INTRESSANT?**


Rollen är en **visstid till och med 2026-12-31** vid vårt trevliga kontor i **Alvik.** HÄR hittar du information om våra anställningsvillkor. Vid frågor om rollen kontakta gärna rekryterande team lead **My Malmeström-Sobelius**, på my.malmestrom-sobelius@rb.se. Vi ser fram emot att ta del av din ansökan senast **5 april 2026. Vi utför urval löpande, så vänta inte med att söka.**

  

Då vi har en anonymiserad rekryteringsprocess ber vi dig att inte ange personliga uppgifter när du svarar på eventuella urvalsfrågor. Vi använder endast CV och inte personligt brev i ansökan. Tänk även på att inte döpa bifogade filer med personuppgifter. Som en del i vår rekryteringsprocess kan vi komma att använda tester i urvalsarbetet för att säkerställa en mer objektiv och inkluderande rekryteringsprocess.
  

  

Fackliga kontakter:
  

Unionen: Edvin Arnby Machata, edvin.arnby-machata@rb.se  

Akademikerföreningen: Anna-Frida Eriksson, anna-frida.eriksson@rb.se

 *Rädda Barnen ska spegla den jämlikhet vi arbetar för i samhället och eftersträvar mångfald och olikheter. Därför välkomnar vi en bredd av kompetenser, perspektiv och erfarenheter i den här rekryteringen. Rädda Barnen är noga med att vara en säker arbetsplats för barn och vuxna och ber om utdrag ur belastningsregistret i samband med anställning. Slutkandidater kommer även att screenas mot EU:s sanktionslista. Alla medarbetare förväntas följa våra viktiga riktlinjer som handlar om trygghet och säkerhet för alla, samt våra värderingar och etiska riktlinjer. Läs mer om dessa viktiga riktlinjer,* *HÄR.*

title: Solutions Leader
description:
Insight Enterprises, Inc. is a Fortune 500 Solutions Integrator helping organizations accelerate transformation by unlocking the power of people and technology. We architect, build and manage solutions for complex IT environments to deliver outcomes that contribute to our clients’ success. Our portfolio of digital transformation services includes deep expertise in cloud, data, AI, cybersecurity and intelligent edge. These services, augmented by Insight’s longstanding relationships with 6,000+ technology partners across the globe, enable us to deliver the right technical solutions quickly and effectively. We’re rated as a Great Place to Work, a Forbes Best Employer for Diversity and a Forbes World’s Top Female-Friendly Company.

  

We are seeking highly motivated and experienced solution sales individuals to join our Solutions business as Solution Leaders. In this role, you will bring Insight’s extensive Solutions portfolio to life for our clients, using your wealth of experience and expertise to exceed expectations and drive high levels of ROI and satisfaction. This future-facing role is critical to Insight's growth, as you will drive revenue by providing and driving the adoption of complex and customized solutions to our clients.

 **What to expect**


Reporting to the Director of Solutions, you will oversee the Solution sales process for clients, from initial ideation to final implementation, while ensuring that solutions are delivered on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.

**To deliver the best outcomes for our clients, you will:**

* Form a deep understanding of the client’s existing technology roadmap and landscape, along with their industry, challenges, and opportunities.
* Lead cross-functional teams to design, propose, and implement solutions that meet or exceed expectations through leveraging the latest technologies, and ultimately seamlessly integrating these into the clients environment.
* Collaborate with leaders, the wider sales team, partners, and other internal stakeholders to ensure alignment and coordination of sales strategies, along with governance activities.

**What success looks like:**

* You are a key part of driving growth within the Solutions business, by developing and implementing strategic sales plans to achieve revenue targets, maintaining accurate forecasts, milestones, qualifications, and pipeline.
* You identify new business opportunities within your portfolio of accounts, develop and maintain the account plan for services growth to engage with potential clients and drive these new business opportunities.
* Relationships are key; you’ll form strong relationships with clients and identify the key decision-makers and influencers within their organisation. You will also maintain strong connections with Insight partners, vendors, and internal teams.
* You collaborate across Insight and know when to pull in the right people to ensure alignment on Solution sales strategies.
* You master the Land, Adopt, Expand, and Renew model to determine client qualification, ensuring that Insight drives year-on-year growth within accounts.
* You qualify deals and use the appropriate risk assessment models, to ensure client qualification considers client, commercial and technical risks.

 **Does this sound like you?**

* A strategic thinker with a passion for driving profitable solutions revenue and a track record of success in exceeding sales targets, and managing complex deals and multiple stakeholders.
* A confident and proactive communicator and influencer both in Swedish and English; both with internal teammates and within client organisations at all levels.
* Ability to identify and understand client pain points and motivations, taking a proactive approach to address these through mapping potential technology solutions.
* Passionate about how technology can drive business value and customer transformation, with a primary focus on the Microsoft ecosystem. Demonstrates strong interest and understanding across key Microsoft solution areas, including cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure, Data & AI, Microsoft Copilot, Cybersecurity & Compliance through Microsoft Defender and Microsoft Purview, as well as Adoption & Change and Optimisation & Governance, combined with a strong desire for continuous professional development.

  

If the answer is yes, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity. We are passionate about the opportunities that lie ahead as we continue our transformation into the leading Solutions Integrator. With talented and driven Solutions Leaders in place, we can bring our focus on innovation, collaboration, and customer-centricity to life for our clients and transform their organisations with leading technology.
company_description: Insight is a leader in providing smart, cutting-edge technology solutions for global organizations of all sizes.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description:
**Job Description**

**​WHAT YOU’LL DO​**
  

 Do what you love and help us drive change! As a Senior Data Scientist at H&M Group, you’ll turn vast amounts of data into meaningful insights and solutions that make an impact on a global scale. You’ll collaborate closely with business and tech teams to solve complex problems using advanced analytics, modelling, and machine learning.​
   

  




* Contribute to and potentially lead the short- and long-term data science agenda within a product team


* Collaborate with machine learning and data engineers to design, build, and deploy machine learning products that scale globally


* Help colleagues and stakeholders understand algorithms and decisions made by AI systems


* Explore large, complex data assets to uncover insights that drive business value


* Develop tools and frameworks for common machine learning needs like model traceability, feature reuse, and A/B testing



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH​**




 You’ll join a collaborative, cross-functional team of highly skilled engineers, data scientists, and business stakeholders. Together, you’ll build innovative AI solutions that support H&M Group’s transformation and create value for millions of customers worldwide.
   

  





 ​
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE​**




*We are looking for people with…​*



* ​ A degree in applied mathematics, statistics, physics, engineering, or a similar field (e.g., machine learning) and a strong desire to keep learning


* Solid foundational knowledge of machine learning and statistics


* Ability to independently implement algorithms and models, contributing to production-level code


* Background in agile environments with strong team collaboration and data-driven development


* Experience working with time series data is beneficial


* Proven ability to work with production-level machine learning systems and solid understanding of optimization problems, including related libraries or solvers



*And people who are…​*



* Comfortable working with cloud platforms, like Google Cloud


* Hands-on and eager to understand business needs and turn them into technical solutions


* Always looking for ways to automate and simplify, taking initiative to improve products


* Strong team players who are result-oriented and driven to challenge and innovate



  

  





**WHO WE ARE​**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





 ​
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE ​**
  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​
   

  




* We offer all our employee’s attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a 25% staff discount usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.


* ​30 days holiday


* We offer a collective agreement which includes pension and life insurance


* H&M Incentive Program


* Wellness benefit 4000kr/year


* Beniflex Benefits Portal


* Community with activities



  

  





**JOIN US​**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





 \*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​

title: Data Scientist
description:
Data Scientist
 



  





 Business-Focused | Marketing Analytics | High Ownership | Scale-Up Environment
 



  





 We’re partnering with a fast-growing, data-driven company that is expanding its Data Science team. This is an opportunity to join a highly collaborative environment where data plays a central role in shaping commercial and marketing decisions.
 



  





 This is not an ML engineering role.
 



  





 We’re looking for a
 **business-oriented Data Scientist** 
 who thrives on solving real commercial problems - someone who can translate ambiguity into structure and turn data into measurable value.
 



  





 Why this role is exciting?
 


* You’ll work directly with senior stakeholders and marketing teams.
* You’ll build new capabilities in an area that’s still largely untapped.
* You won’t be siloed in an isolated data team - you’ll operate as a strategic partner.
* You’ll have the autonomy to define problems, shape solutions, and influence outcomes.
* You’ll join a lean, collaborative environment where impact matters more than hierarchy.



  





 If you enjoy working hands-on, owning problems end-to-end, and seeing your work drive commercial outcomes - this will suit you well.
 



  





 What you’ll be doing?
 


* Translating business and marketing challenges into structured data science problems
* Defining success metrics and measurable impact
* Designing and executing analytical approaches (segmentation, prediction, experimentation, optimisation)
* Working closely with commercial and marketing stakeholders
* Communicating insights clearly to non-technical audiences
* Contributing to both new marketing initiatives and existing ML use cases



  





 You’ll be treated as a thought partner - not just someone who “builds models.”
 



  





 What we’re looking for?
 



 Core Profile
 


* 2+ years of experience in a Data Science or advanced analytics role
* Strong foundation in mathematics, statistics, or a related quantitative field (Master’s preferred)
* Confident in Python for data analysis and modelling
* Experience turning vague business questions into structured analytical solutions
* Ability to clearly explain complex ideas to non-technical stakeholders



  





 You’ll likely thrive here if:
 


* You enjoy smaller, agile environments over large corporate silos
* You’ve worked close to marketing, growth, or commercial teams
* You care about measurable business impact - not just model accuracy
* You take initiative rather than waiting for detailed instructions
* You’re comfortable operating with ambiguity
* You prefer ownership over rigid structure



  





 Bonus Points for
 


* Marketing analytics or performance marketing exposure
* Experience measuring campaign performance or customer segmentation
* A/B testing and experimentation experience
* Cloud familiarity
* Experience working in companies where Data Science is embedded in business teams rather than isolated



  





 This role is probably not for you if:
 


* You’re primarily an ML engineer focused on deployment, infrastructure, or MLOps
* You prefer highly defined tickets over open-ended problem solving
* You’ve worked exclusively in research or academic environments without commercial exposure



  





 The Team & Environment:
 



 You’ll join an established Data Science function working alongside experienced colleagues. The team balances traditional ML use cases with new marketing-focused initiatives - and this hire is key to scaling that capability.
 



  





 Data Science here is collaborative, commercially focused, and less onboarding-heavy than large enterprise environments. You’ll be contributing meaningfully from early on.
 



  





 The Opportunity...
 



 This is a chance to step into a role where:
 


* Your thinking matters as much as your technical skills
* You influence strategy, not just implementation
* You help build new data capabilities from the ground up
* You grow alongside a scaling, ambitious team



  





 If you’re a problem solver who enjoys bridging business and data - we’d love to speak with you.

title: Head of Customer Success
description:
**Oneflow is a rapidly growing tech scale-up located in the heart of Stockholm. We have created a platform that automates the entire contract process from start to finish, all in one place. Turning clunky, static contracts into customer-oriented, digital contracts that feel like magic.** 




  





**Who you are** 




  





 You’re a commercially minded Customer Success leader with experience guiding teams across multiple markets. You know how to lead through team leads, balancing strategic direction with a hands-on understanding of the day-to-day realities of Customer Success.
 



  





 You thrive in an international environment and have worked with customers of varying sizes and complexity, including enterprise-level organizations. You understand how Customer Success, Sales, Marketing, Partnerships, and RevOps work together across the customer lifecycle—and you actively collaborate across functions to drive retention, expansion, and long-term customer value.
 



  





 You’re neither a purely top-down executive nor just an operational individual contributor. Instead, you shine in the space in between: close enough to the details to make smart decisions, and senior enough to set direction, drive change, and develop leaders.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* Lead and develop the Customer Success organization across multiple markets through team leads, ensuring strong performance, alignment, and continuous growth
* Own and drive key Customer Success outcomes such as retention, net revenue retention, customer satisfaction, and long-term customer value
* Partner closely with Sales, Marketing, Partnerships, and RevOps to optimize the end-to-end customer lifecycle, including handovers, renewals, and expansion
* Build and evolve scalable Customer Success processes, structures, and ways of working that support both local markets and global customers
* Act as a senior point of escalation and engagement for strategic and enterprise customers, while staying close enough to the operation to drive meaningful change



  





**Skills and requirements** 




  




* 7+ years of experience in Customer Success, Account Management, or a similar commercial role within SaaS or technology-driven companies
* Proven experience leading and developing managers or team leads, preferably in a multi-market or international setup
* Strong commercial acumen with experience managing enterprise customers and complex, multi-stakeholder organizations
* Demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with Sales, Marketing, Partnerships, and RevOps to drive retention and expansion
* A hands-on, change-oriented mindset with the ability to combine operational understanding with strategic leadership



  





**Why you’ll love working at Oneflow:** 




  




* Fast-growing tech scale-up with a fantastic culture (eNPS above industry average)
* Work in a team with clear goals and a shared vision
* Wellness allowance, insurance, and pension plan included
* Modern office and fun team activities to keep you connected
* Collaborate with inspiring colleagues in an open, inclusive environment



  





**Come work with us** 




  





 We value gender equality and diversity in organisation, so we strive for a team that reflects the diversity in today's society. At Oneflow we currently have 34 nationalities and are proud of an extremely diverse workplace. Our recruitment is based on competence.
 



  





 The recruitment process begins with an interview with Aleksandra from Talent Acquisition. Next, you will complete a personality and logic test, followed by an interview with the hiring manager, an assignment, and participation in a case interview.
 



  





**We can’t wait to meet you! 🎉** 




  





 Visit our website for more information about our product and Oneflow. Visit our career page for more information about our culture and future colleagues. 💜
 



  





**One more thing before you hit “Apply”** 




  





 We really want to get to know you and not the AI version of you. No need to overthink it or try to sound a certain way. We care more about your thoughts and who you are. Speak from the heart and we’re listening!💫

title: Digital Workplace Transformation Leader - Sweden
description:
**Role** 
 – Industry Principal /Digital Workplace Transformation Leader
   

  

**Skill** 
 - Digital Workplace Transformation
   

  

**Location** 
 – Sweden
   

  

**Compensation** 
 – Competitive (including bonus)
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Digital Workplace Advisory Group is a strategic practice unit established to help orchestrate the breadth of Infosys digital workplace service offerings across the technology service-lines, complemented with experience design, digital adoption & learning services to deliver an integrated and human-centric experience to our enterprise clients in their journey to the future of work. This team is responsible for driving integrated Go To Market incubating industry solutions, Managing Analyst Briefings & provide technology advisory services to Client execs in their digital transformation of workplace.
   

  

**Your role**
 In the role of Industry Principal, you would be part of team of digital workplace transformation leaders and evangelists on future of work who specialize in leading organizations through digital workplace transformation by leveraging emerging workplace technologies. You will work on customer engagements to define, sell and guide customers on initiatives in the areas of digital workplace strategy, employee experience transformation, workplace modernization, organizational change and smart workspace design.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
* Provide technology advisory services to Client Executives on their digital workplace strategy & roadmap.
* Lead large digital workplace transformation programs as a trusted Technology advisor to clients working with multiple client stakeholders, business groups and service providers.
* Provide best-fit architectural solutions, technology consultation, assist in defining scope and sizing of work, create technology differentiation to ensure high quality technical solutions and thought leadership for digital workplace.
* Manage a range of stakeholders and subject matter experts to ensure alignment to business needs.
* Liase with various integration forums and internal governance committees
* Strategic and Large deal advisory – Lead integrated solutions for large proposals or client programs (digital workplace).
* Program manage large consulting/advisory engagements for digital workplace.


**Required - Mandatory:**
* Experience in IT .
* A Digital Workplace Technology strategist and evangelist who specializes in leading organizations through digital transformation by leveraging emerging technology and articulating the strategy to deliver new products, business paradigms and ecosystem partnerships that enable growth and increase operational efficiency.
* Well versed with Industry Standards, OEM Standards, and Service Offerings in the “Digital Workplace” domain to be able to provide solution advisory and transformation strategy.
* Experience across the breadth of Digital Workplace Technology domains in Three or more of the below service offering domains –


 Employee Experience, Modern Workplace and Endpoint Management, Digital Collaboration (Team Collaboration , Cloud Voice & Meeting & Collaborative Apps ), DaaS & Device lifecycle Management (Modern device and endpoint management, Cloud Virtual Desktops, Device Analytics & experience management ), Connected Workspaces ( IoT, AR/VR ), Workplace Security), Digital Adoption & Change Management ( incl. Workplace Analytics), Service desk & experience, ( incl. Conversational AI & Automation).
   

  

**Personal**
 Besides the professional qualifications of the candidates, we place great importance in addition to various forms personality profile. These include:
   

  

* Excellent in Verbal, written communication.
* Strong stakeholder management and negotiation skills to be able to influence or manage difficult stakeholders both internal and external – partners, service providers and customers.
* Willingness and flexibility to learn new technologies (learnability, having a pulse on industry trends), scale up quickly and adapt to different roles as the situation demands.


**Why Infosys**
 Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 56 countries to navigate their digital transformation & an equal opportunity employer. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
   

  

 Visit www.infosys.com to see how Infosys (NYSE: INFY) can help your enterprise navigate your next.
   

  

 All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**Introducing evroc**
 At evroc, we are building a secure, sovereign, and sustainable hyperscale cloud to reimagine the digital future of Europe. By joining our company, you have an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development of next-generation cloud services. We are seeking intellectually curious and highly motivated team members who are ready to embrace the thrilling challenge of building the first European owned hyperscale cloud.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Job type:** 
 Permanent position
   

  

**Join the Pioneers**
 At the outset of our journey, we're not just building software; we're laying the groundwork for our technology solutions and how we’ll operate as an engineering team. As we expand, the organisation of our teams and the specialisation into product areas hinge on these formative decisions. Coming on board now means you're not just coding — you're contributing directly to how we set ourselves up for success, how we tackle challenges, and how we define our engineering culture. This isn’t just a job; it's a chance to leave an indelible mark on our technology, teams, culture, and ethos.
   

  

**What You'll Tackle**
* Build and design the foundational infrastructure for other engineering teams and customers to build on. Our team is responsible for automating the provisioning and setup of evroc's platform to ensure speed, reliability, and scalability.
* Create Infrastructure-as-Code deployments and large scale cluster configurations for managing our networking, storage, and compute resources.
* Seamlessly integrate and upkeep open-source components within our evolving tech stack.
* Team up with fellow engineers to craft tailored solutions meeting our unique challenges.
* Forge and refine tools that power team efficiency - this includes CI/CD, local development setups, build toolchains, and essential infrastructure.
* Plot the roadmap for software component development, aligning with team priorities and vision.
* Lead the charge in defining and achieving our technical benchmarks.


**Skills We Value**
* Proficiency in distributed systems and Linux systems engineering.
* Strong understanding of various infrastructure technologies, including virtualization, containerization, and cloud computing.
* Coding in programming languages such as (but not exclusively) Golang or Rust.
* Experience in building and enhancing compute, storage, and data platforms with exposure to open source products like Kubernetes, Knative, Ceph, Rook and the like.
* Hands-on with infrastructure-as-code tools and automation, such as Terraform, Ansible, or Helm.
* Familiarity with software build processes and secure supply systems, like OpenSSF.
* Strong problem-solving and communication skills to effectively address complex platform engineering challenges.


 We offer a competitive salary and an equity package to attract the best. Whether it’s the cosmopolitan allure of London, the vibrant Stockholm, or the Mediterranean charm of Sophia Antipolis, you’re poised for an inspiring work environment and a captivating local culture!
   

  

 At evroc, diversity is our strength. We champion an inclusive environment where every background - ethnicity, age, gender identity, beliefs, and culture - is celebrated.
   

  

 Applicants must possess a valid work permit.

title: AI Engineer
description:
Every engineer at Avy works with AI daily. Our stack includes an in-house agentic framework, RAG architecture, vector search, and LLM orchestration in production. We expect you to be fluent with AI-assisted development tools and genuinely curious about pushing AI capabilities further — whether that's improving Davy's accuracy, building new AI-powered features, or rethinking how we architect our AI platform.
 



  





 If you've been experimenting with LLMs, building with retrieval-augmented generation, or thinking about how to ship AI reliably at scale — we want to talk.
 



  





**About us** 




 We are
 **B2B2C modular SaaS platform, powered by AI.** 
 Across ~40 different modules we are heavily relying on various integrations (payments, smart-locks, marketplaces) and AI. As the leading Tenant Experience platform in the Nordics, we reach more than 450,000 households - approximately 20% of all rental tenants in Sweden.
 



  





 Having proven product-market fit in the Nordics we are now embarking on an exciting growth journey and as we are evolving our Product & Technology organization we are looking for experienced
 **AI Software Engineer** 
 who wants to help bring our platform to the next level.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 As a
 **AI Software Engineer** 
 at Avy, you will play a crucial role in delivering our AI solutions to our customers and end-users.
 



 Our teams work in a cross-functional, product-led, agile environment where tech, product and design collaborate closely.
 



  





 This role requires deep technical expertise and problem-solving mindset.
 



  





 In this role you would:
 


* Evolve our custom agentic framework — designing cognitive architectures for multi-step tenant support workflows, tool use, and context management
* Improve and scale our RAG pipeline — chunking strategies, embedding model selection, retrieval quality, re-ranking
* Work with our vector database (Qdrant) and LLM integrations to improve accuracy, latency, and cost
* Build evaluation and observability systems — measuring AI quality, detecting regressions, monitoring error rates in production
* Explore and integrate new AI capabilities across the platform — from intelligent insights and anomaly detection to predictive features on top of our data platform
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to decide where AI adds real value vs. where simpler solutions win



  





**Qualifications** 



* Production experience building AI/ML systems — not just notebooks, but deployed, monitored, maintained systems
* Strong understanding of LLM application patterns: RAG, agentic architectures, prompt engineering, evaluation
* Strong communication skills in English (Swedish is a plus but not required)
* Strong production experience with Go/Golang — this is our primary backend language
* Solid understanding of distributed systems, microservice architectures, and event-driven design
* Experience with cloud platforms (GCP preferred, AWS/Azure also relevant) and containerized deployments
* Comfort with relational databases (PostgreSQL), caching (Redis), and messaging systems (Pub/Sub, Kafka, or similar)



  





**What we offer:** 



* Opportunity to shape the technical direction of a fast-growing prop-tech scale-up
* Collaborative and innovative work environment
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Professional development opportunities
* Chance to work on cutting-edge technologies and solve complex problems



  





**Location (on-site):** 




 Stockholm, Sweden
 



  





*For this position, Avy is working with internal recruitment resources and is not accepting external agencies. Those kind of requests will not be answered.* 




  





*\*\*EU Candidates Only - No Relocation Provided at the moment\*\**

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
Key Responsibilities
 


* **End-to-End Migration:** 
 Lead and execute complex data migration projects from on-premise or legacy cloud systems to Snowflake.
* **Advanced Feature Implementation:** 
 Architect and implement
 **Snowflake Cortex AI** 
 for LLM-based analytics and use
 **Snowflake OpenFlow** 
 (and related workflow orchestration) to streamline data pipelines.
* **Data Sharing & Ecosystems:** 
 Design and manage secure
 **Data Sharing** 
 protocols to facilitate seamless collaboration with internal partners and external financial entities.
* **ETL/ELT Architecture:** 
 Build robust, automated pipelines using tools like dbt, Matillion, or Airflow, ensuring high performance and data integrity.
* **Banking Domain Excellence:** 
 Apply deep understanding of financial data structures, regulatory compliance (GDPR, Basel III), and security protocols.
* **Optimization:** 
 Perform hands-on tuning of Snowflake warehouses, clustering keys, and materialized views to manage costs and performance.



  





 Technical Skills & Qualifications
 


* **Snowflake Expertise:** 
 Minimum of
 **5 years** 
 of dedicated, hands-on experience with the Snowflake Data Cloud. Snowflake Certification (Pro or Architect) is a major plus.
* **Data Warehousing:** 
 Mastery of Star/Snowflake schemas, SCD types, and Kimball/Inmon methodologies.
* **AI/ML Integration:** 
 Proven experience (or deep theoretical knowledge) of
 **Snowflake Cortex** 
 for integrated AI functions.
* **Financial Services Background:** 
 Prior experience in the
