title: Senior Software Development Engineer
description:
**Senior Software Development Engineer (Nordic Baltic)**
 We’re looking for a Full Stack Developer to join our Software Development team in the Nordic Baltic zone.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll build and evolve the web applications that power Schneider Electric’s engineering and digital solutions. You’ll work closely with product managers, designers, and cross-functional engineering teams to create seamless, intuitive, and performant user experiences across our platforms.
   

  

 Your expertise in
 **Razor, React, JavaScript, and C#** 
 will play a key role in shaping applications that support our customers and internal teams across the region.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 Software is at the heart of Schneider Electric’s digital transformation. The solutions you create will help drive efficiency, reliability, and innovation across buildings, infrastructure, industry, and energy management.
   

  

 Your work will ensure our applications remain modern, scalable, and ready to support the evolving needs of our customers and engineering teams.
   

  

**What Drives Us At Schneider Electric**
 IMPACT isn’t just a buzzword here, it’s embedded in our culture. Schneider Electric makes homes, buildings, data centers, and entire industries more efficient and sustainable. By joining us, you’ll help accelerate the energy transition and tackle the climate crisis head-on.
   

  

 We’re proud to be ranked among the world’s most sustainable companies. Beyond that, we help millions in underserved communities gain access to energy and education, making the world fairer and greener. You’ll work alongside colleagues from diverse backgrounds, united by a shared vision of a better future.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain web applications using Razor, JavaScript, React, and C#.
* Collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate requirements into high-quality technical solutions.
* Implement responsive, intuitive UI designs for a seamless user experience across devices.
* Optimize performance and address bottlenecks to ensure smooth application operation.
* Write clean, maintainable, and scalable code following industry best practices.
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues to maintain stability and reliability.
* Stay current with industry trends and contribute ideas to keep our applications modern and competitive.


**What You Need To Succeed**
* 3+ years of experience as a Full Stack Developer.
* Strong skills in Razor, React, JavaScript, and C#.
* Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and modern front‑end frameworks.
* Experience with .NET Core, RESTful APIs, and SQL databases.
* Familiarity with Git or other version control systems.
* Strong problem‑solving skills and analytical mindset.
* Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.


**Nice to have**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.
* Exposure to Azure or AWS cloud services.
* Understanding of UI/UX principles.
* Experience with BMS (Building Management Systems) is considered a strong advantage.


**Why Schneider Electric?**
* Flexibility: Work remotely with flexible hours to support work–life balance.
* Career growth: Access to continuous learning, training, and development opportunities.
* Inclusive culture: A workplace where everyone feels welcome, respected, and valued.
* Competitive benefits: Market‑aligned compensation and a supportive work environment.


**Ready to join us?**
 If you’re passionate about building modern, user‑centric web applications and want to make an impact in a digital-first, sustainability-driven company, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 Submit your CV and a short motivation about why you’re a great fit for the role.
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €36 billion global revenue
   

  

 +13% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 #1 on the Global 100 World’s most sustainable corporations
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Mjukvaruutvecklare inom realtidssystem
description:
*Vill du utveckla mjukvara för komplexa realtidssystem i en miljö med höga krav på säkerhet, kvalitet och långsiktighet? Vi söker nu en erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare som vill arbeta med applikationsutveckling på produktnivå inom säkerhetsklassade system.*
**Om jobbet**
 I rollen arbetar du med vidareutveckling av en omfattande och tekniskt avancerad produkt med lång livslängd och flera parallella leveranser. Tyngdpunkten ligger på programmering och design på applikationsnivå, där du bidrar till att utveckla och förbättra systemets funktionalitet, stabilitet och prestanda. Arbetet innefattar analys av befintlig kod, implementation av nya funktioner samt anpassningar mot olika kundmiljöer.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett kompetensteam där utvecklarna ansvarar för hela kedjan – från design och implementation till enhetstest och felsökning. Arbetet sker nära systemtest och integration, och du förväntas bidra både med teknisk problemlösning och med att stärka kodkvalitet och arbetssätt i teamet. Miljön präglas av höga krav på struktur, dokumentation och noggrannhet, samtidigt som det finns utrymme för tekniska diskussioner och förbättringsinitiativ.
   

  

 Här får du arbeta i en stabil produktmiljö där tekniskt djup, samarbete och långsiktigt tänkande värderas högt.
   

  

  

**Arbetsuppgifter i urval**
* Vidareutveckling av befintlig produkt inom säkerhetsklassat realtidssystem
* Programmering på applikationsnivå med fokus på logik, databehandling och kommunikation mellan system
* Felsökning och support till systemverifiering
* Samarbete med teamet kring design och implementation
* Bidra med kompetens inom produktutveckling och cloudmiljöer


**Krav för tjänsten**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling med fokus på produktutveckling
* Erfarenhet av programmering i C++, Java och Python
* Erfarenhet av arbete med applikationsnivå i realtidssystem
* God svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


*OBS: Uppdraget är placerat i säkerhetsklass. Inför anställning krävs att du genomgår en säkerhetsprövning och godkänns enligt gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. Detta kan medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av cloudmiljöer och produktutveckling inom sådana
* Kunskap inom Ada
* Tidigare erfarenhet av realtidssystem


**Mer om dig**
 Du är analytisk, lösningsfokuserad och trivs med att arbeta nära ett team av utvecklare. Du är van vid att arbeta med komplexa system och tar ansvar för att dina lösningar fungerar i verkliga miljöer. Du har erfarenhet av att bidra till hela produktens utveckling och uppskattar att dela med dig av din kompetens inom teamet. Du är noggrann, strukturerad och van att följa högt ställda krav på säkerhet och kvalitet.
   

  

  

**Om vår kund**
 Vår kund är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 19 000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar dem teknik och lösningar för en säkrare, mer hållbar och mer rättvis värld.
   

  

  

**Rekryteringsprocessen**
 Cv granskning ->Telefonintervju-> Intervju med Framtiden ->Referenstagning ->Intervju med kund->Säkerhetsprövning
   

  

  

**Villkor**
 Start: Enligt överenskommelse
   

 Omfattning: Heltid
   

 Ort: Järfälla/Solna
   

 Placering: På plats, visst remotearbete kan förekomma beroende på projekt
   

  

  

*Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!*

title: Integration Consultant
description:
Every engineer at Avy works with AI daily. Our stack includes an in-house agentic framework, RAG architecture, vector search, and LLM orchestration in production. We expect you to be fluent with AI-assisted development tools and genuinely curious about pushing AI capabilities further — whether that's improving Davy's accuracy, building new AI-powered features, or rethinking how we architect our AI platform.
 



  





 If you've been experimenting with LLMs, building with retrieval-augmented generation, or thinking about how to ship AI reliably at scale — we want to talk.
 



  





**About us** 




 We are
 **B2B2C modular SaaS platform, powered by AI.** 
 Across ~40 different modules we are heavily relying on various integrations (payments, smart-locks, marketplaces) and AI. As the leading Tenant Experience platform in the Nordics, we reach more than 450,000 households - approximately 20% of all rental tenants in Sweden.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 We're looking for an
 **Integration Consultant** 
 who can both build these integrations and own the customer relationship around them. This is a technical role — you'll write Go, design APIs, and debug data flows. But you'll also sit in rooms with customers, understand their systems, and figure out how to make two worlds talk to each other.
 



  





 You'll be part of our integration team, working closely with project managers and customer-facing teams to onboard new housing companies onto the Avy platform. Day to day, that means:
 



  




* Designing and building integrations in Go against external property management systems — REST APIs, SOAP, file-based transfers, event-driven patterns
* Mapping and transforming data between Avy's platform and customer systems — tenant data, lease information, billing, work orders
* Working directly with customers to understand their technical landscape, gather requirements, and troubleshoot issues
* Collaborating with project managers to plan integration timelines, set priorities, and communicate progress
* Maintaining and improving existing integrations — monitoring reliability, handling edge cases, improving performance
* Documenting integration patterns and building reusable components so we scale faster with each new customer
* Contributing to our integration platform architecture as we grow



  





**Qualifications** 



* Production experience writing Go — this is our primary language for integrations
* Solid understanding of API design, integration patterns, and data transformation
* Experience interfacing with external systems — REST, SOAP, webhooks, file-based exchanges
* Comfort working directly with customers — you can run a technical meeting, gather requirements, and explain complex topics clearly
* Self-driven work style — you manage your time, set priorities, and deliver without needing constant direction
* Strong problem-solving skills and a systematic approach to debugging integration issues
* Fluency in Swedish and English — this is a hard requirement given the customer-facing nature of the role



  





**What we offer:** 



* Opportunity to shape the technical direction of a fast-growing prop-tech scale-up
* Collaborative and innovative work environment
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Professional development opportunities
* Chance to work on cutting-edge technologies and solve complex problems



  





**Location (on-site):** 




 Stockholm, Sweden
 



  





*For this position, Avy is working with internal recruitment resources and is not accepting external agencies. Those kind of requests will not be answered.* 




  





*\*\*EU Candidates Only - No Relocation Provided at the moment\*\**

title: Senior Consultant Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Visa Open Banking (aka Tink) is an open banking platform creating the foundations for a new world of finance. By unlocking the value of financial data through secure connectivity and powerful data products, Visa Open Banking enables banks, fintechs, and businesses across Europe to build smarter financial services.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 We are looking for a Sr. Staff Software Engineer to join the Visa Open Banking AI and Data Platform organization in Stockholm. This role sits at the intersection of data platforms, AI, and product engineering, focusing on building data-driven applications and AI enabled experiences that make data easier to access, understand, and act on.
   

  

 You will work on services and applications that expose data through APIs, web interfaces, and conversational or agent-based experiences, enabling both internal teams and future products to interact with data in more intuitive and powerful ways.
   

  

 This is a senior individual contributor role with significant influence on architecture, technical standards, and product direction.
   

  

**Essential Functions**
 Data-Driven Application Development:
   

  

* Design and build scalable backend services and applications that leverage Visa Open Bankings data platform to deliver insights, analytics, and data-powered functionality via APIs and user interfaces.


**UI And Experience Engineering**
* Build and evolve web-based user interfaces using React and modern frontend technologies, enabling intuitive interaction with data products and AI-powered features.


**AI-Enabled Product Features**
* Implement and operate conversational AI, LLM-backed services, and agent-based systems, including natural language access to data, AI-assisted workflows, and intelligent summaries.


**API And Backend Services**
* Develop backend services using Python (FastAPI or similar) and/or JVM-based frameworks, applying clean API design, security best practices, and performance optimization.


**Platform And Data Integration**
* Partner closely with Data Engineers and ML Engineers to integrate applications with data pipelines, curated datasets, and AI components, ensuring reliable interfaces and clear ownership boundaries.


**Engineering Excellence**
* Apply best practices in software design, testing, security, observability, and operational readiness. Own services end-to-end in production.


**Technical Leadership**
* Lead design discussions, review architecture decisions, mentor engineers, and raise the bar for engineering quality across the team.


**Innovation And Continuous Improvement**
* Explore emerging patterns in AI agents, conversational systems, and data product experiences, and apply them pragmatically to real business problems.


 We do not expect that any single candidate would fulfill all of these characteristics. Some team members bring deeper strengths in UI and application design, others in backend systems or AI integrations.
   

  

 Success in this role comes from strong fundamentals, ownership, and the ability to collaborate across disciplines.
   

  

 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications:
   

  

* Relevant work experience with a bachelors degree in Computer Science or an Advanced Degree (Masters or PhD in Engineering or Computer Science).
* Strong software engineering fundamentals with a proven track record of building end to end, production grade applications that combine backend services, data access, and user interfaces.
* Expert level skills in Java or Python, strong experience with JavaScript or TypeScript.
* Hands on experience building modern web applications and UIs using React, HTML, CSS, and related frontend frameworks and patterns.
* Proven experience designing and building data driven backend services using Python (FastAPI or similar frameworks) or equivalent JVM based frameworks.
* Experience implementing AI powered features such as conversational AI, LLM backed services, intelligent assistants, or agent-based systems, integrated into real products.
* Familiarity with agent orchestration patterns, tool calling, and emerging agent or MCP-style protocols for building extensible AI-driven systems.
* Strong understanding of API design, backend for frontend (BFF) patterns, and secure data access for analytics and insight heavy applications.
* Experience integrating AI ML components into larger systems, including prompt orchestration, evaluation, safety controls, and runtime monitoring.
* Solid experience with distributed systems, concurrency, error handling, and performance optimization.
* Experience with cloud native development and deployment (e.g., AWS or GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, CI CD pipelines).
* Strong collaboration skills with data engineers, ML engineers, product managers, and designers to deliver cohesive, user-facing solutions.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience building internal platforms, developer tools, or data analytics products with rich UI and API layers.
* Familiarity with data platforms, warehouses, or lakehouse architectures (e.g., BigQuery, Snowflake, Trino or Presto).
* Experience with observability, monitoring, and reliability practices for data intensive and AI enabled services.
* Exposure to fintech, open banking, or other regulated data domains.
* Experience mentoring engineers and influencing technical direction beyond immediate project scope.


**The Skills You Bring**
* End-to-end builder: Comfortable owning UI, APIs, and backend services together.
* Strong systems thinker: Able to reason across data platforms, application layers, and AI components.
* Pragmatic innovator: Balances experimentation with production-grade reliability.
* Collaborative partner: Works effectively across product, data, ML, and design disciplines.
* Continuous learner: Stays current with evolving AI, frontend, and backend technologies.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Staff Software Engineer (Rendering)
description:
**Company Overview**
 Metrea delivers effects-as-a-service to national security partners across five domains and more than a dozen mission areas—including airborne ISR, electronic warfare, secure communications, aerial refueling, special mission aviation, aerial firefighting, and advanced simulation.
   

  

 Wherever we operate, we build vertically integrated full stacks of capability—designing, building, and operating turnkey solutions that let customers scale capacity while benefiting from continuous cycles of innovation. With operators and engineers under one roof, we close the gap between lab and field—what we call connecting design with effect.
   

  

 Metrea’s solutions are built for elegance: effective, efficient, and evolving. This approach enables our partners to do more with less and achieve outsized, asymmetric advantage against rapidly evolving threats.
   

  

 Headquartered in Washington, DC, Metrea has facilities across the United States, the United Kingdom, Europe, and beyond.
   

  

 Group Overview
   

  

 The Digital and Synthetic Capability Unit (D&S) is committed to providing mission-driven information solutions that seamlessly bridge the digital and physical realms. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies and advanced platforms, we empower operational readiness and elevate situational awareness across diverse domains—including air, maritime, and space.
   

  

 Position Summary
   

  

 In this role you will join our World team and work on optimization of real-time rendering systems, with an emphasis on modern rendering techniques and GPU pipeline mastery. While expertise with Unreal Engine is not mandatory, it is considered a significant advantage. As a candidate you will bring a deep understanding of rendering architectures, shader programming, and the latest technologies.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Develop and optimize real-time rendering pipelines for high-performance visuals
* Collaborate closely with artists, designers, and other engineers to bring creative visions to life while maintaining technical feasibility
* Profile, debug, and optimize GPU and CPU performance to meet performance benchmarks
* Write, maintain, and document clean, reusable, and efficient code
* Integrate rendering features seamlessly into existing pipelines and identify areas for innovation
* Stay updated on the latest advancements in real-time rendering and integrate applicable technologies into the workflow


 What You Bring
   

  

* Strong understanding of the GPU pipeline and modern rendering architectures
* Expertise in HLSL/GLSL or equivalent shader programming languages
* Proficiency with DirectX, Vulkan, OpenGL, or other low-level graphics APIs
* Experience implementing modern rendering techniques such as deferred shading, compute shader driven drawing, ray tracing effects and similar
* Ability to profile and optimize rendering performance for real-time applications
* 5+ years of C++ programming experience
* Bonus: In-depth knowledge of Unreal Engine 4/5 source code, rendering modules, and provided shaders


**In addition to the above, any of the following would be beneficial:**
* Passion for pushing the boundaries of what is possible in real-time rendering
* Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset to work effectively within a multidisciplinary team
* Self-motivated with a proactive approach to problem-solving
* Flexibility to adapt to new challenges and technologies as they arise
* Experience in gaming, simulation, or VR/AR projects is a plus


**Benefits**
* Friskvård of 5K annually
* Parental leave
* 5% occupational pension (swe. tjänstepension)
* 30 days of leave
* Bonus Scheme
* Personal development opportunities


 Right to Work
   

  

 The employee will have the legal right to work in Sweden and will be able to produce right to work documentation.
   

  

 Equal Opportunities Statement
   

  

 Metrea Management Limited (MAM) is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

 Position Type and Expected Hours of Work
   

  

 This is a full-time non-exempt position with typical working hours of Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Hours and work shifts may change in accordance with department and business needs. Exempt Employees must have the ability to be on-call and available, as business needs require. Non-Exempt employees may be required to work over 40 hours per week with approval from the department manager.
   

  

 Work Location
   

  

 3 days per week from the office in Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

 Work Environment
   

  

 This job operates in an office setting
   

  

 Travel
   

  

 No travel required
   

  

 Our Firmware
   

  

 At Metrea, our single core value, Rooted in Humility, and our four cornerstone attributes—Entrepreneurial, Systematic, Discerning, and Over-Deliver. These form what we call our Teammate Firmware. Just like technical firmware connects software and hardware, our Firmware is the constant interface between our mission and our people. It defines how we show up, how we work together, and how we solve complex problems.
   

  

 Our team Firmware creates a web-like, hyper-collaborative, dynamically hierarchical way of working that helps us adapt quickly, communicate openly, and distribute decision-making to where expertise actually lives. It enables groups to self-organize around hard problems, shift fluidly as priorities evolve, and operate with the trust, curiosity, and discipline required in a complex mission space. This foundation allows us to deliver elegant, effective solutions and uphold our purpose: protecting our precious inheritance.

title: Integration specialist
description:
Nu söker vi vår nästa ledare med flera års erfarenhet av att bygga integrationslösningar. Vi är ett team av utvecklare som jobbar i
 *C#/.NET-stacken och drivs av uppdrag med mycket logik och avancerade integrationer. Om du vill bygga unikt anpassade lösningar och vara en ledare i leverans- då är vi rätt gäng för dig!*
**Vad ingår i jobbet som integrationsspecialist på Accigo?**
 Som integrationsspecialist hos oss bygger du nya API:er i C#/.NET och är väl bevandrad i de tekniker som Azure Integration Services erbjuder. Du tar en ledande roll i leverans och har stor möjlighet att påverka och tycka till gällande olika teknikval – vilket är något som vi både uppmuntrar och uppskattar.
   

  

 Du kommer även att utveckla och underhålla befintliga kundlösningar i förvaltningsåtaganden. Rollen är dynamisk och bjuder på variationsrika och spännande tekniska utmaningar med stora möjligheter att utveckla dina kunskaper och bredda din erfarenhet utifrån dina egna ambitioner.
   

  

 Några exempel på vad du kan komma arbeta med:
   

  

* Designa och skapa integrationslösningar i Microsoft Azure
* Designa och skapa API:er och fasader för integrationer
* Arbeta självständigt i mindre uppdrag
* Leda utvecklingsteam


**Vi söker dig som**
* Under ca 5+ år har jobbat med C# och byggt API:er
* Tycker att CI/CD är lika självklart som att solen går upp varje dag
* Har stor kunskap inom Microsoft Azure utifrån att bygga integrationslösningar
* Är erfaren inom Azure integration services (Logic Apps, Azure functions, API Management, Azure services bus, data factory och event grid)
* Tycker om och har erfarenhet av att bygga komplexa lösningar med fokus på logik
* Är van att jobba och leda i agil scrum-process


**Det är meriterande om du dessutom har**
* Erfarenhet av att arbetat med BizTalk eller liknande integrationsmotor
* Erfarenhet av konsultrollen


 Vem är du?
   

  

 Du är en team-player som antagligen gillar att umgås mycket med dina kollegor. För att lyckas på Accigo är det viktigt att du är kommunikativ, nyfiken och prestigelös.
   

  

 Du är en problemlösare som vågar testa nya tankar, perspektiv och tekniker.
   

  

 Du är en naturlig coach åt andra som förstår skillnaden mellan att ge kritik och konstruktiv feedback. Sist men inte minst, strävar du alltid efter att göra ditt bästa i alla lägen.
   

  

 Vårt team
   

  

 Teamet Cloud & Development är ett gäng utvecklare och affräsledare som mer än ofta är ute hos kunder och projektleder eller kravställer nya spännande lösningar.
   

  

 För oss är laganda och glädje jätteviktigt och vi ser därför till att hitta på roliga aktiviteter med teamet både på och utanför arbetstid. Det ska vara kul att jobba och alla ska ha möjlighet att utvecklas i linje med sin egen ambition. Det innebär att vi arbetar med många utmanande och spännande projekt i ett lagom tempo. Hos oss är det bara din egen ambition och lust som sätter gränsen för hur mycket du kan utvecklas!
   

  

 Kompensation och förmåner
   

  

 Vår förmånspolicy är utvecklad för att möta både dina professionella och personliga behov. I vårt omfattande förmånspaket ingår friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension och frivillig sjukvårdsförsäkring. Vår ersättningsmodell består av en konkurrenskraftig fast del och en rörlig del som ger dig möjlighet att påverka din lön baserat på din prestation och ambition. Vi erbjuder både professionell och personlig utveckling.
   

  

**Nyfiken?** 
 Vi svarar gärna på frågor, eller berättar mer om oss över en kaffe - du kan enkelt komma i kontakt med oss: tyra.drakenberg@accigo.se.
   

  

 Accigo är ett konsultbolag som hjälper företag och organisationer med digital affärs- och verksamhetsutveckling med tekniken som möjliggörare. För oss handlar digitalisering till 90% om människor och 10% om teknik. Det är när samspelet mellan människa och teknik fungerar som digitaliseringens fulla styrka visar sig.
   

  

 För många handlar digitalisering mest om teknik. För oss är det så otroligt mycket större. Digitalisering kan få både människor och organisationer att våga sikta högre, följa sina drömmar och öppna dörrar som de inte ens visste fanns. Och när man ser igenom tekniken och börjar skönja vilka möjligheter som gömmer sig där bakom. Då ser man att framtiden kan vara en fantastisk plats – fylld av mänsklig energi och värme – och digitalisering är inget annat än vår superkraft för att komma dit.

title: Test Engineer, AFRY Automotive
description:
**Company Description**
**About AFRY:** 
 AFRY provides engineering, design, digital and advisory services. We are devoted experts in industry, energy and infrastructure sectors, creating impact for generations to come. AFRY has Nordic roots with a global reach.
   

  

 Our shared principles - Results driven, Client Centric, Empowering and Accountable - guide us in how we work, grow and succeed together. Join us and unlock transitions towards a sustainable and resilient society.
   

  

**About AFRY Automotive:** 
 AFRY Automotive, located in the Stockholm region with office in Södertälje/Solna, operates in a truly international environment, collaborating with several sites worldwide, including Brazil, India, and Gothenburg. We support our customers with expertise in design, engineering, and embedded systems, both through in-house projects and on-site with the customer. AFRY Automotive provides consulting services to the automotive industry and genuinely contributes to a more sustainable future by creating smarter and more sustainable vehicles.
   

  

 The automotive industry is undergoing significant transformation, with vehicles increasingly being designed and produced to become more autonomous and electrified. This shift aims to create a sustainable transport sector for the future, and AFRY Automotive is at the heart of this exciting change.
   

  

**Team Culture:** 
 At AFRY Automotive, we believe in fostering a supportive and inclusive team culture where everyone feels valued and heard. Our teams are built on mutual respect, collaboration, and a shared passion for innovation. We encourage open communication and the sharing of ideas, knowing that diverse perspectives lead to better solutions. Our workplace is one where you can grow both professionally and personally, with opportunities for continuous learning and development. We celebrate successes together and support each other through challenges, creating a positive and enjoyable work environment. Laughter and camaraderie are integral parts of our daily work life, making AFRY Automotive not just a place to work, but a place to thrive.
   

  

**Job Description**
*Test Engineer – Contribute to the Future of Sustainable Mobility*
 As part of our growing automotive segment, we are now looking for a test engineer– someone who wants to help develop and ensure the quality of next-generation electric and hybrid drivetrains.
   

  

**A role where technology meets structure and collaboration**
 In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to work both independently and closely with others in projects that combine technical complexity with clear processes and shared goals. You’ll contribute to the development and improvement of our test environments, validate software, and help ensure that our solutions meet high standards – always with safety and the end user in mind.
   

  

 You’ll be part of a team that develops and tests advanced drivetrain systems, working both on-site with clients and in our own project environments. The role offers a broad scope, where you’ll combine technical analysis, problem-solving, and documentation with hands-on work in test environments.
   

  

**Your main responsibilities include:**
* Analyzing system and software requirements, developing and automating test cases, and executing tests.
* Troubleshooting, analyzing logs, and contributing to solutions when issues arise
* Creating and maintaining documentation, including test cases, reports, and best practices
* Supporting continuous improvement and knowledge sharing within the team
* Installing, configuring, and maintaining systems and test environments
* Designing and simulating test environments for validation purposes


**Qualifications**
**We believe you bring:**
* A university degree in electrical engineering, electronics, mechatronics, or a related field
* At least five years of relevant experience in the automotive industry, preferably in testing


**Experience and skills that are valuable in this role:**
* Solid understanding of drivetrain technologies, including electric drives and transfer cases
* Programming skills in Python, CAPL, or MATLAB/Simulink
* Hands-on experience with dSPACE systems.
* Familiarity with test automation tools such as vTestStudio or ECU-Test
* Experience with requirements management tools like DOORS, IBM Jazz, or PTC, and version control systems (SVN, GitHub)
* Practical experience with debugging and flashing tools (e.g. Lauterbach, vFlash, DiagRA)
* Proficiency in Vector tools such as CANalyzer, CANoe, CANape, and CANoe.DiVa
* Understanding of communication protocols such as UDS and OBD; experience with GM CG tests is a plus
* Familiarity with functional safety (ISO 26262), cybersecurity (ISO 21434), ASPICE, and ISTQB certification
* Knowledge of AUTOSAR architectures, microcontrollers, and bootloader concepts


**Additional Information**
 At AFRY, you’ll have the opportunity to grow in an environment where technology, structure, and care go hand in hand. We believe in the power of collaboration, continuous learning, and creating solutions that make a real difference – for our clients and for society as a whole.
   

  

 Welcome to submit your application, the deadline is
 **2026-04-26**
 Please note that selection will be ongoing, so apply now as the position may be filled before the deadline.
   

  

 Don't forget to update suitable information for this position in your CV.
   

  

 We only accept applications thrue this system. Apply by clicking the "Apply now" button. Applications by e-mail will not be considered.
   

  

 Contact persons for questions:
   

  

 Hiring manager
   

  

**Johan Krii** 
 , Service Area Manager
   

  

 johan.krii@afry.com
   

  

 We kindly ask not to be contacted by staffing and recruitment agencies or salespeople offering additional job advertisements.
   

  

*At AFRY, we engineer change in everything we do. Change happens when brave ideas come together. When we collaborate, innovate technology, and embrace challenging points of view. That’s how we're making future. We are actively looking for qualified candidates to join our inclusive and diverse teams across the globe. Join us in accelerating the transition towards a sustainable future.*

 Hiring manager

title: Senior Platform Engineer (Infrastructure)
description:
**About Gelato** 




 Gelato has created the world’s largest global network for on-demand production of custom products – from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.
 



  





 At Gelato, we don’t own production facilities – we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It’s smarter, faster, and greener.
 



  





 With GelatoConnect, our SaaS platform, we’re driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we’re reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.
 



  





**Platform** 




**Gelato** 
 is an
 **AI-first** 
 , cloud-native platform transforming local, on-demand production and delivery — with zero physical assets. We power:
 


* **Global production orchestration** 
 : connecting e-commerce customers to 130+ partners across 32 countries. From AI-guided plate design to smart routing and logistics, we deliver to over 5 billion people in under 72 hours—faster, greener, smarter.
* **GelatoConnect** 
 : our AI-driven print production OS that helps producers master digital printing — from inventory to shipping — by automating every step: procurement, prepress, printing, packaging, and dispatch. It’s machine-agnostic, real-time, and built for uptime, precision, and profitability.



  





**AI at the Core** 




 We are not just early adopters of AI — we’re
 **AI-native builders** 
 . Across engineering, product, and operations, we embrace AI to accelerate innovation:
 


* **AI-first development** 
 using LLMs for code generation, testing, documentation, and design exploration.
* **Autonomous AI agents** 
 driving platform resilience, observability, cost control, and internal workflow automation.
* **AI-native product features** 
 built into GelatoConnect and the core platform — improving routing, personalization, and production optimization.
* A culture of
 **continuous experimentation** 
 with RAG, agent orchestration, prompt engineering, and model fine-tuning.



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Ensure 24/7 platform operations, including on-call support and incident response.
* Build and evolve
 **AI agents** 
 that automate scaling, recovery, and diagnostics through control-plane patterns and event-driven logic.
* Manage
 **multi-cloud infrastructure** 
 , including serverless, through declarative, automated workflows.
* Collaborate with the
 **Delivery Platform** 
 team to improve DevEx with intelligent internal tooling.
* Drive
 **reliability, observability, and cost-efficiency** 
 across Gelato’s global infrastructure.
* Enable engineers with
 **self-service, secure, and scalable delivery pipelines** 
 .



  





**Qualifications** 



* Deep understanding of
 **Linux fundamentals** 
 (processes, I/O, filesystems, networking, memory management, system internals).
* Deep experience with
 **AWS** 
 (primary)
 **and GCP** 
 (bonus), including cost optimizations, EKS, networking, S3, VPC peering, IAM, and related services.
* Strong understanding of
 **Kubernetes internals** 
 , including networking, security, and cluster operations.
* Hands-on experience with
 **GitOps workflows** 
 (e.g. ArgoCD) and
 **Infrastructure as Code** 
 using Terraform.
* Proficient in
 **Python, Go** 
 , or other languages — with a willingness to learn Go if not already familiar.
* Comfortable using
 **AI development tools** 
 like Cursor, Claude, and coding with LLMs.



  





 Experience with or strong interest in building
 **AI agents and RAG workflows** 
 , with a commitment to learn if needed.
 



  





**What it’s like to work at Gelato** 




 We are a customer-obsessed team with the ambition to change the world by connecting technology to the printing industry and making it much more sustainable. Everyone who joins our team must feel genuinely intrigued and motivated by our mission. We expect a lot. We are a driven team with big goals, so we seek individuals who are genuinely passionate about their work and possess an entrepreneurial spirit. Our culture is unique and we live by our values, so it's worth learning more about our culture and how we work before presenting your application.
 



  





 At Gelato, we pride ourselves on our global presence with 14 offices worldwide, fostering a dynamic and diverse work environment. Rooted in a culture that values collaboration, creativity, and camaraderie, we actively cultivate a company culture that thrives on shared experiences. We encourage team members to embrace this culture by working from our inspiring office spaces at least three days a week, allowing for meaningful connections and collective growth.
 



  





 Lastly, we ask that you please upload your CV in
 **English** 
 , regardless of which country you are applying from.

title: Sommarjobb 2026
description:
Req ID:510567
   

  

 På Alstom förstår vi transportsystem och vad som får människor att röra på sig. Från höghastighetståg, tunnelbanor, monorails och spårvagnar till kompletta system, tjänster, infrastruktur, signalteknik och digital mobilitet – vi erbjuder våra olika kunder det bredaste utbudet i branschen. Varje dag leder 80 000 kollegor vägen mot grönare och smartare mobilitet världen över genom att knyta samman städer, minska koldioxidutsläpp och ersätta bilar.
   

  

 Här får du chansen att använda din tekniska kompetens i en dynamisk miljö där du samarbetar med utvecklingsteam och stakeholders.
   

  

**Vad kommer du att göra?**
* Enklare skriptning
* Samla relevant information från data och presentera
* Dokumentation
* Arbeta nära ett engagerat och mångsidigt mjukvaruteam


**Vi värdesätter driv och engagemang, men tror att följande egenskaper hjälper dig att lyckas:**
* Studerande på högskola/gymnasiet, gärna en teknisk inriktning eller mot data, it.
* Kunskaper i C#, javascript eller liknande
* Goda kunskaper i Office-paketet
* Flytande i skrift/tal i svenska och engelska.


**Varför Alstom?** 
 På Alstom blir du en del av ett team som är engagerat i att forma framtidens hållbara transporter med innovation och syfte. Att ansluta sig till oss innebär att vara en del av ett globalt samhälle som är dedikerat till excellens och att skapa en säker miljö för vår verksamhet. Är du redo att gå med i ett verkligt internationellt samhälle av fantastiska människor på en utmanande resa med en konkret påverkan och ett meningsfullt syfte?
   

  

**Viktigt att veta** 
 Eftersom tjänsten är säkerhetsklassad, genomför vi en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen kapitel 3. Därför krävs svenskt eller EU-medborgarskap.
   

  

 Du behöver inte vara tågentusiast för att trivas hos oss. Vi garanterar att när du kliver ombord på ett av våra tåg med vänner och familj kommer du känna stolthet. Om du är villig att anta utmaningen vill vi gärna höra från dig!
